playStoreReviews.text: This app is incredibly deceptive. It doesn't tell you anywhere that the appt time you're selecting will have a 20%+ upcharge because it's a "high demand time slot" until you're just about to confirm. No indication whatsoever until that point (I don't know what the yellow dot means because the upcharge applies to times without it). SO, if you're lucky enough to notice it, you'll have to just try another over and over until you find a time that doesn't charge you an extra $50(!!!). What a scam.

The calendar integration is absolutely terrible. We have to resync every time we get a Square appointment. This has led to double-booking multiple times. Also, not a great app for estheticians, it's clearly geared toward hair, nails. It seems more suited for freelancers vs. professional businesses. One other thing - there are tons of scammers on this platform, be careful when people reach out via messaging, asking for services.

I've had this app for years now and the one thing I like is to be able to charge a no-show fee. hold deposits for new clients and typically easy to use. My issues are when receiving notifications through text, I dont ever get one. They charge my client a fee to book, and I also just recently bought a new device and I cannot log into my account. there is no customer service number to call, everything is done through email and a problem like being unable to log in to conduct business is not ideal.

I was with this booking app from the beginning. When it was free, the. Went to 30.00 then 35.00no problem. You crossed the line when you started charging my clients $1.00 to book and didnt inform me. I was notified by my clients. Along with a $10.00 fee a client of mines was charged to get an earlier appointment. Also, taking my clients money to hold if they booked out in advance. I am no longer with styleseat I found a new booking site. You lost a lot of business pulling that update.

Of you already know what you want and who you want to do it, the app is decent. But, if you are looking for something/someone new, this app is frustrating to use. It allows you to sort by date but then will show stylists who aren't available for the date you want. I shouldn't have to click "book" just to find out they aren't available...Kind of annoying. Same thing with sorting by style.

Really disappointed in the app lately. 1. The booking fee issue, regardless of the "retention" reason, we the stylists already pay a monthly service and have our own loyalty programs. The fact that we were not notified instead notified by our clients is unprofessional. 2. A lot of logging out is happening and unable to check my clients file . I really enjoy the system but I feel like it's starting to take a controlling turn and taking too much of my own way of running my business .

I'm a long time styleseat user, the app was great when I first started using it. When they started charging a monthly fee($35), I understood and the app really was worth it so I stayed. However I notice now that it takes a while for appointments to populate in the app causing me to double but time slots. There is a very bad delay with notifications of bookings. Now my clients are upset for being charged to book with me. I will not continue using this service.

I'm a professional, and I've had this app since 2016. They've updated the app and changed so much. It doesn't allow me to open the new updated version. But they get my money every month. I have an established clientele and can't see my books. Having to go through my emails, or my clients app to see my books is ridiculous. How do I pay every month, but they don't recognize my email address. It's unacceptable!!!! Ridiculous styleseat. We can't talk to anyone or call. U get paid we DON'T!!!

Although a great scheduling app that holds customers accountable for the appointments that they make, the app kind of plays a "shell game" with your money. You'll need a credit or debit card to reserve an appointment, upon which it will automatically show you misleading prompts to prepay, with the gratuitous added in. I've been using the app for about six months, and I was mislead you prepay when I usually pay cash. It's better for the barber.

I have been trying to resolve an issue for the longest. the only way to contact you all is through email is very unacceptable. You click on "Help Center" it goes to "Web Page not Available".You are charging me a monthly rate than my clients a $1 every time they book with me which is very ridiculous and unacceptable.  Yet you can't get any issues resolved at all with you all. I done a client last Friday Dec 27 processed her payment through your system & have yet been paid. THE WORST EXPERIENCE

The chat function in the app no longer works, so I can only communicate with stylists via the chat function on a desktop computer. Otherwise, I'm still enjoying the functionality of being able to find stylists, book services, and automatically check out when the service is completed. I do hate the nonsensical gallery functionality and that there's an asininely limited window to tip stylists. I was recently hospitalized and was unable to tip my stylus because I missed the 24-hour window.

Very slow, complicated for clients to add on multiple services, pre authorization amount is low therefore clients can book appointments with insufficient funds. There are a lot of fees but no specific # of clients they refer per month for all the money spent on marketing. I do like that it notifies clients of their appointments and prompts clients for reviews.But I do think there are a lot of errors within the app and it would be nice to talk to someone directly rather than sending emails.

StyleSeat is helpful for finding a stylist in the area. But I wish there was a confirmation screen for when you make an appointment. Instead, the reserve button just grays out once you book. As a result of this, I unintentionally booked 5 different appointments and was charged a fee each time. I didn't realize it until I clicked on my appointments and saw them listed. I had to go back and delete all of them and I was not reimbursed the booking fees. Please fix this flaw.

The interface looks nice but can be very slow, glitchy and hard to use. I don't like that one of stylists I go to, EVERY time slot is a "high-demand" slot. It's not something the professional sets, it's something that SS does to collect additional commissions. It's hard to turn off the auto pay feature. Which is helpful if a stylist doesn't show. Couldn't even find customer service to help when that happened.

Other apps/programs like vagaro and booker work better for businesses without the bugs, semi-monthly crashes, etc. Also the BIGGEST thing for me is the $35 price when other apps work better, offer more support, more options/features and protect us from client card payment scams, non-payments, etc for $10-15 cheaper per month. Styleseat is really getting over on us people. Your money and scheduling/payment programs should work efficiently for your money, not the other way around. I've cancelled my subscription.

Not enough information. Trying the app for the first time. I'm always skeptical about anything involving my credit card information. Booked first appointment but something came up and had to cancel. While some charge was reasonable, it would have been more ethical to let me know beforehand that i was going to be charged 50% if an appointment was canceled. I was only assured that i wasn't going to be charged until the service was performed. Well, to say less, deleted my account and then the app.

DON'T USE STYLESEAT! I've used them for a few years now and all has been good until recently, I no longer have a "smooth" booking experience with the system, the site goes "unresponsive" about every 10 minutes or more, I use Chrome, I've tried Firefox, I've uninstalled Chrome, reinstalled and no go! Removed extensions, I've tried it all! And now they are charging clients a $1 fee to book their appointments online!! My $35/month is no longer enough!? Currently researching other booking sites!

The app use to be amazing but they are just coming up with more fees and ways to get money on top of me paying a monthly fee. If a new customer finds you on the site they say its there marketing and try and take 35% of the first appt. I dont understand why we pay a monthly fee and extra fees for clients that are meant to use the site and find us. Also the app has been messing up and not allow me to get to my calendar it takes several tries of opening and closing the app.

I never had any problems It does what it needs to do,but more features would make it worth it.I do like the instant deposit feauture,that's a better feature that they've added. But now it keeps freezing up at checkout. I cant cash my clients out and sometimes they have to pay with card even though they want to pay cash because my checkout screen keeps freezing. I keep uninstalling and reinstalling the app for it to work. Sometimes it does sometimes it doesn't. Overall it's a good booking site.

Can't see the dates on the "month view", I contacted the "(no)help desk" to only be told "update my software", "uninstall and reinstall the app", "then repeat"... and to finish, "oh, well use the desktop version". Great job guys, your app breaks and your solution is "don't use the app". That makes you Awesome at your job!!! (I can't wait to tell EVERYONE to uninstall the app, per the helpdesk!)

App is free to use but it's. 5$ booking fee per appt, you can't hold one appt while looking for a closer stylist, so I booked to hold it, and now I'm out $10 dollars and no appt. Gave up closed acct and walked into a salon not on the app and still payed a reasonable price for braids. I do not recommend this app. You will lose money, stylist may be working from their home and not a real salon , or stylist will no show on clients. Lots of bad reviews for stylist.. -$10 that won't be returned.

Clear Money Grab From Loyal Customers!!! USERS BEWARE!! Developer says the extra charges are for the users, DON'T BE FOOLED PEOPLE!! This is an application your Hair Stylist/Barber pays a monthly fee to offer to their clients. Now everyone who uses it has to pay a fee every time they schedule an appointment, previously this was free. I will just call in and schedule my appointments, I'm not paying a fee to this application for something a 30 second call can solve and you shouldn't either!!

I booked an appointment on Styleseat and the stylish changed the time. Style seat allowed the Stylist to change my appointment without letting me accept or decline. And since it was within the 24hrs of my appointment time, I would be charged a cancellation fee!!! The app should allow the customer to approve of the time change or cancel at the customers discretion.

The app had been decent until recently. For the last 3 bookings, I called the stylist to confirm, only for them to tell me they actually aren't available. The first two, they weren't available for that time nor hardly any other anytime soon. The third just informed me she actually isn't taking new clients & generally doesn't like to take clients through the app since it takes so much on their end. I've found myself increasingly skipping this app & instead taking my luck with Google. Unreliable.

My clients love the reminder text. I'm not happy with the November update,I can't book my own clients without them paying a booking fee. I'm already paying a subscription fee. I feel like my regulars shouldn't be paying this fee. The update made the app very slow,so frustrating in this busy season. I've been using stylseat over 10 years ,very disappointed in how there changing. $10 to book an appointment for a client. Your already getting a subscription fee on top of the cc processing fee

Bullying Into Paying With Credit Card. My barber has been using SS for a long time and will be dropping now that clients cannot book an appointment without having to enter CC info. A lot of people like to pay cash, but now we have to pay a fee to book...super lame. Also, I cannot find a way to add my appointment to my native calendar with all these changes. I used to be able to find my appointment and add it to my Android calendar.

At first the app worked fine now it takes forever for my books to load. I can't reschedule client's cause it takes 10+ min to load. It continuously shuts me out. I have reached out to yall numerous of time's and it has been of no help. This has been on going for about a month or so now. It's very frustrating especially when I pay a monthly fee.

If you're looking for salon booking services, look elsewhere. My wife has been using this app since 2014 when it was free. They then started charging $35 a month to utilize the service. I get it. You gotta charge something for cloud/web storage, server costs, employees, etc. Now they're charging CLIENTS a $1 online booking fee and a $10 early access fee to move appointments up and said nothing about the charges to the stylists. My advice, do not use this service. Schedulista is great. Less $

Im over it, I am sick of these sites making you put a card on the site to do stuff, they take the money out your account immediately but you have to wait for them to give you your money back. Not to mention the default settings, a tip is for good service, not just because, so don't automatically set nothing on my account to just take out 20% off an unknown amount.

I am a professional. And I have been using this app for awhile. Usually I get a response back obviously only through email. Now I am not getting no response and the "chat" no one is ever available. I am not sure if there was a recent update but a lot of the features I am unable to use, and getting clients notifications super late. These fees are ridiculous on top of the regular monthly fees.. might need to find another program. Support is not helpful at all!!

They deleted my negative review. So I'm going to rewrite it: They ask for a $1 holding fee... then they charge your card the full amount before you're finished with you're appointment and add a 20% tip rate. They don't tell you beforehand. If anything goes wrong with your appointment you're out of luck because you already paid and there is no customer service. they say "take it up with the stylist"

It charges $1 to book an appointment, that dollar does not go towards my barber. Also it charges a 20% tip for appointments a certain times, which doesn't go towards my barber either. While searching for another location for a service in a particular area I had to cancel twice because the 2 previous were not in the area searched & did not have the location of the appointment until it sent a confirmation email.

I moved to a new area and this app has been super helpful in finding a stylist. Buy, the app loads super slow! Sometimes I just close it until another time when I can be more patient. On top of that, it charges $10 more if you book an appointment during a peak time. What salon does that??! This extra $ will be taken out of the tip! As soon as I can find a regular stylist, I am deleting this app!

The app is easy to use, but updating to include a $1 per booking fee to customers (something no other booking app does) when the stylists are already paying $35/month is highway robbery. There was no notice of an update to terms of service and even when you go into them, the link to fees lands you in a "Coming soon" page. Deceptive practice and a ridiculous amount to charge app users who book weekly appointments. Class action anyone?

Can never login. It doesn't say "incorrect password" or anything. I hit login and everything I typed disappears. I reset my password, type in my new one exactly... and the same thing happens. I hate this app. It happens on the website, too. It isn't the stylists faults, but it's aggravating. I can't get in to book any of them.

Completely disappointed. I dont even take cards and I pay 35 for this app each month just to ensure appointments are reminded for my clients. Now I cannot even access the app. How am I supposed to see my schedule for the day? As nicely as I can put it, YOU NEED live customer service. Do not tell me you're sorry and then tell me to email you at your email that takes days to get a response. I dont have time for things like this. I will be canceling and subscribing elsewhere as soon as I can.

I've used style seat for almost 3 years. The last year it's been awful! App constantly freezes. There's always a charge for my clients. They don't respond to emails and have no customer service to contact. You're charged $35 a month, your client gets $1 booking fee, they take 50% for finding you a client ( even though you found that client), they're charging 20% for a "popular time slot", they charge $10 to book a last minute appointment. This app robs you! I'm switching!

At first, I thought the app was great. Then it required me to put my credit card on file. I didn't like it, as I don't think it's safe to keep credit cards on file anywhere, but I understood the issues that stylists sometimes have with payment or no shows. Today, I went to book an appt and was charged to book! This is ridiculous! Especially when they have such an awful search engine. Everytime I search a specific service, I have to keep typing it in after viewing a stylist. Very inconvenient.

I use Stylseat professional for more than 10 years. It use to be great, but now I question what they do even legal. I pay monthly to be able to book my clients with remembers. Now I can't schedule any appointments without forcing my clients to add credit card on file. Also they charge my client$4.99 to book an appointment. The other day they charge mycliet $25 tip on Sun when I don't work without my permission. I had to do refund. I try to contact custumer support but it was worthless!

I like that the app helps you find stylist based on what you are looking for and pricing. But the scheduling and payment process is a nightmare!!! THEY WILL TAKE YOUR MONEY!!! I had an automatic 20% tip taken, even though I tried to adjust it prior to it coming out of my account. Save your money by just contacting the stylist and setting up an appointment on your own.

I've been using StyleSeat for a few years. I've liked the app though it does hang up a bit sometimes, but I figured the pros outweigh the cons. But since the last update this app completely sucks. It periodically makes me have to log in which when you're in a hurry with clients you don't really have time to do. Sometimes it even tells me that my trial subscription is up. I don't have a trial subscription, I pay $35 a month for this app! Now I can't even get onto the app at all., FIX IT!!!

Do not use these folks AT ALL! They automatically charge you for your appointments and you can't opt-out (even though the feature appears in your profile). You have to tell your stylist to do it. If you pay cash and then your stylist forgets to cancel or in my case, they try but it doesn't work, you get double-charged with no way to get a refund from Styleseat!!!! That's in addition to their freaking $1 booking fee! Booksy is a better service.

I really want to give it a 5 but it has so many loading issues. My clients can't even book appointments half the time & complain that when trying to tip me the screen is frozen (which causes me to loose money) I've reached out to them several times but I just get the same response: update the app, our engineers are working on it... the updates don't help. The app was awesome when it was free, but ever since they started charging us, it has become full of glitches....definitely moving elsewhere.

I have booked multiple appointments where I recieved notifications for the appointment, but the stylest was never notified. luckily the stylist I booked are great and went out their way (and mine) to find time (after closing hours) to fit me in. On two of the occasions I booked, the stylest said the times I was able to book was suppose to be blocked off on styleseat. these glitches need to be looked into.

I like the ease of making appointments but why now is there a $1 booking fee. And after my appointment is done, I get a text to confirm and submit my payment, but that page never comes up. So I have to wait and check my account to see what has been charged. Not liking styeseat right now. Wish my stylist would find a better booking app.🤔🤔

It's frustrating that you can't go back and look at the service menu after you've chosen one. If I change my mind about a service I've chosen, and progressed to the appointment screen, I have to exit out, search for the stylist and start all over. Also I can't access my list of favorites so if I save someone, I have to remember their name and search manually for them.

This application is not worth the extra money I pay monthly. I am currently having an issue with the app closing in the middle of a transaction and have lost opportunities to reschedule clients. In addition, If you have an issue, there isn't a phone number to call. I've been using this app for a few years and will have to cancel my subscription if it doesn't get resolved. SO FRUSTRATED! UPDATE 2/16/2021 APPLICATION CONTINUES TO CRASH, NO RESPONSE FROM DEVELOPERS WHEN I REQUESTED CANCELLATION.

StyleSeat is a ripoff! Seriously, there's a fee for everything. They even take fees out of your tips! I used this app for a year with the premium plan. For 35 bucks a month, I feel like they should've cut me some slack on the fees. I'll give StyleSeat one thing: the clients I've gotten and still have through another booking site. The worst part is that you can't talk to anyone directly, only through chat and email.

It's cool for finding stylists, but needs some serious work. I booked with a stylist one time. 2 weeks later I see a charge for an appointment I did not make! I was charged $360 for an 8 hour hair appointment. I guess the stylist is able to make an appointment, which will then automatically take money from my account, even without me acknowledging or approving it! This is beyond nuts. I think I'm gonna look into how this can possibly be legal!

This app was great for when I needed it. However I don't need it anymore and want to cancel (terminate) my membership. When I inquired about getting rid of their service, they sent me an email "stating how to build clientele ". Also, I don't understand how they are charging me when the country was shut down and I couldn't work.i guess I need to go to my bank and solve my issue by stopping payment.

In theory, this app sounds fantastic. I was so excited to find a platform to book a professional on with little to no hassle. However, after booking, my professional never got in touch with me. Despite messaging styleseat and the stylist I never received the information for the appointment (address phone # etc), but was charged for it. Along with a tip. Now styleseat is telling me I need to contact the absent stylist for a refund. I highly suggest using a different method to book appointments.

StyleSeat has been easy to use so far. The search results aren't always the most accurate though. I think professionals should be required to upload a picture of their certifications for the safety of their clients. I had a "stylist" mess up my eyelash extensions and rip my eyelashes out because she wasn't actually certified. There's also no way to get a refund without contacting the stylist. It'd be better for StyleSeat to act as the middle ground to protect both the stylists and clients.

This is a poor app. It's clunky and slow. It would have been nice if I got a text that my appointment was cancelled instead of an email. I updated my phone number in the app, but somehow my stylist was able to text me at the old number. The cancelled appointment doesn't show in my appointment history. I can't edit any notes that I put in for my stylist once I have booked the appointment. Buttons are not always responsive.

I would give them 5 stars, but they have showed me that they're not reliable. Unfortunately, I am paying monthly for this app, that's not the problem. The problem is that, I'm not getting my messages right away and clients are sending me messages and I'm not able to get them until days later,when I just so happen to go into the app..they cancel or don't book because this. And the customer service take days to respond.

I've been using them for a while. I was irritated when they introduced the $1 booking fee but now booking fees vary and it's nonrefundable! If you cancel within a reasonable time i.e as soon as you make the appt because you may have realized you made a mistake, I don't get my money back????!!! What is up with that?

Used it to find & make an appointment. Everything went okay except when trying to write a review for the salon, it won't allow me to upload photos. Both on the app and website using the link that was sent to me it is not loading. It's just keeps showing the loading bar/spin wheel but nothing happens. I just wanted to upload a photo with my review since the stylist did such a great job, but I can't. It looks like styleseat needs to fix this issue.

App would be more useful if it would work all the time. Everytime I try to book an appointment, it keeps on saying my stylist is booked for the whole month and no matter how many times you bring it to the next month, it will still say they're fully booked. Not useful when you have to do last minute rescheduling and you can't message your stylist so you're relying on the app.

Recently, the problems escalated. I stopped receiving appointment reminders, and the app claimed my phone number was invalid, even though all my account infor was correct. After tried so many way, finally I reached out to their live chat for support, I was met with unhelpful advice: they suggested I change my phone number instead of checking their system for issues. I've decided to stop using StyleSeat entirely, and I wouldn't recommend it to anyone.

Terrible! I've used style seat for many years and it used to be great. Then they kept trying to force the use of their credit card services and force everyone to book with us professionals online, and charge for it! Now, my clients are not receiving text reminders and are redirected to book with me online, which I do not do. I prefer to book my own. Style seat is trying to eliminate that option. I've contacted their customer service several times but they were unable to fix the issue. I'm done.

I like the app being in a new state it helps. However I wish they didn't charge your card until you can verify that the services has been provided. After booking a barber and seeing his ratings I tried to cancel only to find out the cancelation fees were just as high as him doing the job so I kept the appts. The barber did not show up or return calls and text messages but he got paid anyway and now I have to get him to give me a refund somehow.

I've been trying to contact customer service but they never respond !!! I've also been a StyleSeat barber for 9 years it used to be free and almost flawless . Now they charge $35 a month with so many bugs its RIDICULOUS it's not scheduling my appointments properly its blocking off days to where my clients think my schedule is full ! I wonder if Booksy has customer service maybe it's time to try out the competition !

Very Unprofessional! I am a stylist that uses for my business. In the settings there is an option so clients do not have to use a credit card to book an appt. Out of nowhere they've changed it making it not only mandatory but their charging all of MY clients a non refundable $1 to book. I was made aware of this via multiple clients! They didn't even have the civility to inform me of said change. This is a huge turn off. Currently shopping for new booking service then I'm gone!

I have really loved this booking app but due to the recent changes they've been making, it looks like I'll be switching booking sites in the new year. As an independent stylist who already pays $35/ month, having my clients pay more fees (like $10 to book an earlier appt) is going overboard. My clients were happy to pay ME the $10 but not the company. Just a forewarning, you'll be losing more stylists due to these charges.

It's ok-ish sometimes. I find that I'm constantly paying booking fees and then the stylist cancels the appointment. This occurs often. Very unreliable site, you have to really do your research as they allow non professionals to book thru this site. After having my appointment randomly canceled more than 4× (the day before or day of appointment) I will be deleting my account with them. It's more stressful than helpful.

I have used this app for years and it's freezing when I go to calendar. Now it's dropping ppl off my calendar. I have complained and complained and to no avail. Why am I paying $35 a month for a app that crashes time and time again and from the reviews I see it's not just me. Been happening for months. My bank acct doesn't crash when you deduct your monthly service fee. I feel I shouldn't be charged. Now I have to write appts on a calendar what do I need you for. RIDICULOUS.

I use this app when it was free and loved it. When they began to charge $35 I thought it was a little high more costly than other apps but decided to pay. Didn't like the higher monthly charge but when they started to charge my clients to book an appointment I had to cancel my subscription. I went to a different app that I love. Im very disappointed in StyleSeat and how they choose to treat their customer base. Charging my clients to book an appointment is unacceptable!!!

Can't See/Cancel Appts. For 6+ wks, the app has not shown my past/future appts. I've emailed many times & requested a list of all upcoming appts but keep getting an automated email that they're working on it. I cant delete my acct b/c it says I have upcoming appts, yet, the appts screen only says "no previous appts". I cant verify charges b/c I can't see the appts after booked. Last appt was $50 more than previous (for same services). No response using contact method in response to my review.

This app means well...I am uncomfortable with the fact that your card is automatically charged at the end of the appointment and that a tip is automatically added 24 hrs later. The stylist and I made other payment arrangements but my card was already charged at the end of the appointment time. I hadnt even been seen yet. I canceled the request to add a tip..and I was still automatically charged a tip.

I have been using this app for years and only had access to the basic plan. I must have attempted the pro at some point and canceled, yet they still were charging me. I reached out to them via email and yet not one response other than a general "we will get back with you within 24 hours". weeks passed and nothing. I had to reach out to my bank and was only able to have refunded a portion of what this platform stole from me.

I hate all the new changes; especially the appointment reminders to clients. It's annoying and I think charging clients to change appointments to a earlier day for $10 is outrageous! I have to pay a subscriber fee, so why are clients paying different fees? It's getting to outrageous. I'm trying my best to hang on an not go south. It is making me think of other options.

Styleseat has gotten worse. The problem now is Styleseat is forcing the Professional's clients to have a credit card to book appointments & charges $1 for each booking, while charging the Professionals $35 a month to use the app! Styleseat doesn't have a regard for the freedom of the Professionals. Some Pros don't require their clients to book with a card, creating an option for those who take cash payments and their clients. Freedom to pay by various methods should not be limited. Bad move!

After a very high $35 charge to the stylist Styleseat is now charging our clients $1 on the back end to book with us. Without letting the stylist know. When booking a premium appointment and they don't pay online styleseat deletes the appointment without notification. Attempting by any means to force us to use there payment system. When it was free no problem now they charging and it's all bad and getting worse. 10 + year client about to be out it's too much to choose from out here

As of this morning i can't even log on to check my client out or book their next appt! On top of already being charged membership fees, plus my clients having to pay to book what more do they want. It's ridiculous and the app is getting hard to use. I hope what I'm going through today is just a glitch. If not, I will be canceling membership

I have been using this app for 3 years. It started off free and only took a percentage per transaction now it charges a monthly fee & takes a percentage per transaction. They offer no phone customer support so you can't communicate with anyone in real time. They allow clients to book with declinable cards with no protection for you as a paying professional for their service. I highly suggest you consider other booking sites as this one is unsafe and it may cost you a lot of money.

App and website on my phone, iPad and laptop are awful. Been trying for weeks to find stylists. I select service, location automatically is Baltimore, MD. I don't live in that state. I change the location and search. Try to select the date and it freezes. I have tried Google Chrome, Samsung Internet, Internet Explorer, and Safari. I don't have time to search Instagram hashtags for stylists or wait until their book opens up once a month. I just need to book and show up at my appointment. 😞

app sucks! says It doesn't recognize my business email address and that I dont have an account, but I do and it's up and running on my desk top! ruining my business at this point. It used to just be automatically logged in and all of a sudden the other day I was logged out and no way to get back in. says my "free trial" was over. but I have been paying for this service for years now. I'm over it! needs to get fixed asap!

The 1.00 fee for clients to book appointments is really going too far. Update! They just went from bad to worse, unveiling a program that basically charges clients for "premium access" and "concierge" type service. I've been hearing that they are charging clients 10 to reschedule or for "premium" appointments. It's a matter of time before they poach clients from us subscribers who brought them the clients in the first place to some stylists who pay for the premium package! Think about it, folks.

They do not protect the clients. Twice now, I have booked appointments, and the stylist turns out to be a scammer. They wait for you not to show up by ignoring you and not giving a location or cancel so they can get money. Luckily, I use either PayPal or Cash App to avoid this by waiting until after the service to upload money, but there's no way of reporting these people.

I would love it but it's annoying when you're waiting for a verification code when booking on line and it never comes before the 15 minutes is up or often never at all .Also it glitches a lot and then it will tell me my email is unrecognizable when trying to log in and then lock me out because of too many attempts. It's not even because I'm putting in my email wrong. It's not rocket science to do simple things as a user but the app would be amazing if it would just function the way it is meant t

App said to book added service for 15% discount but of course it was just a trick. Full service amount was quoted after I added a service. Also distance shown is always inaccurate (0.2 mi turned into 48 mons once i confirmed with the stylist on istagram)..Stylists don't bother responding to inquiries from the app, and since it's not mandatory for them to have their IG account, address or phone number linked, its impossible tk judge where there really located.

Glitches syncing the clients with their newly set up accounts after I have pre-scheduled the client. Charges your client a fee after every personal appt...even though your stylist is paying them a monthly service fee. I would rather pay $10 more, so that my clients do not get any fees for booking appts on their own. I bought this service to take stress off of scheduling. There seems to be more stress loosing clients due to extra fees and costs. Please add option to remove required credit cards.

This is the perfect app for booking my hair appointments. It connects you to stylists wherever you are. The process for booking appointments, cancelling appointments, and paying for appointments is seamless. I have no complaints about this app. I just wish I had learned about it sooner. I will only use this from now on for booking my hair appointments. They also have make up artists, nail artists, and more to look for.

using the site is ok. I don't like how difficult it is to locate the address of the stylist and the fact that you have to pay a fee to book the appt that doesn't go towards your service. That fee even though it's not expensive should not be on the customers to pay. The customer did chose to use the app and has no other choice. it's a convenience for the stylist that the customer is paying for.

Signed up initially as a guest then when I had to cancel my appointment I was prompted to download the app, when I clicked the link from the confirmation text message. This was pointless because the link doesn't add the booking I already made. Now I can't figure out how to cancel the appointment in time and will be charged for the full price of the appointment.

This app charges you $1 everytime you book and even if you change a paid appointment it still charges $1... It takes payment even when you don't select this and I have to have stylist return my money. It's a pain. It tries hard to get your money. I'm going to stop making appointments through this app and make my stylist book. It's a rip off. Always charging. I'm going to put a card with a $5 balance. Hate style seat.

I was just reading all the other ratings and comments and i dont know why its still so highly rated. Since the change they made where they all of a sudden force your clients to enter their credit card info and pay 1$ to book, its killed my business, im a barber. At first it said (my name) requires 1$ booking fee , which doesnt go to me so theyre using my name to take money from people, shady!!! I dont use any other service other than the schedule, so telling me its for all the extras is bs!👎👎👎

Been using this for awhile now and it freezes 80-90% of the time since December. I'm am an Android user and I'm really close to changing to another, less expensive app that most of my co-workers use and have no issues with. After the year I've had, with my income already down, it's ridiculous to pay $35/month to be constantly frustrated 😠

Styleseat is a difficult app to use. It is pointless to install. Your favorites are listed on top of the page, and you have to swipe for hours to look for what you want. When you swipe, the app clicks on a page you did not intend to do. Hidden fees are all over this app. For the messaging feature, you are not able to review the business of the owner, and you have to put their name in the search bar. That option doesn't work, and it says there are no search results for the owner you've messaged.

It used to be good until they started charging to book an appointment. I still used it regardless, until it applied a $16 tip without my knowledge or approval. To add, my default tip has always been set to "0%", so how does this happen? Then I have to "contact the stylist" per the website, which burns the bridge with that person, asking them to refund a TIP. I'm done using this app, "service" or whatever they want to call it. I'll do walk-ins.

Although very easy to use, I'm unable to book an appointment. I keep getting the same error message: "Offer Not Available). I've checked with my stylist to let her know what's happening, even sent a screenshot, but she's not understanding the frustration. Why does this message keep popping up? Trying to access Customer service is a nightmare. Everything is automated, and there's no real person behind the chat box, so all you get is answers to questions you didn't even ask.

I'm having trouble reaching out to people who have contacted me! There number doesnt show up when I click on the icon like it use to. It makes me look bad as a braider when I dont reach out on time and its been 3 days and still nothing! I even uninstalled and reinstalled the app and now its glitching!!!

I've tried using this pos app. I get notifications that an eariler time has opened up. I click on the link and get error. I try to set up an appointment and the app asks for more information than I'm willing to go through then I get error. I really don't need to use an app that had more issues than a 4 year old dealing with a divorce.

This app has been around way too long to have the issues it has. It'a great for finding clients but if you move to a new state and are building clientele, even with your prior reviews being high, your search score is low because you aren't checking ppl out at a certain rate. This is ridiculous especially when they take out extra fees for "marketing". Guest had told me if they are on my profile to book other stylist pop up that's sleezy especially since I'm paying for the marketing.

Used to never have problems with this app.. now after contacting customer service several times about problems.. I see a lot of people are experiencing the same thing.. Asking for our customers credit card and a booking fee!!?? Are you kidding me!? obviously its not going towards a better experience!!The app flahes.. i can't check future appointments..It freezez.. and when I did an update.. my clock was off by hour!! For two days!! Had clients at the wrong times!!!! I'm looking for new App!!

SCAM! Whatever you do, do NOT give this app your credit card number. I believed the sales pitch on the site saying it's safe to use to pay fees. Now, I am out big money on a stylist who charged a deposit and NO SHOWED! Styleseat has been very unhelpful. I have exchanged emails with, what I believe to be a bot named Julie for 2 weeks and still have not been refunded my money. Buyer Beware!

The app is useful but the point of it is to see the stylist's work. I dont understand why you would make the app filter the style pics darker/shadier and not easy to see. Can you make the stylist's pics appear more clear or without a filter so that a person can see the pics??? That only makes sense, right??!?

Every day and time slot is "high demand" resulting in a 20% surcharge on top of an automatic 20% tip. Such a scam. Literally every date and time is "high demand." Don't be fooled. The stylist controls this. Don't book with them. And StyleSeat should have it where every day and time can't be high demand and somewhere to see what days and times are before trying to book.

Horrible App! I've been using Style Seat for YEARS. Even before they came out with an app. Now that they have, things have gone down hill. The app is glitchy. You can't make appointments. I have to log in on the site to even book or view stylist without the app crashing and closing on me. If it wasn't for my stylist, I would never use this app. However I will be sure to tell people to avoid it all cost if you can. It's not worth the hassle!

Update....I was jist charged for an appointment that the stylist canceled. Whatever you do: DO NOT USE THIS APP!!!!! This app is trash. I can't log in at all. I have sent a forgot password request like 10 times and received nothing!!! I got a text that I will automatically be charged a 20% tip for a service that I didn't receive bc the stylist canceled!!!

Used styleseat before it started charging and loved it so I decided to give the subscription a try. Cannot upload photos from my library so that's frustrating. Also, after reading the reviews and seeing the generic response to the $1 booking fee including all the issues w charging the cards, I fear this has turned into a way to scam stylists and clients out of their money. You operated just fine without our money before and not much has changed about the app besides more glitches and fees. Unsub

Schedules are not syncing across devices causing schedule conflicts. This has been an off and on problem for three years now, but getting worse all the time. All apps are up to date. it finally crashed on my other phone, so I uninstalled it then tried to reinstall and now it won't reinstall on that phone at all. Very fed up with this app.

As a Groomer, I absolutely love this app! I’ve tried quite a few other booking and scheduling apps out there, but I always end up coming back and sticking with Goldie. It is incredibly simple to use and keeps my business organized. While it lacks a couple of specific features I'd love to see, the development team is always actively updating and adding to it. Honestly, the price is so much better than any other app I've looked into that it is absolutely worth the tiny missing details.

WOW. I've paid for years. They tell me the service i pay for is no longer given techical support. a legacy subscription?? My premium doesn't exist? I've been using this app since it was appointfix and I've paid a lot of money. That being said I can't even publish a damn review? Seriously? You want more money? Wow. Might switch to square since I use them for transactions anyways. Wow a price increase too. Incredible. As if they weren't making enough money. Such is the way of corporate greed.

Was a really good app but changes over the last year make it really hard to use. Currently saying I have exceeded all my messages (It's the 1st of the month). How did I exceed my messages in one day???? I was suckered into purchasing a year subscription at a time. I wasn't allowed to go month to month (basically because they know you would stop using after the first month).

I love this app and so do all of my clients! As soon as I switched to this app I got all kinds of great feedback about having message reminders for my appointments. My no call/no shows have reduced SIGNIFICANTLY. Love this app. Only change I would make is to be able to put in events rather than just putting in clients. (Unless there's a way to do that and I just haven't figured it out.) lol Great app overall!

I loved this app before the new changes that came into affect today. Basically forcing you to pay a very over priced monthly subscription. I'm a small business starting out and I have to cut costs where I can and not for my clients. So now I'm punished by a limit on how many monthly appointments I can put in the app. Please consider lowering your monthly / yearly subscription.

This app has been great! I just recently started my own business, and it has just about everything I need in here! There are a few things Id like to see available (having things from my synced calendar automatically make me show as unavailable for bookings, form templates rather than having to create my own, SOAP notes, more control over the look of my booking website)... but what IS available has been great, and makes me come across to clients like I've got my s*#t together lol

This app was good for 2 years...just forced an upgrade from Premium which did everything you needed to Ultimate which does what the previous premium did for a $100 more...now it only gives you 500 messages for the month then you have to purchase more!!!! I have 18 days left and am more than halfway through my allotted messages so I'll end up having to spend more freaking money and now all of todays reminders FAILED!!! Noway to contact anyone to fix it! Of course! SUCKS!!!!

As a Speech-language pathologist doing home health, this app has helped me tremendously. I like being able to see my Google calendar appointments on my work schedule so that I don't double book myself. I like the color coding of appointments and the flexibility of the setup. I LOVE being able to send appointment reminders with 1 touch, or automatically if I want. It definitely keeps the no-show rate down.

I am loving this APP for my business. Just upgraded to the premium. I wish you would add the ability for it to connect and sync with my PC. Update. Very disappointed to see your raising your price by double for the premium and there are absolutely no significant changes to justify that. I will be changing to a different app. Still no PC abilities and would be great if there was a way to add profits and losses/expenses to reports. Then it would be worth the extra money.

As a driving instructor, I've been trying to find something convenient, and easy to use to schedule my students. I've done it by using a paper calendar, and I still do, just in case my phone needs replaced, but/and this app has made it a lot easier to send out the text messages, and reminders with ease.  If I get to where I will need to get the unlimited appointments, then I think I'll be more than willing to pay for that service, as long as the price doesn't jump up ridiculously like some companies do.

I used to absolutely love the app until google changed their rules but I'm not paying $20 for one extra feature that they used to have. i think they should let those that had the app before the change upgrade for the same price. The entire reason I got the app was so I wouldn't have to worry about doing it myself. Now i might as well go with the free version and text clients myself. 🙄

Updated. I've had this a few years now. I did like the automatic reminders instead of the tap to send. It does remind you to send them but if you are not near your phone it may get forgotten. I've gotten used to it and I think you can get them automatically sent if you upgrade. Other than that I love the app. It's easy and reasonably priced. Easy better than just using your Google calender. It stores all your client info and past appointments

Update: Recently had a phone die so I had to download the app and start from scratch. First thing I noticed was I lost access to a bunch of stuff and had to pay a subscription to get functionality back. Immediately deleted. Been using it for a few days now and I'm impressed. I'm a personal trainer running my own studio and martial arts gym and this works well. Wish they added a session tracker for each client. Currently using another app for that. It does what it says and it does it well!

I really like how easy the app is to use. it makes scheduling my clients a breeze. the only thing that changed that I'm not a complete fan of (and kept me from giving 5 stars) is the individual appt screen. it used to produce a list of appts. now they are bubbles that take too much space. I book patients out a year at a time so it makes it hard to send them a screenshot of their appts. I used to send one, now I send about 4.

So far so good. I rated it low because of the pricing structure. I would like to be able to use on both my tablet and phone (I schedule mainly on my tablet/computer then switch to my phone when on the go). The only option for more than one device starts at the $9.99/month plan ($99.99 a year if paid up front). My opinion is you should price by users, not devices. Overall very nice software, easy to use.

I have been using this app for over 5 years now and pay $40/month for the Pro Plus. I have this app on 2 separate devices and have been having major issues with the app on both devices but different issues on each device. I have reached out to customer support twice now only to receive an automated quick response saying someone will be in touch with me shortly... 4 days later I still haven't heard from anyone. Their customer support is lacking and I am currently in the hunt for a new app.

I've been using this for 6 year. Once in awhile this app has a fatal update or bug that renders the entire app useless for a day before support team fixes the problem. I'm currently unable to log into my account and I keep getting a prompt to update my app, but there is no update! I've been locked out all day, no solution yet and I have a salon to run.

I really wanted to love this app. Unfortunately, problems started cropping up early. First it often wouldn't find existing customers when entering new appointments. Then I couldn't use most of the reports because we don't use fixed prices for services. When Goldie cancelled my premium subscription (with no warning!) even though I paid for it, it was the last straw. We couldn't even reschedule existing appointments, rendering the app basically unusable. Bye, Goldie.

I love Goldie but customer service is very very slow and my account go deleted and the website stopped working. I've used Goldie for over a year now, and it's been wonderful. I wish they had a customer service number to call, it's been several days, they've restored the accidental deletion of my account but they have not restored the website or my staff profiles. I'd give them 5 stars if they were easier to work with. The app itself is fantastic

App is amazing and works well. Would like to see an option to add the address to a clients info when adding the client. Would also love if it worked on the laptop as well as our phone. With client's in 6 states, it is difficult to separate clients by states without a lot of extra leg work on our part to create spreadsheets for to build routes.

I'm a mobile dog groomer and the only employee. I can't stop grooming everytime I get a call or text or I wouldn't get much done. I use to spend an hour or so every night setting up appointments, but no longer.. With this app my clients book there own appointments. I can block off days and time so they can't book those times. Only issue is that they have to put there address in the message or I won't know where to go.

I've been using the free version for almost two years. It has been a game changer for my small business! It cut back on no-shows with the reminder option and helped me stay organized. It's unfortunate that I need to upgrade and pay for it now being such a small business running out of my house but I take way more than just 20 apts a month I do appreciate the discount with having to upgrade but will likely need to seek a different platform after my discount year is up.

In our small business, there are 6 of us doing the work for 5 services, w/40 clients. We experimented w/several platforms before deciding on Goldie. I like **a lot** about their system. The pricing seems fair, the scheduling took some getting used to but we learned it. I really like the way they compile data for me to review, that is helpful for predicting trends, etc. HOWEVER, Friday 11/01, I had a technical issue. It is still (11/05) unresolved, and worse, I cannot speak to anyone by phone.

The App loged me out and request me update it, but once I tranfered the Play store, there is not thing need to update. I can't get my clients information. Already reinstalled many many time, still the same. I tried to create a new account, the App can be used as normal. But once I login with my busines account, the same problem happened. Anyone has this situation? I need to fix this problem.

Great user friendly app so far but when the switch to Goldie happened my reports did not transfer so I had to manually add the past payments but now it shows all the payment on same day. When I first started, I had the premium at $4.99 then it jump to $9.99 of which it was ok. I was told with this new app that will not change. I also have a new windows laptop and I haven't been able to use this app on it. I would love to be able to add pics and more pet info

I love this App. Its by far the best appointment app on the market. It makes booking very easy, keeps track of my clients. Allows reminders. I can book months out. I really love the recurring feature for standing appts. I once lost my entire schedule and was flipping out cause i knew it was a busy day. I called customer service and they were so great fix me up in a jiffy, saved my life. I wont live without this app. I highly recommend it. Thanks so much and keep up the great work.

Appointfix app is the greatest, allows me to schedule all of my clients send reminders and put in notes for each one of them. appointfix is one of the greatest apps that makes life easier in this field. the small situations that I've ever had with a point fix customer service was always 101 great they'll contact you back within a timely manner, they keep you posted updated and will continue on until the situation is taking care of. I would recommend everybody to download it.

I just started using this app to organize my Pest Control business. It's been very helpful so far, although I think there are certain features that should be added to make it even better and fit businesses like mine better. I'd like to see an option to attach a billing address in addition to the service address, and a way to conveniently click on the service address to be opened by my GPS navigation app. Another nice feature would be the ability to attach pictures in the notes section. Please!

I don't like that I have to manually send reminders and I have to pay to do that. That's a downgrade from my last salon scheduler because it automatically sent reminders for $19 plus there are additional staff members. I tried contacting support numerous times. I chose to upgrade last night to try out premium for $4.99 a month and the Ultimate was for $9.99 a month for 12 months and now it's showing $29.99 in less than 6 hours. I want to try the Ultimate deal from last night.

I used to struggle with keeping track of everything, but now, it's a breeze. This app has completely transformed how I run my small business. Managing my schedule and clients has become incredibly easy, and I've eliminated those pesky time conflicts. I highly recommend it to anyone looking to simplify their work life.

Fridays night 6:25 pm & the app goes down & You have no idea what time you start work tomorrow. Kinda freaking out. Customer service has been great, was being changed twice, they got that fixed, then couldn't send auto messages for a min , they got that fixed. But there's a lot of bugs in this app Definitely a deal breaker, not knowing what time my 1st client comes tomorrow & it's after business hours for CUSTOMER SERVICE. So hopefully it goes back up QUICKLY

works great 11/21 Update 2/24 Still a good app, except they now charge you $240 a year to use the same feature I've been using for the past 3 years for $0. They do offer a discount the first year of having to pay. 7/24 still using the exact same features and having to pay for it. Hopfully, they come down on their price for a basic plan.

I have had several clients to call or text asking the time of their apppintment, I couldnt remember🤔my self. lol. started researching in the play store for a Apointment calendar solution and found one through "Appointfx" Set it up according to my scheduled appointments. Clients received reminder notices, their feed back, that the 24 hr and 1 hr reminder works for them. Ive only been using Appointfx for 1 week now, my clients and I love it, so farth no issues have been detected Thanks

This is a wonderful app that I'm very happy to have access to for completely free. The interface is easy and very quick for scheduling and updating notes. Yay! I only have two complaints. The main one is that I don't get a reminder notification for appointments and don't see a way to implement it. I need reminders too! I work from my home and forget things. The second is there's no way to see your total revenue for a month. Since we enter amounts it's a natural next step and would be so helpful!

The app is relatively easy to use. They could tweak a couple of things. Make it easier to simply move an appointment to another day slot or time by touching and dragging the appointment to another spot. Otherwise, it works great. Quick and easy and gives notifications when people book and is easy to respond to clients also.

My productivity has increased since using your app. I love that clients can make their own appts. I wish that there was a SUBTOTAL option and then a space for clients to enter a PROMO code and the app will be able to provide a new total with the sale or discount applied. For instance I take off 10 bucks if clients book themselves online. I wish the app would be able to provide the finalized amount due based on an internal promo like the one I had described.

I have tried many scheduling apps and this is my favorite free option! I do pay for the upgraded version but it was really nice being able to try it all out first for free. I love being able to color code everything. it makes it much easier to know what I are looking at in an instant. Thank you Appointfix and I hope that you continue to come out with additional features for the app

I really like this app... Keeps me and my clients appointments organized. I would give a 5 star if they would automatically send reminders like they used too. When the app got the update is when it went left... You now have to send the reminder yourself which can be inconvenient at times because you are not near your phone.... Or you yourself forget to send reminders to your clients about their appointment. If u guys change it back will LOVE IT AND GIVE 5 STARS!!

I thought this app was great, until I had to reset my phone. I had the free version because it's just me. It would not "transfer " to my reset phone. So I went ahead and purchased the 4.99 a month option and when I got it on my phone none of my contacts were there none of my schedules were there it was all gone. I tried to contact the one guy in technical support multiple times and received no response. Back to square one! Update: Ridiculous reply from the developer!

This app was great until they forced you to pay. You can only schedule 20 appointments with the new trial. It wasn't like that last year (2023). You only had to pay if you wanted to accept payments from clients and access a few other features. I'll likely be finding another app service

This app is awesome! I use it for work and I can keep track if my clients. Would be nice to have things to lable clients personalities like maybe different faces such as happy, grumpy, needy, quiet, talkative etc.. That would be fun and might even be cool for the maker of this app to charge small fees for extra features.. I would gladly support something like this. This app is also perfect just the way it is. I am grateful, Thank you so much!

App works great sometimes. There have been several times that messages were not sent to clients, sometimes 2 or 3 days at a time. Recently my clients have gotten a message asking if they wanted to "opt out" of receiving reminder messages. The whole purpose of paying for this app was so I can remind clients of their appointments. How am I going to be made aware of clients who opt out? I don't think asking my clients if they want to "opt out" should be offered if it is a service I pay for.

Everything was great until it changed to Goldie. It's hard to read my calendar due to the color scheme (even though I tried the light and dark theme). It also doesn't have the current day highlighted, which at first makes it confusing. Please go back to the way it was. I will be finding a different app for booking.

I have been using Goldie for over now. I have previously used Vagaro and GlossGenius, and I love how simple Goldie is to use. It is easy to set the notification schedule for clients, to book appointments, and their customer service is superb. I highly recommend.
dont know if anything changed but i tried to import my clients list and now the app keeps crashing. cant make appointments and cant see any of my clients
do not download this app. someone can hack into and steal your account and support won't care enough to even respond to your email.

This used to be amazing. but now, trying to use the in app chat function, it doesn't even work 90% of the time. have to keep relogging, or refreshing the app to be able to send a 5 word chat to someone, because it won't even send at all if it's longer than that.

My detailing business uses Goldie for booking appointments, collecting deposits & payments and creating our website. Our customers are impressed with the ease of use of our site to book appointments. All of the systems are very user friendly and easily adjustable for appointments that require a little more (or less). I have had to contact customer service 2 times.(once for payment limit increase and again for deposit frequency to our bank acct) Both times have been resolved in a timely manner

Although this app has a great interface and user friendly features, the payment component is important to me. I dislike being limited to using Stripe as the main payment processor, and it requires too much personal information just to setup the payment option. Personally, I'd hate to disclose my bank information, SIN and address if I wont be using this feature for collecting payments. I really hope this can be changed, re-evaluated and enhanced in the future.

Good app! My clients say it helps them stay up on their apps. So it's saving me $$$ After working with it for almost a year now, (7mo.) I love it! Awesome app. clients are more on time and they say they look forward to getting their notice from me for their next haircuts!
pretty good app, but a bit complicated in few areas, a lot of things are not free and that is a bit annoying

I used to use a paper diary, but as our business grew, I knew life would be easier with a booking/appointment app. I tried Appointfix a couple of years ago and have never looked back! It is clear and concise and has lots of handy features, such as being able to automatically send appointment reminder texts to customers. If I have one gripe, I'd like the numbers of the time down the left hand side to be larger, and to be able to zoom in on everything.

I absolutely loved this app. But also absolutely gutted. I have a small business and have propley been using it for about 4-5years without a problem. But very sad to have to let it go soon. Due to the price. I paid for the first month. But can't continue paying that much for the app. It's a big jump from being free. To the price it is. :((((

Disappointed I'm a small business & only use the scheduling & reminder features, so was happy with the free version & have been using it for a couple of years. Now I'm restricted to 20 appointments a month, with the bookings I already have in place for the year I have reached my monthly quota most months. Now I can't book in any new clients. The subscription is to costly for my business with what features I use. Would be great to have a one off fee to make it easier on small businesses to use.

Does not say if the free version expires at any point. A little disappointed about the price point of ultimate subscription. We are 6 people that want to use this at our work place and 500 messages is way too little. Makes it pretty expensive. But overall, love the application and details. Very easy to use and personalize.

Love this app. Unfortunately I will have to revert back to google calendar, because from 1 Feb I can only make 20 bookings a month on the free version. I've looked at the rates, but in the country I live, the USD is quite expensive against our currency. It becomes unaffordable. I'll miss this app & the way it made my life & business easier.

Great app. I've been searching for a simple scheduling app that also has the ability to send reminders. I love that the text reminders send from a randomly assigned number instead of my personal number (with the paid subscription). I love the ability to colour code different services, and customize the services and everything. Also the only app I've ever found that actually listed "tattoo artist" as a job option so that made me smile, haha.

Best app for work! Love the automated messages I can set up. It may warn that a message is long, but it all sends absolutely fine. I've upgraded to the $14.99 a month & find that it's well worth the money. I've already (i've had it just over a week), had 2 customers rebook due to the text that goes out the day after. You can choose to send or delete each message, as they pop up, & you must actively send them. This is useful as u can opt to not send the texts to clients who dont need them.

As a small business owner this app is really useful. The calendar integration and analysis tools are really helpful. I do like the idea of the online booking. However, you can only book individual appointments, my clients generally have daily appointments (dog walker), so to do this for an entire month would be too arduous for them. A bulk booking request for them would be extremely helpful. Also the ability to choose which services to allow them to see and choose from would be better.

READ THE NEWEST REVIEWS BEFORE YOU BUY Have been using the free version for 3 years, just got an email stating that they are removing the option to book over 20 appointments a month, and recurring appointments. Unless I pay 300+$ Lovely. The calendar on desktop does not sync to my mobile app. Appointments have a 2 hour difference. This app was great when it was Appointfix. It's just gone downhill since Goldie. Beginning the search for something else.

I love your app.Even that you had to change your automatic reminders to a tap option, I like that you remind me to send the text. It suits my small business. I would give it a 5 star otherwise. Also was wondering if you could ad total appointments for the month and the total $$made for the month. Like a chart to see what month was better etc. not sure if your premium version got it. thanks

So helpful to have an online appointment system that stays free and doesn't make you pay for the basic version after a few weeks. Generally really user friendly, sends reminders and messages. I would have forgotten so many of my appointments without it. Only thing that doesn't seem to work is when I try to sync the Appointfix calendar to my Google calendar it just shows a reload button and never actually syncs.

I love the appointfix app! It's been really beneficial for my small business, and now the free package they have increased the amount of appointments you can book from 45 to 100! It's good to be involved with a small business who understands how hard it is to get your feet of the ground, only suggestion I'd like to make is a section added for client notes and to keep a.file of them... if you had this your app would be perfect

The app itself is OK, but I purchased the upgrade and it didn't work. Then it kept popping up with an I need to upgrade button... clicked it and was charged again! And not even at the discount rate the 2nd time. I've requested a refund through Google. Might have to look elsewhere for another booking system if this is how it operates.

Hi, There is no app that can totally replace my work diary yet - This is the closest. With a few simple changes I think you'd have a niche. Seperate prices for each service on each job. Eg If I set up a service as 'Materials' I could track how much profit I'm making on each job easily. You could even automatically track this for your users. Eg Total Income 1000 - Materials 200 - Total profit 800. I'd also like to be able to add pictures to each job. Maybe for receipts for materials at a glance.
So far, i have really enjoyed the ease of the app for me and my customers as well. it really makes my days easier and way more manageable and organized. thanks
Its great to be able to use for my work AND personal appointments. I have the App on my husband's phone so he can see what my work hours are instead of always asking 😉
I can't even sign up properly, even their phone verification failed and won't send me a code. nobody in support answers. as a professional this is a waste of time for me
Great app and lots of useful features. please add the option for sending invoices and contracts to the customer
Won't let me use it without pro. But automated messages send the wrong date and time. So frustrating.

Ive been using this app for almost 4 years now for free it was such an amazing app until this morning !!! i got an email stating that i will be needing to upgrade to pro for R600 a month lost all my appointment details in the process because it did not let me sign unless i paid the full amount Or you can keep on with the free plan but only get 20 appointments each month !!

Appointfix was an amazing app to use, cheap and easy. Now it's update after update and im constantly spammed to spend more money each month for services I don't need. I get notifications over and over to spend more money or invite friends. Go away please, it's getting ridiculous. Time to look for another option!

I couldn't use the app as it requested to be updated however I couldn't update it as it said I had the latest version. I emailed appointfix and had a very quick response from them. Very happy to help and very nice, great communication. I don't know what happened but after hours of trying to log in to the app it finally allowed me to log in. Thank you for the quick response!

Best appointment app hands down! I was running this app along with two similar ones for a few weeks for comparison: Appointfix is not only the least expensive one but also the one with best and most useful features. the customer service is amazing: their answer was extremely prompt and professional and they went out of their way to help me. Great team! I can't recommend them enough!

I love this app and have been using it for some time now, I use the free version as I'm a sole trader with a part time business so the paid version would not be viable for me. I would've given 5 stars but a little while ago the app stopped sending reminder texts automatically and now reminds me to send them manually which can be a pain if I'm busy for hours and end up sending it late or forget completely.

Tried around 10 different apps to find something to help me manage my business appointments before coming to realise the basic (non paid) version of this app is the most comprehensive basic version of any of them. As a new start business I need to keep my costs as low as possible and this has enough free features to run my schedule. When I'm well established and have more disposable income I will upgrade and pay them back for helping me manage my appointments.

Problems after updates Has been working fine then after updates I now find the online booking is allowing people to book in slots that are already booked and I've had some bookings that have randomly ended up in completely wrong days and times. Something definitely amiss as when I've checked the clients booked into the slots that the ones should have been in the original ones had booked in days before so those slots could have not have been empty. What on earth is going on?

Why didnt i discover this app earlier?? Being an independant groomer with non of the resources of a big corporate I was muggling through trying to keep on top of the paper diary and manual texts - this app makes things so much easier and is affordable for a small salon such as ours. We love it and the customers love the confirmations/reminders and follow ups. Its great to be able to check the electronic diary on the go and respond to enquiries - Bravo for this fab solution at a fair price!

We started to use this app as we're a small non profit club and the free version with the lower standard cost version was pretty much just in our price limit. We get lots of people wanting to book a gaming table, but as a non profit we do not have excessive funds. The new Goldie update with £25 a month and free version limited to 20 booking just pushed this app well outside anything we could even consider affording. Shame, at least Google Playstore is offering cheaper alternatives

I have been using this app for over 5 years, I had been looking for an app where I can book appointments and keep track of my personal events in 1 place as well as the money I made that month or week, and sends out reminders to clients, I have found it to be so helpful and easy to use, I love it is a good way to keep track of your customers, money, appointments, sale & you can get your own online booking service for them to book their own apartments if you are to busy.

This was one of my favorite apps. Easy to use and very simple. However just today I received an email saying that they are now charging for this and is no longer free. You are limited to 20 appointments and they are charging £27 a month!! What a scam. I have found an alternative app which does the same thing and is FREE

Very handy app, however be very careful what you write in your appointment notes as this some how gets sent to your customers email. All my calendars to sync are turned off and all other message notifications toggled off, but still sending to customers. I have told the Appointfix team and only reply was, they dont know why and it shouldn't be doing that.

Very user friendly, clean and quick interface, modern and sleek with everything most stylists need. Could use more detailed KPI reports. AI customer support is very advanced, and humans actually get involved quickly if necessary. Their chat support is fantastic. Overall I am VERY happy with Goldie!

So far it's fantastic!! 4/10/26 UPDATE Still fantastic! Any questions or concerns very quickly addressed and fixed. App is exactly what I need, and not complicated. They keep adding great features to stay up to date. Love it!

I HATE the new app and downgrades. If I send the link to pay the price is not always right. All of my info is gone for my financial reports. It's not as easy to add the info from each service. You have to mark each service as paid and it still doesn't add up correctly. I liked it fine when it was appointfix. Update My main issue was with the financial reports. I was informed that the totals are still there without confirming each service, but it was located in a different place..

The appointment schedule is great, a lot of nice features. But I just sent reminders out to all my clients and they are contacting me telling me to stop - they've gotten 7 texts from me so far for the one appointment. I only ok'd one text. The app isn't supposed to send a text without my intervention. I don't even have record of the text going out, it only shows the one in my text dialogue.

I've been using this app for nearly 2 years and it changed my business and relieved my stress. Having a beauty salon means being in treatments for most of the day (which is what I want to do) and very little time to respond on booking requests (which I always found exhausting). Appointfix give my business a professional look and clients love booking online without having to wait for my response. I also find clients book a few appointments in advance making it good for business planning.

Originally (6months ago) the app was great! However recently I am finding its exiting me from my subscription every time it's due for renewal. I reinstalled and started my plan not even 3 months ago, only to have it wipe my clients information/schedule every month when payment is due! I've never missed one and it's extremely frustrating putting clients information in over and over again. Definitely considering unsubscribing!

Update: I HATE the new messaging system, how it doesnt show them in my phone messages or anywhere that i can actually view, and how it doesnt come from my phone number!!
