I also hate that I had to upgrade and spend double the $ per month to use more than one message template!! It also states it doesnt send with "sent via Goldie" that is a lie, it does say that! Liars! So far I am very displeased with this stupid new update!! I miss Appointfix 😢 Signed, dissatisfied customer!

This app was the perfect basic use basic appointment app until it was bought out. Goldie is constantly needing updates and then changes your preferences and pushes out notifications without warning to your clients. They now want to charge what started out as free and have made it difficult to just keep a basic free app basic and free. They should have made their own app instead of ruining something perfect. How do I get the old app back?

Have been using this app since the early days and when it was Appointfix. It's hands down the best salon app there is and for such reasonable costs. Being able to take payments by now tapping my phone is super exciting and blows my mind. It has made life so simple for me as a sole trader salon, so for larger salons it would be amazing. Give it a go, you'll LOVE using it 😄

Love this app and i love the online booking system! Makes it so easy for clients to just select their own times without me having to go back and forth with them. I would give 5 stars if there was online deposit payment options when they book. That would make this app perfect!

Editing after recent update: changing my 5 rating to 2. On the free version they have put a cap after 20 bookings that basically hampers your practice and prevent new clients from reaching you if you'v already had 20 bookings that month. I mean on free version, its basically an app that prevents the very purpose which its designed for!! & the paid versions are way too expensive,even with their discounts!Found other apps that're offering better features in half the price. Saying goodbye Goldie

It's just what I need to get and stay organized. Really easy to use and keeps the customer informed. Update 2021 I've now been using the app for 4 years and I cannot fault it. I'm a driving instructor and it's such a helpful tool to reduce no-shows for previously scheduled times. Great customer service back up and the team are constantly working on improving the app. Keep up the good work.

Been using this app for nearly 3 years, started at £4.99 a month, went up to £9.99 a month...fine with that. Just tried to book a client in, Sat's I've reached my 20 appointment limit, have to upgrade costing £24.99 a month, just to book clients in. Piss take.

Great app!! This app has been a god send ......I how have no more "no-shows"! Its a shame the automated reminder has been removed off the package I've got 🤔 I just sit each morning sending a reminder manually for the next days clients , it takes less than a few minutes.........would definitely recommend this app!! 5 stars!!

updated review 3 23 19: its been sycingfor the last 4 hours ans I can't gain access to see my calendar or book appointments. I uninstalled and reinstalled, no changes. PLEASE fix previous review: I love the app I have been using it for over a year and I always recommend it to other stylist. I don't like that the yearly price is so expensive as other apps aren't as expensive yearly. Outside of that I love the interface. Awesome job.

Best thing I have found to use for booking my hair appointments that does exactly what I need it to and is user friendly. **UPDATE** 7-6-19- Still the best app I have found for my business. I do hair and this app is still the easiest to use. The support team is also the best. Anytime I have had an issue or question then get right back to me. Very Professional.

The features of app was great, able to schedule clients and colour code log was easily accessible. Unfortunately had to uninstall app ,as had a lady ring and said she was getting appointment reminders all the time from my phone number even though I hadn't listed her number. So was worried this could be happening to other people.

There's a bug that shows a booking total, but will secretly add a hidden tip to the total during payment. Customer Service *acknowledged the bug* and told me to try to get the refund from my barber when it wasn't their fault. The default tip should be shown and changeable. This isn't too confused with the optional tip screen. Completely different. That gets set to zero and I've gotten secretly charged $10 extra 3 times in a row.

The app is good if your barber or stylist doesn't require a deposit for the appointment. When that happens, the app just feels like a scam. it's constantly trying to control how much you tip and can even double charge you for the tip (on the deposit and after the service is completed). It's very confusing when it comes to payments. Honestly I prefer to just book with the app and pay cash in person. That way I don't get over charged

the app interface is just okay. My barber messaged me and I only noticed through an app notification popup. Once I click it, the app simply takes me to my appointment page with no place to respond or view the full message. this is a huge error and could cost people money if a business chooses to rely mainly on Booksy and doesn't have other accessible communication channels. extremely frustrating. i have no way to see the message that was sent to me nor respond.

I hate the way this pushes you to download yet another app. I don't want an app. I want a haircut. they just want your precious precious data. they make it incredibly hard to NOT use the app, but it's an option. usually you can open in Web browser and view as a "Desktop Site" and to book without the app. but Booksy still pushes the app. instead I have to book from my laptop. annoying. annoying. annoying. do I find a new barber, or do I continue to jump through the loops to book with them?

I used the Booksy app while out of town and booked a barber appointment that was confirmed the night before. When I arrived, the person at the address said the barber was unavailable and acted as if the business was not legitimate. I received no prior cancellation notice and later could not leave a review because the provider canceled. This was inconvenient while traveling and made the platform feel unreliable and poorly verified.

My first experience using this app to book was a disaster!!! The barber didn't show up after confirming the appointment. I wasted time and fuel only to be told that barber does not open on Sundays. Booksy won't let me leave reviews because it's a no show! That's the most ridiculous thing! Google still the best out there for finding reliable vendors!!

Terrible customer service. I was ripped off by a business on the app. I've so far spent several hours trying to get my money back. Booksy customer support has contacted me twice saying they will investigate, I sent them the info both times, and each time their conclusion is "not our problem, contact your bank." BEWARE OF THIS APP! AVOID IT! THEY DON'T CARE ABOUT USERS!

Less than 1 star! I favorited one barber 3 years ago and now i can't stop getting text alerts for appointments. I have changed my notification settings and even blocked the phone number. They keep coming with different phone numbers. I tried to remove my phone number on the app but nope. I also unfavorited the barber. Still getting alerts. I haven't used this in 2 years. I'm tired of it!

I will never do business with anyone that uses this app again. It has always felt jankey. I went to make an appointment and it asked if I wanted to leave a 25% tip. I adjusted my tip and hit the checkout button. Somehow the tip was still added. There's no edit tip feature available. So I tried to cancel and rebook but the money was already being withheld from my account. I tired to call the stylist to rectify the issues but no response. Booksy practically have no customer service options.

I'm irritated as hell. A barber I used to go to over 7 yrs ago put my phone number on this app and I CANNOT REMOVE IT!! I get text notices from different phone numbers so every time I block it, another one from a different number. I keep downloading the app to see if they've made changes to this aspect, and NOPE! It's irritating and upsetting and I wish they would make the process easier. I should have the option of removing my info from an app I never heard of before.

Transparency is always key in business. I find it odd that Booksy's appointment notifications are spot-on in terms of emails to confirm bookings, appointment reminders and requests for service experience reviews. I have even received a healthy dose of informational and promotional content. However, what Booksy does not send is confirmation of an appointment cancelation. I would even settle for an in-app timestamp in conjunction with the red emboldened CANCELED. But no, absolutely nothing.

I scheduled an appointment for 3/6/26. I went and paid $600 cash. she rescheduled my appointment for Sunday, and of course I didn't go because I went Friday. Booksy tried to charge me for a no show. I emailed customer service and they basically said there was nothing that they could do and that it was up to the business to handle it. I will never use this site again. Oh and transaction disputed.

Customer service so far has been found to be lacking. First, I was precharged for an appointment that the app failed to schedule and have since been unable to schedule appointments because the app won't accept any of my cards. Second, I've called customer service twice and emailed them once so far to no avail despite having received verbal assurances that the issue would be resolved. They never bothered to respond to my email.

I was having great experience until few days ago. I have same barber I use for a while now and usually if he isn't available, the date is blocked out. Friday the 20th, it was open to book, so I did. When I got to the shop, they said he hadn't been there all day apparently. So I cancel because obviously it was all misleading information for me and I showed up with no one there for appointment. I get charged $45 from my account. I don't think that is right at all.. I shouldn't be penalized at all

The app has no way to turn off their marketing advertisement notifications that doesn't also turn off all other notifications, including basic emailed updates to appointment times. Thinking I may have misunderstood the interface, I looked for a "help" button in the app, and found a menu option labeled "Feedback & Support." Clicking it yielded two menu options: "like us on Facebook" and "rate us on Google Play." It really reinforced the impression of being one more sleazy data harvesting company.

Way too many unwanted notifications. App works for the reason I had to install it, but then starts spamming other services. Very annoying. No need for further details, I described the issue perfectly. I downloaded the app because I had to in order to make an appointment to use a local service. Then received a bunch of spam for other products and services that I did not sign up for.

I was really disappointed that the customer is not able to delete their accounts. FAQ states that you must contact customer service and have them delete your account for you which is very odd. Even though I blocked the messages booksy sent me with appointment offers from my barber they continued to send me messages from different numbers. I would not recommend any services offered by booksy based on my experience.

Two stars are all I can give, because I like my barber and I like the ease of access. Today, my first chance to get a haircut in months, right before I have to go attend a funeral, I woke up to an appointment cancellation because the app double-booked all my barber's appointments. My understanding was that this is exactly what the app was created to prevent. It failed me horribly.

I find it really stupid that I have saved my barber 3 other times now, and for some reason I never see him on my favorites section in the app to make an appointment. Other people that I know have the same problem and it's really irritating. If you make it an option to favorite someone for their services, then allow the customer to view those who they favorited in the FAVORITE category. It's that simple.

I left bad review while back and got a response.... Let me tell u. I'm glad I did..... I went back and paid for another month buckled down and made sure I knew how to use the app. I made sure that I did everything it told me to do to continue to move up the food chain and there's definitely some hidden things that I think they make hard to find like their boost which is finding you business for a percentage of the cut. This app is a game changer. Highly recommend it....

I'm just trying to get a hair cut. There's a new barber shop that just opened near me I wanted to try. Their website requires me to use this app to book an appointment. The app won't let me create an account, which is required to book an appointment for some reason. So this app is literally costing a barbershop it's business right now because I literally cannot book an appointment with them this way, so I'll just go the other barbershop that actually lets me book an appointment.

The app is easy enough to use, but I ran into trouble when trying to book two services with the same stylist, cut and color. Booksy only allowed me to select one at a time, and when I tried to select the second service it cancelled the first. Selecting two services is pretty fundamental it should be baked into the app. Maybe there's a setting I'm not finding.

No one seems to talk about the loophole on how there's a cancelation fees with barbers. Personally I'm time oriented but give barbers all the time they need. It's an annoyance when they take advantage of your time though. Every appointment I've had, I had to wait another 20 min to hour and I can not just leave because I'll be charged 25 dollars for the cancelation fee. A service to be about the customer is turning to one where we serve the barber. Still a good app to avoid a trip to their shop.

I downloaded this app to schedule an appt with my hairdresser. I go through all the set up of the app and it gets to the end where it's supposed to send a text confirmation to confirm registration and it never arrives. I clicked resend a dozen times, nothing. I uninstalled and reinstalled the app twice, nothing. I tried registering by using Facebook, nothing. I don't understand why I'm not able to continue. The phone number is correct

Browser & app does the same. No matter what category I select, hair & nails populate. Clicked on pet services, hair & nail salons populate and just 5 results. Very frustrating. Browser is worse, anytime I try to browse different services it asks for location when it's already on and wouldn't let me create a profile. Did so in the app, booked my service now uninstalling. Able to find hair & beauty services great prices but if looking for anything else dont use this.

Great for finding certain services. However, some people who use the service won't acknowledge your appointment through the app. Set up an appointment at a barbershop and waited for them to confirm the appointment up until 3 hours before the set time. They did not confirm it, and when I wanted to cancel the appointment that never got confirmed, they charged me $25 for canceling. Felt like I got scammed.

Apparently hackers can use this app, get into your account, then use your credit card that's saved on your account to fraudulently charge almost $800 worth of services. Apparently there's absolutely no security measures of confirming whether the account is yours before allowing access. Never downloaded this app yet somehow someone made a mobile purchase with my account. Booksy will NOT help even if the business is fake and the number associated with the business is wrong. App is NOT secure!!!

This app used to be great, but I would say around 70% of time when I try to book again with my barber I now see a pop up on the app which says "booking issue, we've encountered an issue with you booking. Please start again or create a new booking". This is incredibly frustrating. When I try again or even update the the app I still get the issue most of the time. Please fix this!

I wouldnt recommend this app. There's not a way to filter for whos licensed to do hair or not and it seems most of the people on the app are not. Ive had issues with people not checking the app so you cant actually get booked. Also have had issues with stylists drastically changing price upon arrival and not being able to do the skill as described. The app also doesnt have a feature to communicate or send pictures so you have to hope that AFTER booking the stylist will reach out.

I use this to book with my eyebrow girl. have been going over a year but for the last few appts it keeps adding the tip back on when I pay 50% upfront. I will remove it, it will show the amount I'm paying to approve e.g. £13 but the payment goes through as £14.30

absolutely horrible ux, you can't find nothing that you are looking for and the payment (especially the apple pay) is just horrible experience, given the fact that's actually ios ux problem not apps but the lack of other options when you are on Ios is frustrating.

I've only been here twice, but both experiences were great. As a huge sports fan, I love the atmosphere—sports playing on the TVs, a clean shop, and a great vibe all around. My barber took his time, paid attention to the details, and delivered a sharp, professional cut both times. The shop is clean, welcoming, and makes you feel comfortable from the moment you walk in. If you're looking for a quality haircut in a relaxed sports-themed environment, I definitely recommend checking them out.

User-friendly app but every time I remove the tip at the beginning (why would I tip before I've received the service....?) it just puts it back on during payment. When I click confirm, there's no tip, but once it is actually confirmed the tip is on there. Not ideal because I'm paying more than what I've agreed to??

5 Stars! My daughter got a combo service — nails and toes — and everything was outstanding. The appointment was fast, the work was beautiful, and the customer service was truly amazing. They were so professional and incredibly flexible with scheduling, which made the whole experience stress‑free. Her nails and toes came out flawless. Highly recommend!

This app experience in Nashville is horrible. Half the businesses are either permanently closed are cancelling appt. I booked 4 different services for a weekend and all cancelled. Then the one that did accept the app itself scammed me out of $40 by pre-applying a tip to an already $200 service. I will be getting a refund but from the stylist but booksy, bc why have a tip set. let the customer decide

app was easy enough to use unless I wanted to book something. I have been trying for almost half an hour now and CANNOT PROGRESS PAST MY PHONE NUMBER!!! No Verification Codes have come through, at all, and I keep getting a RED BANNER THAT SAYS "Request Malformed - Hcaptcha". No way to contact support so just had to message the business im trying to book with if I can book manually through DM as is looks like I can't book through Booksy.

Giving a 1 Star now because Booksy for Customers did an update where it allows the business owner to add any kind of tip for themselves without the customers approval first. It use to be an option on the customers side where the customer has to confirm the payment first. I went to a barber and he added a $20 tip for himself after the agreed upon final price was already $65 without my approval, making it $85, but Booksy allows them to do this now. 😡

okay, but has issues. I booked a haircut appointment, an email was automatically sent, clicked the add to calendar and all was good, except on the Barber's end it was scheduled an hour sooner. And now I'm out the not show fee and have long hair. not happy about that

Absolutely outstanding experience at Vanilla. I came in feeling really low and self-conscious about my hair due to greying and colour issues, and the girls were honestly amazing from start to finish. They really listened to all my concerns, gave me different options and advice, and explained every process so clearly which instantly made me feel at ease. They fitted and blended my extensions perfectly to match my colour — you genuinely cannot tell at all — and the styling was incredible.

I've had several charges made to my card that I did not approve! I've disputed them, and my bank returns funds but the process to close my Booksy account isn't instant and I've had more charges while waiting for it to be closed. I've never even made a purchase through Booksy, I always pay my barber and cash!

misleading and just deceptive. for some reason it constantly shows "promotions" for 20% that don't exist. no code, no lowered final cost, nothing. sure fine whatever. well, I just made a new appointment and it defaulted to a tip of 30%. first off, coercing a tip BEFORE SERVICES are done is insane. I switched it to a 20% tip, and saw my total was what I expected. I hit pay and it charges me for the 30% tip. this sounds like a upcoming class action lawsuit but sure, booksy. not shady at all!

I only used this app because a barber I found uses it. After this experience, I will not use a barber that uses this app again. The app pressures customers with cancellation fees, so I carefully picked a time I knew I could make. I showed up on time, and the barber said he didn’t even know I booked. Then I waited over 30 minutes while he attended another customer, making it seem like the app failed or allowed double booking.

I can't say enough great things about Garcy the Barber! He truly changed my life through his incredible talent and genuine care. From the moment I sat in his chair, I could tell that barbering isn't just a job for him. It's his passion, and it shows in every cut. Garcy took the time to understand exactly what I wanted and completely transformed my hair. He gave me my confidence back and made me feel like myself again. His professionalism, kindness, and attention to detail are second to none.

I got my hair twisted by Hollywood Star Loc, and the service was A1 from start to finish. They were professional, welcoming, and paid great attention to detail. My twists came out clean, neat, and exactly how I wanted them. I highly recommend Hollywood Star Loc if you're looking for quality work and excellent customer service. I'll definitely be back! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Emily is an absolutely amazing nail technician! From the moment I sat down, she made me feel comfortable and welcomed. She pays incredible attention to detail, takes her time to make sure everything is perfect, and consistently delivers beautiful results. My nails always look flawless and last so well. On top of her talent, Emily is kind, professional, and genuinely cares about her clients. I always leave my appointments feeling happy and confident.

Excellent haircut and great service! The barber was professional, friendly, and paid attention to every detail. The cut was exactly what I asked for, and the whole experience was relaxed and enjoyable. Highly recommend and will definitely be coming back!

Great place to get a proper men's haircut! I have been to many, many places all over Sarasota and Bradenton and this is now my go to even thought it is a good 20 to 30 minute drive. I have had my haircut by both Andy and Moises, can't go wrong with either! Both very attentive!

awesome vibes, good music and killer haircuts. I had my hair cut by Holden today and I walked out getting the exact haircut I wanted, feeling relaxed and looking good! He made sure to communicate with me throughout my haircut, ensuring I was getting look I wanted. Good dudes, just doing what they love and it shows with the care they put into their cuts and how they treat the clients.

Doc gave me an excellent haircut. He is professional, skilled, and pays great attention to detail. He took the time to understand exactly what I wanted, and the result was even better than I expected. The haircut came out clean, sharp, and perfect. I highly recommend Doc to anyone looking for a great barber!

A simple boys’ haircut request could not even be done properly. Carli did not listen to anything I asked for. My son’s hair has honestly never looked this bad. It would have looked better if I had just shaved it all off with a clipper myself. His fringe was cut to about 0.5 cm while the back of his hair was left much longer, with obvious scissor lines all over his head. The cut looked uneven and completely unprofessional. I had to take him to a barber to fix the mess. Does not deserve 1 star.

Keeps pestering you to rate services whose effects only become visible months after, does not allow you to edit reviews older than 1 month (treatment did not work as promised so I wanted to edit), no dark mode, service search works in a weird manner loading another window as you're typing in location.

I booked an appointment & needed to cancel it. The app was straightforward yet didn't cancel with owner. He was pretty upset about it. I don't cancel appointments often but when I do it is nice to know that they get canceled in whatever system is being used.

It's frustrating when you're having an issue, and there is no number to call to fix the problem. i schedule an appointment and is not coming up under my email The system automatically used my phone number. But now I cannot log in with a phone number.

I loved my 60 minute Swedish massage. Nice and quiet room with light background nature sounds. Started off really light and when I asked for more pressure she applied the perfect amount of pressure. I will definitely come back!

I had a Korean lash lift done by Macy and honestly the results are amazing! She was so warm, welcoming and professional, and really made me feel comfortable throughout the appointment. She took her time and did such a lovely job — I’m so happy with my lashes and will definitely be going back. Highly recommend!

I was not impressed with the Booksy app. I booked my appointment on the app. I thought all was well till I arrived at my appointment the the hairdresser had no idea I was coming and he already had a client with the same appointment time. I waited and the hairdresser took me in after the client he was working on. But he should have been notified that I was coming and I should not have been able to book for the same time.

KP did an amazing job with my haircut. He listened to what I wanted, paid attention to detail, and made sure everything looked great. Professional, friendly, and skilled. I left feeling confident and very happy with the results. Highly recommend KP to anyone looking for a great haircut! -AJ

5 stars all the way. Rafy did an excellent job on my haircut. He cut my hair exactly the way I wanted it, the lineup was clean and precise, and the overall service was on point from start to finish. Professional, detailed, and takes pride in his work. I definitely appreciate the great experience and I’ll definitely be back.

Had to leave a review for AD because the experience was solid from start to finish. I usually stick to the same haircut every time, but AD convinced me to step out of my comfort zone and try something different. The cut came out better than I expected and I’ve been getting compliments ever since I left the shop. Most importantly, I walked out feeling more confident than I have in a while. Appreciate you, AD — definitely one of the best barbers I’ve been to.
Barber did a great job, the Hospitality was tops, definitely a good place to go to, if you're looking for a new Barber, and need a nice Haircut .
horrible app. every damn barber cancels or doesnt show up. where is my refund. barber didn't even show up to his own shop. took my deposit for 48.75 for my deposit for two cuts.

Mystique did such an amazing job on my hair! You can tell she genuinely cares about healthy hair and takes the time to make sure your hair not only looks beautiful, but stays healthy too. She is professional, knowledgeable, and makes you feel comfortable from start to finish. Highly recommend her to anyone looking for quality hair care and amazing results!

My little guy always leaves looking so handsome after his haircut! JM Master Barber does an amazing job every time and has some of the best skills I've seen in a long time. He's patient, polite, and great with kids. I also appreciate that he respects your time and doesn't keep you waiting forever. Highly recommend to anyone looking for a talented and professional Master Barber!"
Notifications only come the day before the appointment. Give us the ability to configure it or at least add some default one an hour before or so. It's a critical functionality for such app.

I’ve been using Alin as my barber for over three years now, and I don’t plan on changing barber shops any time soon! I would 100% recommend this place to anyone looking for a skilled barber and overall great service

Great cut + great atmosphere = I'm coming back. Walked out looking sharp. The team here actually listens and knows what they're doing. Place is clean, music's good, energy's right. If you want a hairstyle done right without the awkward small talk or rush job, this is the spot. Thanks for the fresh cut.UPPERROOM! Shout out to my barber RANDY! Mission, TX needs more places like this.

Corey is truly a master of healthy, beautiful hair. My silk press and trim came out flawless — smooth, shiny, and full of life. My hair hasn’t looked this healthy or this good in a long time. I walked out feeling confident and honestly a little extra glamorous. Thank you, Corey, for the care, the skill, and the vibe. Highly recommend.

The app saved as a favorite and made an appointment with a barber that I've never visited. I only knew this happened after I got an email that this app-made appointment was canceled, which it again did on its own.

I can't recommend Fresh highly enough. A coworker was in town and needed a barber, so I referred him to Fresh. After his appointment, he called me and couldn't stop talking about how impressed he was. He loved the attention to detail, professionalism, and beard service, including having his beard straightened for the first time. He also mentioned how personable and welcoming Fresh was. Top-notch service from start to finish!!

fantastic service, Ellie is so friendly and made you feel so comfortable she made sure to ask a lot of questions to get the exact look you want. I was at a wedding, so after all day and dancing the nite away, the makeup was still perfect at the end of the nite x

my son has had the privilege of getting his hair cut by Alex and syid and both did an amazing job and did not disappoint! he has curly hair and is very picky with who cuts it. They both nail it everytime. highly recommend them both.

Great experience! Ramon did a great job with my haircut and took his time to make sure everything looked right. I'm very happy with how it turned out. Friendly, professional, I'll definitely be back. Highly recommend!
This app helped me find a local barber at a great price, made scheduling and payment incredibly easy, and makes me want to use it so much more
Me me me time! It doesn't happen often so spending it at ReNu guarantees relaxation, switch off, chats and laughter - AND I depart with fabulous pretty toe nails! No grumbles from me 🤩🤩

I used to think this app was great, but recently it has been playing up. I live in northern Ireland and searched for a barbers - it sent me a bunch of barbers in Burnley in England... not exactly very helpful I didn't have a VPN on and can't figure out how it worked that out

Whitney is so sweet and is so good at what she does. I needed some real help after going years without a cut. She was able to guide me into a change that was perfect. I love my new hair thanks to her!!
First time visit and it was great to find a barbers where you can book rather than the lottery of the walk in. Friendly chatty staff and great environment. I'll defo be back 🙂
Tammy did a wonderful job on my lashes and they lasted me 2 months the first time and I just went a second time because I loved how natural they look. Thank you Tammy!

This salon is very clean. Well organized with great customer service. This is the place for self care. My stylist Tara J is the best. I feel like a brand new woman everytime I leave. Thanks Tara! You are excellent!
Best hair cut and beard trim I've had so far. Cam is very professional with an amazing attention to detail. Highly recommended.
Great Salon. Amber does excellent work. Keeps me looking cute for all my events. She knows how to do ALL kinds of hair!

I had such a great experience with Maressa She was very knowledgeable and took the time to find the perfect tone and color that matched my skin tone beautifully. She’s also incredibly nice, attentive, and made me feel comfortable throughout the whole appointment. I absolutely love the results and will definitely be returning. Highly recommend!

Johnny doesn't amazing job, You definitely got a good cut in the end because he listens to what you say and what you ask for, this is my first time having him cut my hair and he listen to what I what I had said about what I typically get done we talked about it for a little bit and couldn't be happy with my result 10 out of 10 would recommend!

Outstanding work. I just picked up my son and his fade is perfect all the way around. The attention to detail on the lineup is incredible. Tomorrow is his birthday, and I know he’s going to be walking tall at school because he looks so sharp. It’s hard to find a barber who hits a home run with no errors, but that’s exactly what happened today. Truly appreciate the craft.
Fantastic professional service. If your not sure what style you like, Mark can give you ideas and suggestions. My grandson has been going for over 3yrs and will never go elsewhere.

Tyler was outstanding. His attention to detail is Phenomenal. It was my first time there, definitely not my last, and he made sure I was happy with every step. He took his time and the local sports conversation was very relaxing. I highly recommend Tyler for a great haircut and impeccable service. Good luck with the upcoming Wedding Tyler!

JStylez is very professional and has a quality experience and Service. I've been a client for over 15 years. I recommend anyone to book her for your stylist she's good at what she does. I liked the appointment. She takes you in on time. The atmosphere is very pleasant and I loved the spiritual music that she plays. Ms. Janice Payne is the one for your stylist.❤️

a good Barber is hard to come by these days so, I'm glad I came across this guy. Kris has been giving me nice clean haircuts for a couple years now and is somebody I'd highly recommend. His consistency on good-looking cuts across all his clients shows what a true professional he is. Always a good time booking with him🤙🏼

Higly recommend Marli to any and everyone! She explained the process so patiently seeing that this was my first time and I had a lot of questions. Her warm and relaxed personality made me feel very at ease.

best fade I've ever had and been getting them for 40 years. he lines me up and does my beard for free. top notch and he is a good guy. price is very reasonable and won't beat it for his quality and as much work as he does. thanks luis!

I highly recommend Ovi! He is professional, efficient, and always provides a welcoming experience. As a female getting a haircut in a barbershop environment, it can sometimes feel uncomfortable or different, but he has consistently made me feel completely comfortable and respected. His attention to detail and customer service truly stand out. If you’re looking for a barber you can trust long-term, Ovi is definitely the one!

Dana does great work! My nails came out perfect! I highly recommend. She is a true nail artist. I already booked my next appointment because she fills up fast. I'm also checking Pinterest for inspiration for my next appointment!

It's not always easy to find someone who can bring your vision to life, but she absolutely did. We left feeling confident, refreshed, and loving our new haircuts. I highly recommend her to anyone looking for a talented stylist who truly cares about her clients. Thank you for such a wonderful experience!

Rose is highly skilled in many different massage techniques and the best masseuse I've ever had the pleasure of working with. She has healing hands. I've now tried shiatsu and swedish and the only problem I have, is deciding between the two. If you're in need of some self care then you need to schedule an appointment ASAP! From her technique, to the aromatherapy to the interior design/atmosphere of her cozy spa, you'll leave here wanting to relive it time & again!!!
Great service!!!! They make sure your cut comes out perfect 👌. They go all out with the clean straight blade work, hot face towel and a shampoo and conditioner treatment. My new spot.

Horrible booking app, deletes my appointments all the time, charged me for a deposit (which was fine) but actually charged me way more money than what my service was even for, says my email is not set up on my account but I got notifications on that email saying my appointments were canceled. and people pay $ for this!?

Booksy is easy to use, however, those providing the service cannot provide in depth detail of the product/ service they offer and so once at the establishment clients may need to pay an additional cost. I booked a hair salon appointment and had to pay extra once I arrived because of the above. luckily I was able to pay the small additional costs but that may not be the case for someone else in my position. Please fix this Booksy 😊 hope this helps.

I had an appointment at Beauty from the Heart Salon. I was there on time but the hairdresser said they didn't have information about my booking. I even showed them my booking. She refused to cut my hair because she said she doesn't have time. This was a really bad experience for me.

I've recently had the elim pedicure with the beautiful Natalie .....such a beautiful relaxing treatment.natalie is very professional & experienced in what she does ,so happy with how my feet felt and looked afterwards, much more better than other pedicures ....my feet have never felt so soft i would definitely recommend this treatment .I'm hooked ,will definitely be keeping up with this treatment thank you Natalie 5*

playStoreReviews.text: I am very unsatisfied with the app. I lose appointments. & double-book because the apps disappear. I can get an update from them or my phone and lose appointments again. Big issues with recurring appointments. After setting them they disappear. and so far I haven't seen a way to send SMS reminders automatically. I have to manually go in and do it. I have tried to email them or chat with them online and get nothing. I've asked for help and get nothing. I am going to look for another app.

I have been using this app for years and years. I absolutely love it. It has consistently gotten better with each update. They are always improving their platform and really listen to our input on things we would like to see in this app. It does every single thing you need to run your hair business. Makes appointments, accounting with details and reports, taxes, retail and inventory. Everything you need! I do wish it would tell us our retention rate for returning clients. Love this app!!

Sadly I must change my original rating of 5 stars. The most recent update is interfering with my client base. I've emailed and received no response. Appt reminders are no longer automatic and even when sent manually some clients still aren't receiving it and are no-showing. I'm very unhappy with the lack of response from support. Why do I pay for this? I will return my stellar review once the changes have been made and someone has followed up with me. This app is quickly becoming not worth it

Love it. The only thing I would adjust is being able to pre split the booking times (not just an option to split after you book). Ie high lights 1 hour, gap 1 hour(gap automatic) cut/blow 1 hour, rather than needing to put it after. It will make the booking process much faster, and also it would be amazing to be able to split the expense invoice into more than one category. Other Than that.. It's amazing!

I love this app. It took a bit of getting used to having used another app for many years. The reason I changed was because this app records what clients brought as well as services, something which is important for follow up sales. For the price this is very good value and has many of the features of much more expensive booking software. There are a few processes that could be made quicker but overall very happy.

I love this app for my salon on my phone. However I gave it a 3 star because I really feel more people would benefit from this program if it was available to download on a computer. Especially if you pay for the licensed version.
