playStoreReviews.text: Half the exercises are behind a paywall. Even if im just using the app for tracking. There are random exercises I can't add to my workout. Bench is ok. Smith bench isn't. Low row is ok. Bent over row isn't. It's really stupid, and an attempt to be annoying as possible to try and get me to spend $30 a year to use a fancy spreadsheet isn't worth it. I'd pay a one time download fee, or the fee to remove the ads (there are a LOT of ads), but I'm not subscribing to pay per month. Sorry.

I was really REALLY digging this app. I've been more consistent than I've ever been before, and I'm seeing genuine progress. I felt myself getting stronger but when I was in the middle of my workout on day 18 and I saw that my workout was locked halfway through I was pretty frickn pssd as you could imagine. I enjoyed using that but I thought that was pretty gross. I'll go ahead and take the info that I got from the app and just write it in my own personal notebook. thank you for the "free trial"

I used the app, then abandoned it because a bunch of exercises I used were suddenly premium exclusive. I left a low review based on this change. Now all the exercises are back to normal. I intend to use it as long as the exercises I found originally stay free. If the things I liked about the free version stay free, then I rate it 5 stars. Great exercise catalogue and great use interface. If this change was in response to my comment, then thank you very much! Would recommend.

In general I like the App, but there are some things I don't like. such as I can't look ahead to see what exercises are coming up. you can't skip a day and move to the next for instance I had lower body, rest day, shoulders, then lower body again. my legs were still to sore to work out lower body again, but there is no way to get around it. when you need to change an exercise, the app you offer you a replacement exercise that works the same muscle groups.

Excellent app!! I needed to transfer some of my exercises from my previous app to this one, and had no problem! Just manually put them into the exercises selection page, under their related muscle group. Only thing that I wish was available, is to "Hide" or remove the hundreds of exercises that are of completely no use to me. You still need to scroll through them to find what you are looking for. Also the trainer's suggested workouts, doesn't generate any of my added exercises into routines.

Couldn't get past an ad to get to the app after using it two days. Waste of workout time. Tried four times to get it to work. Just for the record, I tried multiple times to let the ad play out. But everytime it wouldn't allow me to move on. I well gladly sit through an ad, but really, three attempts and everytime I am stuck with no way to advance-not useful.

Awesome app. It has tons of exercises that you can search by equipment type and muscle group, and you can also add your own. This is so helpful when you're working out with limited equipment vs. at a gym. The auto generated workouts are nice too since they suggest exercises you might not think of. The app also integrates easily with Google fit which is nice. I've gotten back into the habit of working out since using this - the added structure makes it so much easier to stick to it.

I have been using this application for well over a year, and it enjoy most of it's functions. The only issue at the moment is how there are a lack of landmine, smash ball, and other various exercises. I can add them as custom exercises, but the target muscle groups are too generic and not specific enough.

I've been using this app at the gym for a little over 2 years now and I absolutely love it! After using it for a few months I paid the one time fee to remove adds. I've created and tweaked every workout I do at the gym multiple times throughout the year to fit the season with lifting that I'm currently in. I also loved doing the plans that were put in the app back in the day, this app is great and I feel like it carries from beginner to advanced lifters very well!

I'm going to keep if short and brief. the app is great itself, I've tried all sort of different workout apps but this one really made me do progress. I've seen changes to body, mood, etc. Problem is, you have to sync in every day so when you log back in, you don't have to repeat the same things and your calendar doesn't seem messed up.

I have been using this app for the past year and really like it I was able to select from the large number of exercises to customize upper and lower body workouts to match equipment in my gym. One month ago I had to upgrade my phone and after installing the app on the new phone tried to put in my customized programs. Unfortunately. the app will not let me add many of my exercises unless I now pay. So now I will have to look for a different app.

Wanted to be able to track and plan my workouts. Gave up after about 10 minutes. They have leg press machines listed under arms as well as many other machines that are not correctly listed. So just finding and selecting the correct workout is incredibly time consuming and frustrating. Never even got through the bicep workout. They also have arms listed as a work out, but everyone knows you don't work your biceps and triceps at the same time.. And don't ask for 5 stars, or I'll make it a 1 star.

Can't do much with the free version. I understand developers deserve to make money on their products and stuff, but when you can barely do anything at all without paying for a subscription to the app it becomes quite annoying. I get there is a 7 day free trial, but not everyone can afford 30 dollars a year for an app that basically just shows you different workouts you can do.

I have used quite a few fitness apps over the years, and this is a step above the most basic. Yes, you can log workouts and track history; however, this app does not support supersets (of any type). Moreover, if you do any band exercises, there is no way to just put "Green Band" or "Blue Band." The app requires a weight/resistance. Additionally, there is not support for logging cardio like treadmill or elliptical (yes, you can add those as custom, but I need custom fields for tracking distance, resistance, etc.). Finally, the app does not keep the screen on (nor does it offer the option to do so). Each time I finish an exercise and go back to my phone to log the set, I need to unlock the phone. That's annoying. Otherwise, it works as well as a spreadsheet with sound.

This app is great for anyone wanting to get in shape All you do is add the type of equipment that you can utilize and it tailors workouts to the equipment that you have so there's no guessing. Great app I've been using it for a few months and I'm seeing physical results by staying consistent. I had to update my review, I originally gave 5 stars but I have to take 1 away because the app no longer connects the Google Fit to track workouts. Still an awesome app but I hope they get connectivity back

This app sucks! It only lets you log certain exercises. If the exercise isn't in their list you have to pay for it! And I'm talking basis exercises like an ab machine! Don't waste your time with this app! To the developer of this app. Your response is of no help to me at all. The custom feature does not allow me to add some basic exercises like the crunch machine to my workout as I have said initially. There is a padlock next to it indicating that I would have to pay to add it. This is ludacris!

I used to love this app. I downloaded it almost four years ago and haven't had a complaint until now. The excessive amounts of ads were something I could tolerate since it was free. If I wanted to get rid of the ads, I could pay for a premium membership. However, you now have to pay a subscription fee if you want to log certain exercises- I'm a woman, so I have to pay to log glute bridges and pistol squats. I used to recommend this app to everyone. I will never do that again. Deleting it.

I've used this app for a long time. It is one of my favs. Every time I try another workout app, I come back to this one. The only thing I wish is that my husband and I could send each other our custom workouts through the app or at least be able to share them. Of course, I understand why the option isn't there for the app generated workouts.

I truly love this app and how I can customize my numerous workouts with ease. I recommend this app to anyone who wants to track their own workouts or build one. My only complaint is I cannot add any form of Cardio or Sports-related activities to the workouts. It'd be nice if I could simply add Jogging or Basketball.

This is my new favorite app. This app has useful functionality on its free version and the subscription for the extra premium features is affordable. It even generates new work out routines for you or you can assemble your own using the pretty comprehensive exercise library. You can narrow the library by what equipment you have available to you. It's easy to use and has a nice interface that is easy to read and isn't busy or cluttered looking.

I have an odd set of equipment so I paid for it and it leaves a lot to be desired. I really only find it useful for tracking my own custom workouts. The "Training"and "Plan" sections will give generated workouts based on your equipment but they're wonky, where sometimes there isn't a leg day for a while, and then the workouts are locked so you can't look ahead to see it their plans will be sufficient. I'm on the lookout for something else.

I just got back into working out and am really enjoying this app! It's good for switching up your routine, learning new exercises, and keeping track of weights. My only request, that I've seen others mention as well, would be to ignore certain exercises. Many times I have to hit the regenerate button several times because there is an exercise or two that I'm not a fan of. Otherwise great app!

I just have a couple of suggestions, firstly I would like an option where you can move the muscle groups, sometimes you have to scroll down to find a workout, it'd be better to have your own order, also it'd be cool if you could kind of "block" certain exercises that you don't like, it's kind of annoying that you have to replace/remove workouts every day, a dark mode would be cool too and an option to download all the content when you don't have data at the gym even if it's a paid feature.

I'm just starting to get back to the gym and so far I like this app. I'd really love to see more workouts and equipment on here though. My workouts always start with cardio warm-ups, then strength, then cool down. Some days it's circuit training with a heavy bag and calisthenics, so I'd also love to see that equipment and exercises on here too! Other days it's just cardio machines and/or swimming. I'd love to be able to track all of that in one place.

Great variety of workouts available, great way to keep track of your personal bests and previous sets, etc. Edit: I've noticed a lot of common workouts are missing, like XYTs and Skierg. Also, it would be awesome if they could add warm-up exercises like Froggies, chest stretches, cobras, etc. Even if there's just a description in the custom workouts where you can fill in notes and warm-ups.

I'm really impressed so far. Only a week in but it is exactly what I wanted. It creates the workouts for me so I don't have to do the thinking only the doing which is hard enough. The yearly subscription is so worth the price. It is user friendly, easy to swap out exercises, change sets, and the explanation and animation for each exercise is so helpful and clear. I would definitely recommend it.

This app is so good but so frustrating, most of the time, the adds take you out of the app with no way to get back except for fully shutting it down and restarting it. generally after about 10/15 goes it will have an add you can just delete to get to the workout, which is the most annoying thing ever because other than that the app is fantastic

When it asked me to choose my experience and I went with the lowest option, it still gave me weights that were way too hard for a complete beginner and I hard to manually calibrate it. I feel this might lead to injuries when people take on weights they can't handle at that stage. Otherwise it's a very good app.

A joy to use. Easy to set up a workout plan, and the rest timer between sets when tracking a workout is what set it apart from other apps for me. I previously said exercises were missing, but I now realize you can easily add custom exercises. Perfect! Edit: Can't remember the last time I liked an app so much I actually wanted to spend money on it, but it happened with this one. Just purchased premium, very happy to support these devs!

At first I thought that I would have to purchase a subscription to use the app fully, however, it is completely free; there isn't a single pay-up button except to remove the ads. The interface is very practical, the instructions are clear, and you can customize the workout plans, considering the equipment you have and it is freakin awesome. Praise to the developers for making it free of charges and easy to use. Very recommend to use😉

This app is a gem! The tracking is incredible, and being free is the icing on the cake. I used your Home Workout app first and got amazing results. I expect this one to be even better! One suggestion: it would be awesome to upload a progress photo after each workout. Having a built in way to track visual transformation would be a huge motivator. Another big drawback is that the exercises in the app's workout plan are not the same as those in your other apps. It takes a long time to load.

Unskippable ads. The ads get caught in a loop even when you watch the ad in it's entirety. Super frustrating because you can restart the app a bunch of times and never gets to your workouts. it doesn't happen all the time but it's enough to make me find another app!

I really love this app! It tracks my workout days perfectly and has a very user-friendly layout. The exercise selection is great, and you can easily replace any exercise you don't want. The fact that I can build my own custom workout plan completely for free is amazing. No payments, no hassle..just a perfect fitness companion!

I'm using this app for more than 18 months, and it's a great one because most of the exercises are very informative, didactic, and mainly illustrative. How I used it for a long time, I can confirm that in worst cases, you'll have slightly changes in your body, whatever is your lifestyle. The only thing it lacks is more Workout exercises because for example, the Pulley Forehead Triceps isn't in the list of all exercises the app have, I need to add images and info to this exercise appear

I was using this app for a couple of years and loved it. recently I realized it's not free anymore(technically it is, but it's difficult to use it how I wanted without paying for premium). Anyway, the app is great and worth paying for premium. what if offers: - training plans for different muscle groups - ability to create custom training plans - database of over 500 exercises - each one with a description, and short animation - detailed reports and history of workouts much recommended!

This is a really good app for workout tracking. I completely understand that the developers rely on ads, but you don't have to set the ads to launch every time we start the app. It's extremely annoying! 😡

Love this app, it would be very helpful if there could be a way to track the percentage of the workout I am through after checking the boxes. Like a pie chart or a completion bar could really help motivate to finish through
Not friendly coz it doesn't have logging on unilateral exercise especially if it is done in left and right exercise. Also it doesn't have dumbbell rackpull. But overall it is good.
I really do like this app. The free version has plenty of good workouts. you're able to customize your workouts for whatever your working on that day.

Awesome app. I love how simple it is and that there's just a one time purchase for the premium version I do wish it had 1. EZ bar excercises. 2. Ability to edit past workouts. 3. CSV export for 1 week, 1 month, 1 years and all time. (because I'm a nerd and want to make my own graphs) without linking a google account.

It has close to 500 different workouts. But no workouts related to isometric holds. Custom workouts don't have the option to select if the workout is time based or distance based. All other workout apps provide an option to choose among time based, distance based, or rep based but this app doesn't. Being a paid subscriber, I already emailed the developer and got a reply they will fix this but they didn't till now despite the many app updates since my email. I am trying other workout apps now
Its great that I can create my own workout! Only dumbbells?? No problem! Only machines?? No problem! This app really helps me keep track of my progress.

I've been using this app for almost four years, but today when I opened it, I found half of my exercises were suddenly locked behind a subscription. The app already has ads so this feels like a bait and switch. I will be uninstalling the app if this isn't removed on the next update. Terrible.

I've had this app for awhile, the only really for the inconsistency. it's been great to use especially for modifying exercises based on comfort or equipment availability. easily edit reps and weight for slow or fast progression too.

Amazing app, has great workout recommendations for beginners. Also you can make your custom workout plans, you can add n number of gym equipment and exercises to the custom plan. Its great for me as I made custom plans for gym workout for everyday seperately.

Thank you for guidance and support for your help in this app. I've been fooling around in a gym for 9 years . Then I found your app. believe me when I say Thank you and that it will be well worth the small amount of the fee monthly. Sincerely. RAA
Its easy to use and really helpful for getting you started and then being able to set up your own routine and keep it up to date. I'd highly recommend!

I genuinely love this app. I wasnt expecting a fitness app to have many features. I was surprised it calculated my bmi, how much I usually lift. It also has so many different exercises based on what equipment you have available. This app for me is a rare occurrence and its great. 10/10 would recommend.

All the apps of Leap Fitness are wonderful and easy to use. I have just started using the free version but seeing the mechanism of the app, i am looking forward to take the premium version ( pls leap fitness grant me free premium version )
this app is all good just the little problem is that it should also ask customers that how much time will they give to workout everyday
Great for creating workouts for you based on what you have available in terms of equipment. Great bodyweight options for those of us short on equipment
good app better for beginners who don't know which exercise to do and even intermediates can also check this app out overall good just sometimes ads pops up but overall good app
just one problem needs to add some more exercises as the app does not recognise some exercises for example dumbbell shoulder press apart from that app is gem
best apps i ever use for my progress tracking in gym. i used to be use an other aps (home workout) its really good too. The creator also likes to receive feedback from consumers

I have been using this app for quite some months now. very interactive, helpful with the images and directions. one thing if this app can add would be much appreciated if it can list with muscles (not just muscle groups) a particular exercise would act on. for example, for bicep would it act more on the long head or short head.

I've paid for subscription, only because I actually enjoy a gym app, love the plans and exercises and it's very easy to use. Can replace an exercise or remove it, very flexible and you will definitely find everything you need in your local gym to follow this up and get fit. 😁
I have enjoyed using this workout app more than most others in the past. It is simple and easy to use. Makes working out for beginners much easier when trying to figure out what exercises to do!

why does the ads force open the app? Thanks for the reply. I know that I should press the x button after the ad, the issue is it opens the ali-express app after I press the >> after I watched the full ad. Also very disappointing that feedback section only allows photos and not videos like you stated in your reply...

Best gym buddy app I've ever used! Simple to access and provides me with a vast library of exercises and workout routines for motivation and focus. Also helps me with my form with the little tutorial videos. Really impressed!
the app is great! it's all good, but customization with the equipment you have still needs improvement - on the side of picking or recommending alternatives for an exercise.
excellent, it would be nice if the app could share health data with other apps.... otherwise the app is very practical and useful at the gym to track workouts and keep the time between sets in check.

I think this is the best gym app out there. It has programmes you can follow- tailored to your goals, or if you prefer, you can make up your own workouts with 100s of exercises to choose from. Each exercise has a video demonstration for reference. It tracks your progress with a graph and body map so you can make sure you are hitting all your muscle groups. It's so simple and easy to use and for £30 for the year, I think it's excellent value for money ❤️

it's great as it gives personalised work outs without paying anything and the only advert I get is when I load the app, after that there's no adverts at all. it gives you options on which muscle groups or which results you are working towards and you can choose which equipment you have access to so there's never an exercise you can't do. I also like that the weight and reps can be changed during the exercise.

Hi, I’ve been using your app for quite some time now and it’s been a great experience, really well done. I wanted to check whether your app supports integration with Android Health Connect. Specifically: – Can it read data from Health Connect (e.g., steps, heart rate, sleep)? – Can it write data back to Health Connect? – If supported, how do I enable the connection? Also, which data types are currently supported? If not currently supported, is it planned in your roadmap? Thanks.

useful and robust. Though some features need much improvement: the rest timer blocks the interaction with the rest of the exercises on the routine list; the memos should be visible on the next workout session in progress.
I like the app no issues. My problem is even though it's supposed to save your workouts on your account for resets or changing phones, all my custom work out lists and everything got erased.
Overall good app. Good features however some crucial workouts are missing. Also would be nice if I could download all my data into excel to analyse myself.
very good app. the best workout app so far. it motivates you to workout.
Custom exercises creation feature is awesome. I am changing my 4 stars review to 5 stars.
this app help me become fit again at 35yrs old. I lose 10kg in since i follow the free traing in this app.

They added options to add exercises not listed in the app. Been using for 2 or 3 years at this point and tried others in between, this is still my favorite by far. Simple and clean design, easy to use.
after trying so many applications I found this one and believe me this is the best. very easy to use. user friendly interface
Great app for home workout..helps u not miss sets or exceed the rest time perfect app for home workout
Best Gym Tracking App I've ever used. Clean layout, and intuitive interface.
one of the best apps to track your exercises and also shows the correct forms

The only thing that needs improvement is the timer - I wish it lets me do things within the app and maybe the counter should have a + and - to easily edit the count every workout. dark mode update got me to go ad free 🎉
great app. it's absolutely free and almost add free. developers are not greedy.
fantastic, gave me a assortment of different workouts for free and gave me the chance to feel better about myself
simple and effective and easy to use. Best app ever for the Gym person

Genuinely this is a great workout app.. weather u need guidance at the gym or at home.. this is the #1 go to app for beginners and pros.. been using it for a month now and it helps me stay consistent and disciplined also🔥🏋️‍♀️❤️

It's a great app, easy to use, clear descriptions and vast flexibility. I hope you add the rest of the exercises on the premium app since it's missing some variations in exercises, and it's hard to keep track if the exercice is not loggable. And as a suggestion, it would be helpful if the finished workouts could be edited after being logged. Keep up the good work.

I think the app is great overall, however I do wish you could add individual workouts that are not following the program, or be able to edit the program itself (ie. you have a chest day next but you want to do arms, so you can change that day and the rest of the program would automatically adjust). Also dark mode would be nice. Apart from that great app and nice UI. :)

Great app though I think it could improve some things, like including a dark mode. Also it could include the option to set a specific time for some exercises. There are some machines missing like the bike, treadmill, or elliptical, I had to add those myself. And when you create a new exercise and want to set a group of muscles the options are limited. For example I added an exercise of abductors and I had to choose just legs. Overall great app.

Update: I once paid to remove apps, but the app is suddenly asking for a subscription, and I'm locked out of random exercises. There was no notification to a change in pricing model, which is a bad practice. I'm not willing to pay for a subscription just to track exercises. It makes 0 sense when you are not actively adding content. ---- Simple, easy to use and most importantly, an honest premium model. Custom or auto generated fitness plan, keeps track of everything I need, highly recommend!

Good tracking app in overall, suggested workouts are OK, but it's best if you personalize them with the help of a trainer or the internet. Adding custom workouts is a good feature, but some important exercises like T-bar rows, cable overhead curls, front raise (reverse grip), etc. are not available. Also, exporting workouts to other devices and sharing them can be a good option.

My boyfriend has had this app (full version) for years and always recommended it. I purchases the ad-free version, as he did, and expected that I'm paying also for a full version of the app, like the one he has. We were both in for a surprise when we saw most of the exercises are "locked" now, so I am invited to pay additionally. Obviously something that was added some time ago. It is practically useless for me now and I'll need to remove it, I see 0 value in this ad-free version. Disappointment

Always struggled with get a workout routine and this helped a lot. Also it is super satisfying to check out all the exercises as you go😌. Could you add a feature that enables the user to know how many calories are burned approximately per exercise. I know it's tricky to pull off with variables like age and height, but I think it will be a nice addition to the app.

I'm evaluating the app and it doesn't look bad, however, I miss a couple of features: 1. The ability to add comments on the exercises when adding them to a workout. I think you can do it during the workout, but it'd be useful to add comments when you create the workout. 2. The ability to export and download workout logs on PDF to keep them on my records, in case I stop using the app or lose the phone. I would happily pay the annual subscription if I had those features, but without them....

I've been looking for a nice free app that actually helps with you workout. I can gladly say I found it! You get a small ad that you can almost immediately skip when opening the app to keep it free, and the app itself gives you accurate advice and support when doing your exercises. You can tell the app what body parts you want to train, and it makes a programme thats suited for you and you alone. Thank you to whoever made this app, you made getting into fitness so much easier for me!!!!

Great app, simple but with everything you need👍 There are suggestions for improvement: 1. When there are exercises in which a stopwatch can be useful (for example, such as a plank), it would be cool if you could set the time you need to stand, and not just 1 approach. 2. It would also be useful to set the rest time between approaches and between exercises separately, so that you can make it different.

Hi team, I really enjoy your app! I wanted to share two things that I feel would make it even better: 1. It would be very helpful to have the option to enter seconds instead of reps. For example, for exercises like planks I measure by time, not reps. Having a built-in timer for these would be amazing. 2. It would be great to have a way to split an exercise into left and right, now I just manually enter the exercise twice for it

Nice app. Ads before and after the workout around 5 seconds, no problem. Could you add more exercises? For example, I am missing seated tricep dips. For now, I am using the tricep dip and putting the weight in the notes. Would be nice if this is added so I can put the reps and the weight in. Thanks. Ps. This isn't the assisted machine. This is just the regular seated tricep where you add the weights yourself.

Added a subscription and put many exercises behind it. Can't use my custom workouts now. Can't even see the exercise details to replace it. About 500 exercises total and about 300 of them are now behind a subscription. $30 per year to use age old exercises and more than 4 custom exercises that are stored on my own device. Steer clear of developer's apps, no telling what else they'll take away in the future.

Brilliant app that seems to have the right balance of ease-of-use, such as planning different workouts, and the right amount of functionality. The only thing I've noticed is that you can't enter weights with more than one decimal place - would be perfect being able to enter weights such with .25 or .75 increment. Apart from that, £4 is a bargain to pay for such a decent app.

I've been using it now for a month as a paid user. I won't be renewing. Lots of missing exercises and even though it will let you create custom exercises, the bigger problem is there is lots of missing equipment (no weighted sleds, ropes, medicine balls, chains, weighted vests, the list goes on....). No real calestentic tracking options as well. It really is quite limiting and restrictive.

Fantastic app, I cannot believe it's free. It makes an awesome custom gym plan based on your weight and how much you can comfortably lift, with well rounded exercises. It also shows you how to perform certain exercises, and allows you to log your reps and sets. Honestly couldn't recommend more, theres almost no ads except for when you initially open the app. Love it

I don't normally leave reviews but ... This app is really good. It has a large range of preinstalled exercises that you can build your own routines with or you can mark the equipment you own / have access to and it will automatically build a routine for you depending on your goal, which can also be set in the app. Its free and has ads but they are tastefully spaced so it feels fair. Would recommend for anyone new and experienced to working out.

Very good free gym app! Ads are not that annoying, won't show up in the middle of the screen during workout session. You can let the app suggest a session for you, or you can build your own sessions. Broad range of exercise that you can choose from. You may even filter depending on your preference and equipment availability. You can track your progression with ease adjusting number of reps and weight during the workout. Didn't find any bug so far. Highly recommend it.

Awesome app, has most of what i need. I only wish they can provide more metrics and suggestions on weight/reps/sets based on my routine. Maybe some suggestions for specific muscles that my routine doesn't cover. But overall very good. Also I wish to see more integration with different fitness devices and scales to have all data in one place. One more thing, I would like to see a dark theme, and always-on display option especially during the rest time. Thanks

Has most workouts and you can plan your own. There are a few missing however this can be compensated by choosing a similar exercise. Just remember to use the memo/note option to remind you of the change in exercise. Recently the timer has been a big buggy. If you put the app in the background you used to hear he countdown timer but now it's a hit or miss.

Exercises aren't accurate--half don't reflect the images, the other half don't describe what the exercise should do. The 'AI' is unable to help unless it's the last routine (not saved). The timers are infuriating and you can't switch to reps on timed exercises. And support doesn't respond to any requests for help or to fix things. Not even a good workout app.

I liked the app for the most part in the beginning. I created my own workout and no major issues. using it for about 4 months then all of a sudden my routines dissappear... no idea why. I went into the Ai feature to see if I could write up a new plan... I picked a muscle group that I want to work, say back workout, Ai gives me legs and chest... very disappointed wish I could get my money back!

was ok. it was having technical issues. I signed up for the year but had to cancel. I only had it for a few hours. I'd like a refund please. reached out over email — pending review. I hope this doesn't deter anyone from trying the app. It looks good with a lot of options and functions, examples and even a recovery map. My phone just wasn't having it. Foldable Phones guys... foldable... phones ....

("Contact Us" doesn't work in the app) Bought a 1 year subscription, then I cancelled it just so it wouldn't automatically renew next year. Now I get constant pop ups and a permanent icon covering the workout information that is offering me a discounted subscription. I am subscribed, I shouldn't have to deal with these things just because it's not on automatic renewal!

I like the workout routines the AI comes up with, and the fact that I can add, remove, and replace exercises whenever I want. I really like that it shows you how to perform each exercise, as well. I also like that it keeps track of my workouts, which muscles I'm using, and my body measurements. There was an earlier review saying that if you switched screens while a workout was in progress, it would restart your progress when you switched back, but that bug seems to be fixed.

Good app - but PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE let me have the opportunity to keep NOTES on my workouts. If I use resistance bands, I have NO WAY to put in how much resistance I used on a given exercise. I need to be able to keep notes on my workouts, like "Stay at this weight" or "GO DOWN next time" or "GO UP next time." I can't do that in the app and it's a VERY limiting factor for an all-in-one app for the gym.

The only "AI" feature is the exercise suggestions. Otherwise, you are basically just putting everything together yourself, but they only let you see 3 of the same different choices each time you want to add a new exercise, so you end up hitting "suggest a new one" a dozen times every single time. I was hoping for some help finding a workout despite my chronic pain barriers, but another app bites the dust. It also asks for a hefty subscription fee to use the AI chat. ChatGPT to the rescue...🙄😒

I'm enjoying the AI generated workouts and how you can change it up to make it more taylored to your needs. I also like how you can put your own workouts together based on what muscle groups or what equipment you want to use. It's exactly what I been looking for but I wish when entering the weight you used it gave more options like, .25lbs, .50lbs, .75lbs, as of right now you can only enter in whole numbers. It would 100% better for tracking purposes if this were and option.

NEEDS MORE FEATURES... I love the app but think it would be AWESOME if I could take notes and use the app to track my water intake, nutrition (meals, calories, fats, carbohydrates, protein), and the amount of sleep I'm getting. I'm currently using three different apps to track these items and it would be so much easier to track them all in one place.

This does not provide personalized workout. It is very limited and cannot take into account injuries. I was thinking that this would actually provide a personalized workout since I sprained my ankle and needed to learn new exercises; it cannot do that at all. This app is actually a lot less flexible than many other exercise apps. Also I wrote customer service 5 minutes after I bought the app and tested it out asking for a refund, and they will not refund the annual purchase.

I love this app! 4 stars only because if you switch screens during your workout, it restarts your time and doesn't allow you to change it. So after I'm done lifting weights and it's time for my cardio, I open up another app to watch some TV while I finish up, but my time restarts. So instead of it logging the hour+ that I'm working out, it only logs the time from when I bring the app to the front again, even though the timer on the app is showing over an hour. Fix this and definitely giving 5!

Hello. Today was day 1. Loved it. Perfect as I wanted it. I was looking for an easy app to use and to change while working out with the images of the body I was focusing on plus the excercises. I have alot of feedback as of right now from only after 1 session, but will try to learn the app over time. So far, great. I was searching for 1 month and looking at at least 5 apps with trials and didn't like any. This one seems to be exactly what I wanted. I will come back and grade this overtime!

The pros: good price, a good amount of exercises, good data keeping. The Cons: to look for workouts, you have to type them in specifically the way they have them, some common workouts are missing, the ai generated workouts feel are more like randomly generated and not really specific like other workouts apps. Overall, good app for beginners.

As a person where money is tight. I am looking for free apps..i dont mind ads...when i see and download apps that claim to be free. Maybe what they need to say is free for 3 days..after that you can look but zero interaction unless you pay up. Its irritating to try and open the app only for it to show a workout but you cannot open the workout..cannot interact..cannot progress. I wpuld not recommend this app based on the bait and switch

I tried out Fit AI for one session. However I discovered that it required a bench for many of the workouts - which I don't own - and it was difficult to find a workaround. I deleted the app without realizing that I failed to cancel the trial. I realized a week later when I was charged $106.99. I immediately emailed again and again, but they refused to respond to my request for a refund. THEY REPLIED HERE FOR THE LOOK, BUT STILL HAVE NOT RESPONDED TO MY EMAILS.

Searching exercises is a pain since you need to type the exact name that the app uses. So if you type barbell overhead press you will not see it in the search since the app calls it military press. You also can't look at other routines while you are currently in a workout, it will end the workout and then you have to start over. The AI feature is a gimmick and does not measure muscle wear at less than 10 RPE. I did 3 sets of crutches and the app thinks my abs are at 0%. Not worth paying for.

I'm a natural fit person, so I've never had much experience in gyms. This app definitely helps me get into learning routines and targeted muscle training. Absolutely gave me the confidence I needed to keep going to the gym. Also, this isn't a complaint, more so a suggestion. I would like to see flexibility/stretching or warm-ups added in the future. I think that would be an amazing feature for this app.

Overall, I like the app. It took me a few days to understand how the workouts were logged. I didn't realize I had to go through the whole routine and finish so all the workouts were logged together for the day. Also took me a while to realize I couldn't manually create my own workout and input the info (e.i. zumba, bands, etc.) I wish they had a user guide or Q&A section. The Ai doesn't answer any app function questions.

It has this 5-minute sale counter every time when opening it. Also, this 3-day trial advertisement can't be closed anymore :) They removed the close button. Therefore, I can not do anything in this app anymore. I used it almost a year now, and the concept was actually quite good and had potential. Too bad it's scammy and doesn't work anymore

I got a new phone and when I go to log in after downloading the app on a new phone, clicking the sign into account button at several different locations within the app does nothing. Can not use the app or my subscription I paid for. Update to developer response. I have already emailed with and your suggestion did not solve or fix the issue. Still can't log into the app. Clicking the button to log in does absolutely nothing.

wastage of money. 1st, I don't like the app interface for logging the reps. 2nd, no video source to see the correct form of exercise. 3rd, AI itself recommends some exercises that i cannot find in the exercise list and the search can be improved. 4th, it is not a one stop app i have to look over multiple sources for getting a proper routine. 5th, there could be additional knowledge about muscles and the exercises. there are more things which this app lacks but can't mention all.

It is really scam! I was charged twice. So I still had the subscription. Today I decided to cancel the suvscription , so they won't charge me for the next year. My current subscription is funushing in March 2027. Now when I am opening app , it straight away suggests me to subscribe and I can not use the app in full as I cancelled subscription for next year, but current subscription is active.DO NOT TRUST THEM!!!Will have to report them and will contact my bank for refund

the variety of exercises to do every workout really helps me stick with working out more often. and the way you can track which muscle groups your hitting harder then others so you know to focus on other groups is great. longest I kept with an app of any sorts, workout or not.

Don't like it , I choose this app after trying a few when I bought the premium I realized it has less features and Finished workouts keep disappearing i definitely wish I could only pay for a month used and get the rest of my money back , I did cancel in 2 days but I cant get a refund that suck because I stuck with it for a year

never recommend this app as i subscribed for first year with discounted price with no problem but for the second year I paid the full price more than double of first year and the app didn't activated so I paid for full year for nothing and after complain to customer service, I got nothing !

the free trial lasted 2 days before it started asking for my credit card. a workout app is something very personal and something you need time to figure out if it's for you. so not my jam and uninstalling and going back to Fiton and paying for a year. it's the best for the $$$

A great app. It would be great if the AI aspect would learn your routines, suggest new exercises based on where you're training (which instruments are available) and switch exercises from the chat window. Otherwise, there isn't really any AI involved IMOP

quite helpful the only issue it has is the same of all i find in all workout planner: only consider the muscles but not the muscle heads for the workouts. this way, even with app help, i need to find some professional to create my workout sessions.  Other sugestion would be the "model" be able to be watched from different angles not only one view. it would help a lot and be a plus for users.  anyway, the support was very useful when i needed.

waste of money,, half way through a workout the app stops and you have to start a second time to finish workout data,, you then have two different workouts... very frustrating,,, Paid for the year at a discount and even so a waste of money... Moved onto a different app with good reviews and a 14 day free trial... Feniangaafan.

I initially subscribed to them and paid a small fee to try out the app. I cancelled the app 2 months in advance however they still deducted a yearly amount from my account. now when I ask for refund there is no response. This app is a scam dont ever purchase anything on it.

Tries to trick you into purchasing a discounted plan immediately after setting up an account with a four minute deadline. you can't even sample the app before the shady stuff starts. Using urgency tactics to lure you in instead of just making a good app.

I love this app! I've been getting a great variety of exercises that might have been out of my comfort zone before and I am feeling it everywhere. And if I don't like one that pops in the AI replace button will suggest and replace it in my workout so I still get full body workout. love it!

need option 1.warm sets. 2.drop sets 3.normal sets 4. failure set and you want include RIR scale from easy to hard how was sets please include in app this option then be 5 stars WOW I comment like nearly 5 months ago need update to better version but is no improvement and you trying charge more then 100 Euro this is like feel's scam no updates no nothing and you know you need update to better version I love this app but is need get better just simple setting you need add
Excellent. Four stars until it can automatically generate a ready-to-log routine from the AI Chat, where I don't have to go find the suggested exercises myself and manually create a log routine.

Generally like it, but it doesnt hold all machines found in a typical gym. It also doesnt update age for so I am forever the age I was when I first started. A monthly weight check-in would be useful. Also would love if it suggested the right stretches for each exercise set rather than having to start a new plan or manually search. I love a 20 day plan rather than 3 day repeats, but it doesnt allow to merge plans or to easily add exercises from other saved plans.

There is no 7-day free trial available if you choose to pay for the subscription, as the subscription starts on the same day. This information is not clearly stated on their app it s 7 days trial . I canceled my subscription on the second day, but the full amount for a one-year subscription was still deducted from my account. Despite sending multiple emails to their support team, I have not received any response. I do not recommend this app.

Do not download! It's a scam! I wish I read the other reviews mentioning the same problem. Your forced to sign up to use the app, so I started the trial and immediately cancelled the subscription to avoid being charged and then I got charged!, contacted them for a refund and there's no help from them.. disappointing and unfair. Oh and there's a lot of 5 star bot reviews!

Neither the human anatomy nor the dumbbells, barbells and gym equipment to shape it change over time; the movements are the same since people started working out. All a fitness app can do is vary the sequence of exercises and the number of repetitions a little -- which is too simple a functionality to justify bleeding customers dry with recurring subscription fees ad infinitum. A one-time purchase would be o.k., but competitor apps (or books) can be bought instead of rented. Uninstalled.

Good app with some flaws... The AI Feature isn't really useful imo, but I like the way an exercise can be replaced by another one, which works like a charm. On the other hand, it's not possible to go back and view other exercises, e.g. during a break, because this cancels the whole workout. The biggest flaw is, that the workouts cannot be synced with other Fitness Apps, such as Google Fit. I would REALLY apprechiate that feature...

I would say overpriced. The chatgpt feature is a gimmick. The lack of integration with wearable devices and with health apps is a bit of a joke given that competing apps have this with a lower price point. The lack of a voice prompt is another obvious miss. I do like the exercise list, and the ease with which you can sub out one you don't want to do. It is great that there are videos demonstrating the exercises. All said, this has a ways to go before being a truly premium app.

I've been using the free version of this app for a few months now and I really like the app and it's functions even for a free version but lately I haven't been able to use it. After you click start workout it pops up with the 2 pro version popups and after closing those it closes the workout to. Hope it's an easy fix cause I really enjoy the app otherwise.
I was first skeptical about this app. regardless I paid for the basic and kick-started . My core muscles cries in pain, sweat profusely within a short time span and my body is getting so well toned.

Even after paying for yearly subscription, the app keeps on asking to upgrade to pro. Do not purchase this app at all. I have lodged a complaint with google with the receipt of payment. Also, when you tap contact us, there is nothing, no email, no phone number. So, this app is basically to dupe people's money. I will make sure that this app is removed from google play store.
Hello. Why did you charge £11.99 from my PayPal account when I canceled my subscription the next day? You offered a 3-day free trial. Please refund my money immediately.
Amazing fitness app. Simple, effective, and free! this is the best fitness app i've ever used
I use this app for a while now. I really like the variety of exercises. It was exactly what I was looking for as I needed to change my exercises

first they proposed 80% discount I was thinking to maybe try it. but cancelled the subscription before trial ended and they penalty me with 70% discount now. guys that is not motivating me to buy it. if you want it this way - giving you 1 star and waiting for 90 % discount, how bout that?
I love being able to track all my workouts with this and I really enjoy how I can pick or AI will if I want different options. it's a really great without partner👍🏼

It forces you to pay...after the first workout you can see the second but it won't register and once you try to do so, it pops up the free trial and you can't register your workout, neither can see the others, the app is great, but too expensive, it's an AI not a real personal trainer, which is cheaper than the app in my country, I got the app exactly to not hire one lol
Great app. I wish you could add custom exercises that aren't in the exercise library.
seems awesome so far!! this app has exactly what I was looking for. I can choose each muscle and what machine I want to use. it's perfect!!
good app, helpful for beginners. only issue app crashes mod workout more than once.
Don't ask me a lot of questions and then shove a subscription in my face. Warn us first and I want to test drive something before I buy. Ask after like a week or something.
Would be better if actual exercise videos were there. Also, it should suggest plans and excerise changes with time and progress, which it doesn't. Still needs work

update: per their request below, i emailed them for the third time. ----- original post: I signed up with a 3 day free trial ; however, I was charged for the entire month that very same day. I contacted them via email and it appears that they're refusing to refund me my money.... this is a SCAM.
I love this app and I just wish they'd have a voice command tools or options and also like a voice prompt for time and etc.
Awesome app. modify workout to target specific areas. Tracks muscle gain and results, shows all muscles being workes with each exercise.
Great app. Just wish there was a function that allowed you to filter the exercises based on difficulty level.
I got charged a weekly amount even though there is a 3 day free trial. I cancelled my subscription. This is unethical.
Its functionality is limited, you cannot return to the program you were working on, and it is not user-friendly. It's useless.

It is really cost effective when compared to other apps that require a subscription. Love the fact that I can change the programs to my lifestyle. Takes some time to set up, but once done... you have a plan to work on for a while before being able to change in upping your game. It is simplistic and practical. Other apps have too many bells and whistles where here, I can focus on a routine that suits my needs and changes as life changes. Well done!

I purchased the app for 1 year, and everything was working fine. Suddenly, without any warning, the application went back to trial mode and asked me to pay again for something that I still have almost 1 year of use for. I sent an email to support about the problem with evidence of my purchase but there has been no response. Lack of respect.

Good App, enjoy the functionality of being able to customise workouts as you go, and the demonstration of how to do the exercise with correct form is useful. One thing I cannot find is a place where I can record general comments from the workout, eg. How you were feeling that day, or why you swopped out an exercise etc. Please assist?

Im using the premium features and it's not better than any other fit app out there. It sure tracks your reps, the weight you lift and suggests exercises to work different muscles and not repeat the same thing over and over, however it creates only 3 types of routines: build muscle, tone or lose weight and in neither of those it includes recuperation or stretching, mobility or flexibility. It would be great to add time available for workouts as a parameter too.

The unpaid version of the app just stopped working after about 3 months. I can still edit routines, but there is no way to log workouts. It goes straight to the paywall. There is no mention of a limited time to use the unpaid version. I tried to use just the unpaid features, but it seems that the moderators or the supposed AI blocks users from logging workouts.

A gimmick. I used the pro version for 1 month. During this time I found the workouts targetting muscle groups to be inconsistent, and often times not enough. Honestly not worth it. I opted for an app that let's me import and key in programmes I found online for free. The gpt chat was pointless and no better than what you get with the chatgpt official app.

I've been using this app for months and I don't need anything else for what I do. I travel a lot and I don't always have the same equipment or a gym available. - i can generate workout based on the muscles rest conditions - i can select what kind of equipment I want to use dynamically and it generates workouts based on that - it has statistics and integrated AI, although it would be great if the chat can be better integrated with the app to fetch data and generate exercises from my prompt

In the app, while purchasing yearly plan, they show offer banner valid for 5 min, for the price 999 INR for 1 year, but while doing the payment using gpay, its asking full amount 4999 INR. Why are you showing such false information, is that offer cannot be applied? Also when I clicked on Contact Us, to share this feedback. It doesn't show any text box, but just an info text "select something to share" and not allowing customers to enter anything.

The best Fitness App I've used. I love the visuallisation of the muscle group, and the recovery percentage. It looks really cool. Plus all sorts of workouts, bodyweight, full gym or what ever tools you have. Also you can add your runs, sprint, stretches to capture all your workouts, so you can see your body and muscles %. It would be great if, you can improve the following to make it even better: 1. Add adjustable timer countdown, including sound 2. Able to copy time and reps for each sets.
Worst!!!! They say there's a free trial of 3 days but then they charged you since the first day of sign in. Pls give me my money back 😡

once you get the customized workouts it's impossible to actually start the workout. the ads for the trial and payment keep popping up. I wouldn't mind if once you close them they go away but they don't and then you can't even start your workout! cost is too high for me to pay.

Best fitness app for me, so far! If I don't have equipment or if I want to do a different exercise, same muscle group, app provides SEVERAL alternatives. The timer/rep count/logging is in one place, so logging is simple & quick. Previously saved exercises with weight/reps is saved and auto populates when you repeat the same exercise in a different session. First program generated for me was perfect considering time, goal, experience & limitations 🥹. Not sure if the app has HIIT workouts. ❤️

Subscription auto renewed today despite not even being able to access the full app for the last few months (assumed Subscription had already ended) and now can't cancel anywhere in app and still can't access full app either! Have emailed through app but no response yet. Can somebody please remove the £94.99 pending transaction from my account please as this has caused me financial difficulty!

I have a regular gym goer over had a year off and starting again feel like a beginner and before I downloaded this I found myself in a very lost and confused plays without knowing where to start from. This app felt like someone got me by the hand and instructed me step by step. It's incredibly good for only a small amount of money yearly. Luckily I got the £25 per year deal instead of £94 or no way i would have installed it. It even let's you replace exercises but you don't like using AI. 👌
I paid for a year. After 6 months the app is blocked, I should pay more to continue. No communication works. I do not know how to solve.
paid for service, but unless you keep app open the entire time the rest periods dont alert you.
I'll give reasonable answers when I have done some exercises and the body shape is well excellent 👌

The worst. Hard to navigate. impossible to edit or change up routines. 100% impossible to cancel after trial. I have sent several emails to the developers and I have yet to hear back. At $99 this is crazy! I'd like a refund. Can some one please respond and process!!!! It's been months!!!!!
too much haye in descriptions and the the keyboard blocks the whole box if you wanted to type in it yourself
I cancelled my subscription after 1 week and there is no refund as they give me wrong program like 🙃 nothing I need my refund I pay 380 aed for nothing
You cannot test the platform without paying or see different workouts to know if this app is good for you or no.

I subscribed for a month, and here is my feedback. Pros: 1- Logs your workout nicely, but it is not the only app that does so. 2- It provides a somewhat decent library of exercises 3- It highlights the percentage by which each muscle is targeted per exercise Cons: 1- The muscle groups targeted are inconsistent. On a shoulder day, you get zero shoulder exercises and many back ones. 2- AI assistant is of no added value 3- It recommends exercises for muscles that are not recovered.

The best app for gym routines. They made a great exercise collection. I was looking for the app that will allow me to create routines and will have all the exercises I need. I tried every single app on play market and I can say that this app have the largest exercise collection (3700 against average 300-500). And every single exercise has video 🤯 Also love that recover feature, super useful. And overall app design is beautiful and practical! Bought the yearly subscription, it's definitely worth

Auto planning is great and you can replace each exercise if you don't have necessary equipment or want to do a different exercise targeting the same muscle groups. But there is no way to manually enter workout information or edit a finished workout. So to track your stats you need to be chained to your phone during a workout, mark the sets while the app wants to time each exercise and hope the workout timer stays correct. That's not for everyone and neither for me.

Essentially asks a couple of extremely basic questions, then suggests a bunch of seemingly entirely random exercises. While I'm trying to figure out if there's any way to get it to configure it with the exercises I actually want to do, gives me a fomo pop-up about a lifetime subscription that expires in 5 minutes. No discernibly useful functionality here.
What we all need, even if support isn't really responsive and the app has a few bugs here and there.
excellent application..it has everything you need to organize training..a good reminder and a visually beautiful display of exercises

It only let's you do the first day of the workouts unless you go Pro. You can't create any plans, add any excercises other than pushups or pullups, and can't even use the Ai generator. That is not a bad thing on its own, just it's annoying that they say that can be used for "free" when it's not. I would have never bothered downloading it in the first place.

I love how it helps me to choose training sequence according to my need. Instructions are easy to follow with personal weigh lifting exercises come in various ways. There are options for type of exercises, either for beginner or for pro. Also have inside timer and stopwatch to help measure each exercise we take. So far I've been subscribe for 3 years. Oh if you cancel subscription, they will offer you great discounted price.
Love it! Could include some HIIT workouts in empty workout options.
There are very good workouts in it and I got a lot of benefit from these workouts.

EDIT: I figured out how to adjust our workout plan, went to sign up and YIKES - they seem to raise the price of entry as days go on (over 30% since I installed). My original review stands-great app with an annoying and increasingly expensive nag screen. /// The app successfully walked us thru our first time back to the gym - it allowed me to add warmup and cooldown exercises for each day and add to the basic three day routine I chose as the template to work from. No errors or discrepancies.

I set my workout duration to 30 minutes, but the AI creator still generates only one 25‑minute cardio session and then adds a bunch of strength exercises, which makes the total workout almost 1 hour. The user interface also isn’t very intuitive or user‑friendly. It would be great if the app could better respect the selected workout time and improve the overall UI experience.

I want to go to the gym regulair, I want to make progress, but i don't care / no interest in what muscle i train today. This app gives me everyday good exercises. you see for every excercises when you last did that one, how many reps and the weight, very ease in use! for me the best app, because it gives me what i need. to reach 5 star from me: make a good website version so check the provided excercises on a browser version iso a small smartphone screen!

I like the app so far, but there is one real pain that should be easy to fix: when the exercise is based on time, you have to manually start a timer beside the exercise... It's very bothersome to do for every single set... I wish there was a way to have a timer start automatically for every set with bells when starting and done

Never done a review before but this app has done it. I thought it was cool at first and was able to do one workout ... one 40 minute workout. Thats it, after you do one workout they lock out of the rest of the workouts unless you pay 134 dollars a year for things you can search up on your own. Dont pay for this app dont even install, waste of time, waste of space you're better spending the money you would on this app for a gym membership and get better results

It's not bad. Makes no sense that it has stretching as options to load manually l, but the AI doesn't put pre-workout stretching into your routine for the muscles you are working that day. The point is to have a workout plan put together by AI, and it's missing the most important parts of the process.

It might as well just be glorified exercise encyclopedia. It isn't even considered as a planner when the functions are locked behind a pay wall. I thought that it was cool at first that this app would help plan our routines for the week but I can't even use the basic functions after day one. I don't recommend this app if it can't make the most basic functions of help us plan our routines.

Functionality that all logged exercises are deleted if you forget to tap Finish button is very user unfriendly in my opinion. App didn't save my progress, and customer care doesn't exist to help. I think there is much cheaper and better apps than this one. I am really sorry I bought one year subscription, I wouldn't do it again.

The suggested plan makes no sense, exercises repeat on the same session, replacement are not saved for the following week. somehow in a 5 days plan, some muscle groups are missed out completely. I contacted the support, heard nothing back. I'm always happy to pay for a good app but this is the most useless wasted money I ever spent on an app 😞

it is a great up with a great demonstrations. however, I would recommend enabling the demonstrations to be zoomed in or to be maximize to full screen so that those who are new to the gym can see the form they must maintain when working out much closer than the smaller sized demonstrations that are currently available... otherwise, this is a great app. keep up the good work
