playStoreReviews.text: used this for years now. it's good. it needs more though. it needs to have moon phases, would help for those who keep track of it, be it for gardening/farming, photography, sky gazing, etc. also would be nice to have the option to add holidays from other cultures as not everyone solely celebrates only the ones shown. it would also be nice if there were more customizable color choices for the memos. no real complaints. I like that you get notifications for your memos as well.

I have been a GOOGLE CALENDAR user for years and absolutely love it! My only issue is I wish you all would add more colors to it. I know there is about 10 but I would really love to see more. I have 7 people to keep up with, and it is so much easier if I can color code all of it. but right now some of it has to go to the default color. Or maybe get symbols to add for Drs Appt, Birthday, Holidays, etc.

Correct Date Please! I hate leaving a bad review, but, when I look at the calendar I'd like to see the correct Date. Every day the calendar shows "31". There isn't even 31 days in June and it is stuck on that date. It wasn't always like this. w When I went to update the app all it did was ask if I wanted to remove the last update. I'll come back and add to this review if it starts working again.

Gets worse with every update. Now when I want to add people to a calendar item, I actually have to type their entire email address before Calendar "finds" the person. I don't happen to have the email addresses of all of my contacts memorized - do you? I used Google AI for extensive troubleshooting on this issue. have tried at least 10 suggestions. None of them worked until performed the suggested "uninstall updates." I guess now I need to stop Play from updating Calendar.

It seems that every other time I try to add a new event to my calendar, simply nothing happens. I click the date and the add button 10+ times, but nothing pulls up to create an event. Haven't found any way around this, makes having a calendar that you can't update an extremely dissatisfying experience. Very surprised to see such an issue from a Google app, and I don't want to switch to any other.

[new logo sucks] it's a calander. the planning options and notifications options are cool but it definitely needs more for events/holidays. not everyone celebrates the same stuff ^^; also I'd like for descriptions of holidays to show up when you click on them cuz i don't know all of them. I use it for most of my planning and it's an overall good app though. I'm only giving this low of a rating cuz I don't like the new logo. it looks weird.

I decided to try another calendar after having used Samsung's calendar. Google's works great, however I found it doesn't suit my needs. I rely on the alarm alerting me when an event is upcoming to ensure I'm prepared in time. Google's calendar alarm is limited to a single chirp which goes easily unheard if the phone isn't within immediate reach, and as a result, a couple events have been missed. The longer, continuous alarm requiring a swipe to close (or the choice of alarms) is more reliable.

The Google calendar is excellent. It's easy to set schedules and a breeze to edit. One thing I like about it is the ability to set up to five reminders of upcoming events. It's simple to customize the reminders, and they can be set for minutes, hours, days, and weeks. I appreciate being able to see an individual day or the entire month. Between the Google calendar, Alexa, and Google home I'm no longer forgetting appointments and schedules for each day. I love it!

The Google calendar app's widget needs a "back to this month" button! When I swipe over from my home screen to look at the "quick glance at this month" Google widget, and then go 10 months ahead to check appointments, I can't snap right back to this month like I can on the regular Google Calendar app. There's plenty of space at the top of the widget calendar for it. Please put one up there like the app version has! I like Google overall and don't want to change to Samsung's default calendar :(

I looove this app a lot! From scheduling my to-do list up to my business stuff. I just don't know if this is an issue on my phone but sometimes when I will add a task, it will randomly have glitches. Like, when i select the 'All day' option, the 'task' will be converted as 'event' or when I click 'save', nothing happens.

This app mostly works well and made it easier for me track many things. Recently, a defect seems to have crept in. When trying to add guests to an account, this app is not able to find contacts based on name or nickname stored in the contacts. It's expecting exact emails to be entered even though it has permissions to access contacts and could add people by nicknames in the past.

Incredibly frustrating. Full screen only is annoying. I can't click on the day of the month without it opening up onto my whole screen. Give us a half screen option that shows the entries below when a day is clicked and doesn't take away the whole month view. I like to be able to count the month out, eg how many pay days before this bill is due etc but it just keeps opening up! When you try to create a calendar entry it defaults to all day and I find it so hard to figure out how to set a time.

For the last few days, every time I click on the calendar to add an event, it switches which Google Account the event is created in! I have two accounts on my devices, and the primary one is always shown in the account switcher when I open the Calendar app. but the minute I click on the calendar to add an event it switches to the other Account and starts creating the event in the wrong account. this is infuriating! In years of using this app this has never happened before now.

While recently searching for a past event, I realized that my calendar only shows events from 2019 to present. I document EVERYTHING in my calendar for a valid reason and to not be able to access it is frustrating. Overall, I am not entirely pleased anymore. UPDATE 25-Mar-2025: I had searched for an event and specific details. I've notice that only reoccurring events are saved, and anything prior to February 2024 has been deleted. I am livid because I cannot obtain or remember that information!

There is no way to set a default view to open each time you launch the app - instead, it returns to whatever random view you were in when you closed the app. Also, you cannot use the phone's back buttons to return to the previous view/screen to exit back from day view into week/month view. Also, you cannot create a reoccurring event on the last day of the month. It has to be set to a date. With some months having 28-31 days, a single date is useless.

Time zone support faulty. I can no longer trust my appointments. Scheduled events made during daylight saving time, have all been shifted an hour. I see "Pacific Daylight" on those, but changing the zone doesn't fix the problem. Selecting "Pacific Standard" results in "Alaska Daylight" showing - what the heck? Changing the time doesn't correct the graphic day representation. It's like there was no testing of this feature. Please reverse this change. It used to work fine.

I just attempted to make events for a yoga teacher training that went every other week, Friday, Sat & Sunday on my Pixel tablet. I made the first event on Friday, complete with the custom repeat. Then to save a few taps I duplicated the event, thinking I would not have to do the repeat again, it would still be repeating for 5 times like the first. I set the date to Saturday, changed the times and hit save. The first occurrence did not appear on the correct date! The reply isn't helpful. Bug!

I have been using this calendar for as long as I can remember. But my problem remains the same. The widget color. I prefer bright vibrant colors that match my phone's theme and wallpaper. I am a big fan of minimalistic looks. So I prefer AMOLED black for my widgets. But Google calendar uses a very strange color system that makes everything a bit dark and dim which makes any and all colors look very ugly. please look into this. Give us the option to change our widgets color to our own liking

Better before the limited colour options. I have used this for ages and always liked it and the ability to add appointments from emails etc. But the limited colour palette with the new update is in my opinion a mistake. The are more types of events than three, the colour of events and tasks are too similar. No longer good for people with colour blindness.

Viewing and printing are now two different things. I'm on MacAir. Suddenly there are many more colours to chose from. I've stuck - as much as I can - with my original colour scheme. However when I print out, for example, beetroot, cherry, mango, or pistachio - they are all blue. (All the appointments - regardless of the colour assigned to them) have a blue square top left. The calendar was fine as it was. Not now. I'll be looking for another calendar

Sometimes it breaks and won't open anymore at all. I need to uninstall all updates and reinstall. So annoying. Third time this month. Edit: I tried clearing cache and all storage before but it didn't work, that's why I uninstalled the updates and reinstalled them. After that it "worked" for some time until the problem arose again. Edit 2: Happened again today, app doesn't respond and can't be opened anymore. Clearing cache solved nothing.

Not really an issue with the app itself, works fine for my needs, really just not used to using it. I'm old, I like a calendar hanging on the wall, with a large squares to mark down appointments and holidays. This year we didn't receive new calendars with our Christmas bonuses, and I'm almost non-functional without it. This will hopefully replace it 4 months into a New Year, but I doubt it. Again, just not really used to using and relying on it yet.

This is my go-to calendar app for juggling multiple calendars. Color coding of calendar events is a great function, and I noticed the increase of available colors. 25 is a lot. i would appreciate the ability to choose which colors I would allow for any calendar, or to pick and even label favorites.

Google Calendar and the Google Calculator are both incredibly useful apps, but I really think Google needs to redesign their logos to make them more distinct. Every single time I try to open the Calculator app, my finger automatically goes to the Calendar app instead. I constantly find myself having to close out of Calendar just to go back and open the Calculator. A more distinct visual difference between the two icons would completely fix this muscle memory mix-up.

Any chance of having the entries "text wrap" and take up more lines in the box, displaying more info, if there aren't any other events for that day - on the month view. The Samsung calendar does this. Minor thing but makes a difference when glancing at the calendar. It's the only thing I miss about my Samsung phone after having switched to a pixel.

Good calendars and layouts i like the notifications for tasks and meeting Locations. Recently I've noticed that the icon on the home page has become, in my case, 31. I'm not sure if that's because that's the last day of this month or whether it will always be 31. It used to have the current date as the icon and that was quite handy. However, it is a small gripe, I suppose, but it probably drops it a couple of stars.

the last update now means I cannot seem to set a colour outside defaults. I use the calendar app in a very basic way. I don't need or want, 1 ) more than one calendar 2) to invite others to share my calendar 3) to sync my calendars across multiple devices. It seems however that a simple requirement like assigning a different colour to an entry from default is a step too far now without changing all entries. I may have missed something but that seems to be the case

Super love the addition of new colors for events! I use them to categorize my subjects in uni so everything stays organized, and I don’t miss any deadlines. I hope Tasks also gets a color-changing feature! I’m definitely part of the target audience for this update, especially since I mainly use my phone, where some features are still limited compared to the laptop or desktop version.

Not sure what happened when they did their last update on June 25th, 2026. Everything in my calendar is color-coordinated for each child's sports, doctor's appointments, parenting time, and so on. Now when I add something new, the calendar only allows me to use the blue default color. This needs to be fixed.

Google you have chg your calendar app. Now, I have to predetermine the colors in the settings. After which I can't chg anymore. But my preference is to have different colors for diff events within the calendar. Previously I can select the different colors inside the calendar but not now and all I see is the predetermined colors!! You should improve something for the better not worse (new chg). The new change is lousy and sux!!

The last updat kill it for me. Before, reminders could be set aside and those tasks not yet completed would remain in the exclusive list. Now they're all mixed up up with other appointments and they get stuck to the original day, so, I have to scroll up and down till I find all of them and am never sure I got them all.

Works great for anything I need to schedule, appointments, birthday's, tasks to complete, and events I need to be reminded of...this calendar is on my cell phone and it's convenient, easy to use and keeps records of tasks or events completed! Works great for me!

Functional and simple. It could use an upgrade with the color options. If you like to color code like me, there are very few boring colors to choose from and some are to similar making it difficult to distinguish between. Otherwise the app does as it should and is easy to use!

All events added for periods of time during daylight savings while not in daylight savings aren't corrected for daylight savings. Obviously if I add an event during daylight savings it should be assumed to be in daylight savings time not standard time, just because I added the event in January for a time in June edit. these are quite possibly the most useless suggestions.

The latest "upgrade" has messed with international travel. Example: When in Florida I made a number of calendar entries related to our upcoming trip to Europe. A restaurant was reserved for 7pm British Summer Time. And set as BST in my calendar. Of course, when in Florida it showed as 2pm in my calendar. But, on arrival in the UK, and the new time showing on the phone, it should now be at 7pm on the calendar. No longer the case. Every appointment and reservation has to be manually moved

Best of all calendars. I use Microsoft 365 Classic Outlook Calendar, Apple Calendar and Google Calendar. Google Calendar is easy-to-use, has useful view options, notifications, and best and most useful number of fields. Able to add custom label descriptions. EXCEPT no recurring last day of month option. Otherwise Excellent! But blue icon is boring, prefer the red, yellow, blue, green, Google four color rainbow palette.

when trying to change the color of an event, it doesn't work anymore. The options still show up, it just does nothing when I try to select a color, as if the app didn't notice what I'm touching. Anyone else having the same issue? It worked perfectly a few days ago.

Update 1 July- Thanks for listening to everyone, Google. The new range of colours are a great addition to the calendar.June '26 -Best calendar in my opinion. So helpful for me to keep up with family events. Able to add different colours for different purposes - though I'd like to see a few more colours added as it's been years with the same ones. Able to share with others if needed. Love that locations show pictures and maps. Nothing else needed for me, except more colours. Thanks Google. 😀

I have this as my default calendar widget, and I'm generally happy with it, but when you share/sync an external calendar to the calendar (like Outlook), there is no option to change the calendar color. we need that option!

I wanted to switch accounts because my latest accounts were deleted (deliberately by me, ofc). but I couldn't. No matter what Gmail accounts I registered (those that weren't the latest & were verified by me entering the passwords). It just won't budge. Adamant that it must be my latest accounts (it says "you're not probably signed in"). 🙄🙄🙄

I love it, but I can't turn the widget dark. I used to use to calendar apps because I wanted a dark widget, but I got tired of having two notifications all the time. Plus this is the better app. It's a great calendar, but the white widget doesn't go with my dark-mode phone. That's why I gave it four stars. If Google changed the option to have dark mode, it would receive five stars.

the best calendar app according to my 15 years experience with lots of different calendar apps. it really improves my work. other calendar apps wasted my data by losing sync, deleting backup, etc. google calendar never loses anything. remembers my last settings, too. many many thanks.

The calendar works perfectly.🗓️👍 But I will like it if it can include yearly view from the settings so that I can be able to view all the months in a year at once, it will be good so that I can stop marking my hard copy calendar at home to know when we're in the middle of the year, and what is next. Using monthly calendar in slide is good but the yearly view will be better. Once we have it in settings then I can check mark it, and check it when needed Thank you..

Lovely to look at, delightful to know! I am new to the Android universe and I must say the calendar app really impressed me. The colors in different organizing views are designed to be calming and the fonts are easier to read than on my iPhone 17 Pro (now sold). Special thought is put into the calendar app so that it is pleasing to the eye. This encourages individuals to use it more and life gets better when one takes care to put in reminders of things coming soon or documenting life.

It's nice minus all the spam messages I keep getting in the middle of the night reminding me to renew the memberships I don't have. These spams are suggesting 500 dollar renewals which is crazy. These are obvious scams. I have been getting these spam messages at least once a week now. it's getting very annoying. So Google, please fix this security issue. Thank you very much.

Have used for years without problem, but a few months ago something happened to the time zone and now all my events keep showing the wrong times, I have changed the settings so many times, but I am still finding events with the wrong times, in fact it's become so much of a problem I am going to look for a new calendar.

I really like the minimalist and elegant UI design of all Google apps, which gives me an excellent experience. But Google Calendar keeps crashing on my vivo Y76s (OriginOS Ocean, PD2156_A_5.22.30). It crashes immediately when opened from Google Play Store. When launched from the home screen, it shows the calendar page briefly and then shuts down. If possible, I hope to know how to create birthday events on the desktop web version of Google Calendar first

in the last few days, the app doesn't start, even after cleaning cache/storage. only uninstall/install (update) helps. I rolled back to the original version that came with my phone, no issues so far. NUBIA Z80 ULTRA, LATEST ANDROID the recommended link with Google Calendar Help Community is totally useless.

It's very great app to use! Easy, convenient, smooth. You can organize your schedules easily, set or edit times. Also you can enable notification for reminding event minutes, hours or even days before. You can see vacations/events for your country directly in this calendar app which is awesome.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Google Calendar is one of the best productivity apps for organizing schedules, reminders, and events. The interface is clean, syncing across devices is fast, and sharing calendars with family or coworkers is simple. Smart notifications and integration with Gmail make planning much easier. It would be even better with more customization options and improved offline features, but overall it's a reliable and essential app for staying organized. Highly recommended!

The app works great and does what its supposed to. I would like an option to add a note so I can keep track of things since not everything classifies as an event, a task, or a birthday. Sometimes, a simple note would work.

bloatware and abuse of market position. my phone already has a built in calendar. It wasn't showing my appointments. Turns out Google automatically installed their own calendar and it wouldn't let me add my calendar to Samsung one until I deleted the Google one. Google need to stop abusing their market position by force installing ALL of their apps on your phone just because it's an android. Dishonestly making it look like they have a bigger number of users of these apps than they actually do.

Been using app for years. For whatever reason, app won't save to specific days and times I'm requesting. For example; What I need=Task to begin at 7:20am, June 29th, 2026 to August 30th, 2026.
