Such an easy and convenient way to book and keep track of my clients appointments. Also receipting all my services, honestly it's been a god send. My clients have even commented how professional the emails they receive are. Absolute 10 out of 10!!!! I'm over the moon.

The calendar shows today as Dec 11, when it's actually Dec 12. And when you look to upgrade, the pricing is more than double what the pricing is on the website, which is baffling. On the website I can sign up with Pro for one user for $60 a year and on the app it's called "premium" for $139 a year? This app doesn't give me confidence with my business. I am pretty happy with the features, simplicity and wonderful look of Setmore for booking. Just not the app.

The app is very good... makes your day very organized. I love that it shows your weekly income. Those with financial goals can easily see if they are on target. It's easy to make appointments, etc. My main pet peeve is the inability to schedule more than one service for a client. It's too time consuming AND for clients, it can be very frustrating. If it can be done online I am sure there is a way it can be integrated into the app as well. Why should a client be able to do it but not staff.

My absolute favorite scheduler! This has been my go to since 2016 and I have to say no other app I've found holds a candle to this one. Yes, to get even more amazing features you need to become a premium member; but its not necessary for 4 or less schedules. The only thing I would ask is that when making a slot blocker; please allow to choose multiple dates. Eg) booking a substantial amount of time off for a holiday or recurring day off.

Very poor experience with both the app and customer service. We are having a major issue with customers booking appointments, and it is creating real problems for our business. The issue happens in the app and also on two different browsers, which should have been enough for customer service to take it seriously. Instead, they brushed me off and blamed my browser. They did not properly investigate. They did not test the issue. They did not ask enough questions to understand what was happening
every 2 days I am having to update. it use to not be that way. Bit much every 48 hrs other than that its ok.

essential future updates should include options to book multiples of the same service per client. consolidate services into one booking slot for efficient reminders and checking out. it is currently sending out multiple reminders if client books more than one service and when the service is done, I have to check out each and every services. it does not consolidated the bill.

(1) No discount voucher feature. (2) Cannot link to Service Categories. (3) No customisations for booking page except button colour! (4) cannot use Stripe for app and PayPal for booking page. The good: (a) excellent app design. (b) reviews include Google reviews. (c) Can link to an individual service. (d) Web version design is also good. (e) cost is good. (f) integrates with Mailchimp. Overall Setmore is a good service for the money, just wish the devs would fix these basic functions!

disappointing service, after paying a pricey yearly subscription and having the system work properly, Setmore changed sms notification for clients to be available only for specific countries, excluding Poland and not informing the users about it. Unable to clarify what happened when I flagged SMS are not coming, it took their support A WEEK to get back to me with truth, but is happy to charge for a full subscription anyways. Stay away from this platform as it is disappointing and nothing else.

For a paid app it's buggy as hell. Been reporting stuff for ages and sending screenshots and their support keeps asking for calls, which is ridiculous because who has the time for that?? I keep getting such simple errors like the display in app widgets not reflecting accurate appointment details, refreshing just gives diff info each time, still getting a bothersome request to "get early access" despite me asking to not be bothered anymore (this should have a don't ask me again button obviously)

All is well until the most recent update. Instead of checking all appt for the whole day through widget, you can only check appt for one particular staff. Widget bird eye view is useless. The apps can't be opened by tapping any part of the widget unlike previous version. The widget layout display is not as clear as before. Update: now my clients details disappeared randomly and the update can't be saved. I have to guess who's coming for the next appt

MUST READ IF YOU RESPECT YOUR CUSTOMERS PRIVACY & SECURITY. Joined the beta to test out some features and surprisingly the beta version is worse than the one available in playstore. You won't get to see activity, no app notifications. Contacted support for it, and was surprised when he shared screenshot of my full account including activities that happened. So basically if you have stored your customer phone, email or any other personal information,setmoe customer support can fully access it.

We've been using setmore for a long time. This last update with a 3-day agenda is complete rubbish, I am amoungst others who cringe at using it now. It is frustrating and confusing and takes time to see your daily activities. Also, the 3 clicks to get an address is not user-friendly for people on the go. It was better 10 years ago when we were handed out a printed a4 job sheet.

I hate the app update! I wish I could have the calendar back to what it was, and in customer back in order. In the services area, I can't reorder which service category to go where. When adding a service, their is no part where I can add pictures for my service, only on desktop site. When making an appointment the option is to pick 1 service only. I MISS AND WANT BACK THE OLD VERSION. AT THIS POINT SETMORE ISN'T MAKING SENSE AND WILL CHANGE TO A DIFFERENT BOOKING SITE.

Awesome app. Just losing cleints with new version, because in the older version clients went to the calendar to book and the time slots were visible. In the new version, they have to scroll down on the calendar to see time slots. Many clients just say: There was no time slots available. They don't know that they must now scroll down.

Velue of money, reliability, easy to use but it doesn't have SOAP notes or intakes form. Which is really needed for massage therapists, or other practitioner. I'll come back to give 5 start once they have what I mentioned above. Update : I would highly recommend this app for a anyone need just an appointment app for their business. It's one of the best user friendly apps in the market.

At first I gave this app 5 stars now its 3 for me because I am not liking the performance of this type of calendar.. I prefer the old one.. I can't see the labels without clicking on an appointment.. and the calendar keeps scrolling pass where I want it to go.. its running too much. I can't see myself using this for too much long because I get uncomfortable using it with this new look sigh.

When rescheduling app sends wrong times in confirmation email for company and customer. Times in company email, even when wrong still didn't match in timing. So there was 3 different times between company and the client. Also was having trouble with showing hour time slots and half hour slot times on calendar. Otherwise it is a pretty decent app. Please fix bugs in for optimal functionality

The updated version of this app killed a lot of the functionality that was offered in the old version. I used to have my push notification appointment reminders push through an hour before the appointment start time. In the new app version, the reminder is default set to 15 minutes before the appointment, it actually come through about 12 minutes before the appointment start time, and there is no way in the app to adjust when the reminder pushes through. The app update sucks.

Sensational! But what's even better than the app is the support crew. They are amazing and worked through any issues(self-inflicted) I had. Since getting Setmore up and running, we have seen a huge increase in appointments that extend through the following week now. We paid for the premium edition and it's turned out to be a real investment. I would guess we have freed up around 2 hours a day manually inputting appointments timed. Thanks to the support crew for all your help and patience.

*updating review. I emailed customer support and they fixed the bug. You guys are awesome!!! Thank you!!!! I got a new phone and I can't log in anymore. I usually log in through Facebook and it's not working. Please fix or let me know how to fix it. I have been using for a long time and have a lot of clients info I need to recover!!!

Overall it's no problem. But I'd like to request an improvement for on the mobile screen; on PC laptop I can see two team members's schedule of the day side by side but can't on the mobile app...In the future I hope to use multiple calendar columns for one-day view on mobile screens too. (Max two team members selectable is enough for me.)

The latest update sent the app backwards. Reminders no longer tell you the clients name, widget does not update. Still shows notifications for ALL updates for ALL barbers no matter what option is chosen. I only want MY updates. New updates make the app more intuitive, drag and drop awesome, now if the widget only worked...where is the option to show 1 Day, 3 Day on the widget? It shows the entire week... Other than that, good improvements! 👌🏾

The app is Good it have been improving a lot since I started but every time they update the app something like bugs happens. The system doesn't recognize if the email address is wrong. We can't save pictures by appointment. The app is very heavy customer complain about that. We cant set up how many slot we wish open with a specific start time. Eg I have different time service but I would setup fix time to customer ( 8am, 10am, 12pm etc..not leave customer pickup any time and make a messy.)

It's perfect for our barbershop. Would be good to have a multi-location option, and maybe some more advanced reporting capabilities, however, even without those it's a brilliant app for customers to manage, for our barbers, and also for overseeing all of the above.

The Good: their support staff are very responsive and can be very fast at bringing about a solution. The Bad : not having repeatable email fields in the booking page, this is standard and will prevent the headache of customers entering their email address incorrectly. The Ugly: rescheduling and cancellation periods are compulsorily shown on the booking page and cannot be customised. This makes the app close to worthless if you have different cancellation and rescheduling periods.

Very unhappy last two weeks ,setmore updated ! It was working perfect until the this update , I contacted customer care to report issues and still not resolved ! Emailed setmore also making a complaint as a customer care rep booked three slots on my system and failed to inform me which made me lose revenue! I'm so frustrated as the issue has not been resolved. Customers are reporting setmore will not accept there email and also the site is freezing .

I need repeating services WITHOUT an end date. Seems like a pretty simple thing to just eliminate the requirement to add an ending date to a recurring service. Best part is, I had to pay $35 just to figure out the app wouldn't work for me. Now I'm out $35 and I don't have a useful scheduling app.

I have lost money and I have sent them screenshots but they dont care. Right now Im losing money because the link doesnt work so none of my clients or potential ones can book. Also the customers who added profiles the system is mixing the clients phone numbers to other people account so Im messaging the wrong people. Setmore wont do anything about it. Find another app that doesnt mess with your money.

i have been using this app for 3years and all the sudden clients confirmation doesnt come through as email or notification on the app. And appointment my client confirm doesnt show up leads to double bookings. i have been try to reach to setmore support and they seem to have trouble understanding my issue and keep made me repeat. what is going on?

Doesn't help much with my business reality. The depoist info is confusing. Reminders on SMS and email can be sent at the same time only (no chance to send and email reminder 36 hours before the appointment and the text message 24 hours before the appointment). Also, if a client book different treatments for the same day in the following timing, the client receive one email for each treatment instead of one email with all the treatments booked for that especific day. I will change to another app.

The way the appointment reminders are set up make customers think it's you messaging them, so they are able to send a cancel reply to the number and you don't even know about it. Also, locating and printing annual reports is a pain in the butt. If you get this don't bother upgrading try using Vagaro it's much better for the same price.

Does what I need it to do. Not always easy to use and indonmit find the support quick enough or sometimes clear enough. For a non-tech like me, it is tricky and I am happy with it only because it does the bare minimum I need it to and I have a techy niece who I call often if I need to do something more with the app.

For the last week it's been saying something went wrong when I try to log in!! I can't access my bookings - how absolutelh frustrating! I hate how this app logs me out all the time. It works well in all other ways but gee this has actually caused me a loss

Last update deleted ALL OF MY PAST AND FUTURE BOOKED APPOINTMENTS!! Running a business, using this as a main scheduler!! What the heck happened!? So upset and super disappointed!! (I am a smart business person and have all appointments written down in at least 2 places if its not written in daybook). Super sad as this was an awesome app! I tried to book an appointment and it wouldnt even put it into the calendar😔

I've now been using this for 4 years and recommend it often. Would be better if Widget (and desktop) had options to display first name only for privacy, but that is a very small complaint to have. Suitable for single-practitioner or multi-employee setting. Good administrative controls. Good customer service. Good value.

This was once a good app. It is now a garbage app since they did the update. All the text is small and it is so much harder to navigate the app on the go. Before if I wanted to go to a customer's house I can just click the customers name from the widget and click the map button. Now I have to click like 4 times and the address automatically defaults to USA so I have to change it again when Google maps opens. It wasn't like this before the update. The app is just garbage now.

I have been heavily using this app for 2 years now and it works wonderfully for our business type (personal trainers.) We have 147 clients in 2 states with different session/class types and pricing. The app allows us to organize and track/book this way. I recommend looking at some setmore tutorials (which are available on their site) to learn how to set everything up. Also: all of my experiences with tech support have been OUTSTANDING. Wonderful cost also!!

I've been using this app for 2 years now without any hassles. However, since the last update, I can not go through to the Help Center. My major problem is that I don't have the option of sending Appointment Reminders via Whatsapp. It just goes straight to SMSs. In the previous versions, you had an option to choose which method you want to send Appointment Reminders through, and if I chose Whatsapp, it would take me directly to the client's chats on Whatsapp.

I use this for my CPR training business. It has a minimalist layout which makes it easy to use. Would be nice if a coupon code feature was implemented as well as a sidebar navigation of categories/subcategories along with multiple locations when booking classes. Other than that, it is the best free scheduler I've used so far! Thank you!

Great app, very smooth and reliable. Although the app seems to be lacking quite a few of features (because it is pretty new?) that would be considered as essential for many small businesses looking for implementing online booking, the staffs and people at Setmore are awesome to deal with and always willing to help. Personally, I am happy to stay and grow with them.

Okay, It's time to write you guys some pretty BAD REVIEW here. So I downloaded this app for free to run my small plumbing business and I had just 1 staff added in the setmore app. I was a bit convinced that this app could turn out to be useful for my business so I upgraded to the premium which cost me ¢82.25 per month. I tried adding at least twice staff to my new subscription only for the you guys to tell me I couldn't add any more staff. Not even 1 for a plumbing business like me? Scammed!

Used to be a REALLY good app before the last big update at the end of 2024, when they completely ruined it for seemingly no reason at all. Despise contacting their customer support multiple times over an endless amount of bugs and all the functionalities that disappeared, all I'm being told is "it's gonna be fixed during the next update", yet nothing has been fixed. Seems like some competitors bought the app and are trying to ruin it, because nothing they have changed make any sense.

I hate this update. I did not want the new version and this morning it was magically there. I can't find the option to uninstall the update so I'm livid. And the widget doesn't even work. additionally, it will intermittently tell me there are no time slots available when i have double booking enabled and I know damn well i have spots open.

So after my review below, Setmore has settled down and is much more reliable and stable. Much better now! Same as the reviews below. A great system. Get the issue fixed constantly 'fetching appointments' not allowing me to use it. Have uninstalled and reinstalled for no change. Needs sorting out.

Fantastic! I've been using this app for a year now it's brilliant. I've customised the features to my company colours, it syncs with my phone and Google calander and myself and my clients receive reminders 24 hours and 15 minutes before our meeting. I'm so pleased with this app; I highly recommend it to anyone.

Always something wrong. I half get notification reminders about my appointments which has caused a lot of missed appointments. Why would I pay when the free version is full of glitches? It works okay for what I need. It is supposed to sync with my Google calendar but it stops doing that all the time.

This app frequently logs out of session and the app will pop up randomly of it's own accord no matter what you are doing. Currently struggling to log in for the last few days. The app will show its logging in then stay at the log in screen. Setmore on desktop is amazing. Setmore the app is terrible.

I am switching from Schedulicity to Setmore because of Schedulicity being bought out. Setmore has been very easy to use and is very similar to Schedulicity - so no large learning curve! Prisha was wonderful in walking me through the software and answering all of my questions. She has also offered her email to be available if I ever have further questions. Excited to start using this product!

Paid for the annual fee, to be able to use the "repeat" button and it doesn't do very well. Keeps asking to upgrade the version, and never does. Not worth the money. But ok otherwise. For free, it was good. For repeat customers (cleaning service) isn't ideal.

Great app, very easy to setup. No issues however being forced to look about due to a few flaws that myself and customers do not like. Cannot record cash payments Customers cannot book multiple classes at once The biggest thing is that when you have classes available for booking but families cannot use the same email address, for example a family of 3 people need 3 email addresses to be able to book each person into classes. This is not great and causes extra work for me having to manually add

This is a terrible app once they updated the system the whole app was destroyed. I have lost thousands of dollars due to a glitch on their system because none of my clients were being notified of their appointments. I tried for over 2 weeks to fix this with their technical support and it never happened. Tactical support was not helpful as a matter of fact after a couple of texts they would just leave me hanging and not help me at all.

Excellent app; easy to use; quick responses to questions or issues; easy to integrate on my website so clients can book appointments; easy to manage from my phone so I don't have to boot my laptop up every time I want to check upcoming appointments; easy to connect my square account for payments and can activate to accept cash as well - easy to mark when someone's paid so that you know ....... I'm considering upgrading to a premium account when my sales pick up 😊

Prisha was an awesome demonstrator. The session for introducing me to the platform was great. There are so many features to this scheduling platform. The capabilities are most extensive and easy to use. You will certainly be able to optimize your customer load very well. I know this can be a major challenge for new businesses and well established ones too, so it can save you time and money. Thanks for creating such an important service for business owners.

I love it!! Would give it 5 stars if you could see a single day with all options for that day instead of having to click at top to check out the multiple options. Change that (which I have asked many times) and I will come back and change to 5 stars. But I definitely recommend as I switched from mind body to this and will never go back

I use to love this app but for the last week it won't come up on my phone. I've uninstalled and reinstalled it. I've contacted my ph company and it's still not working. It does work on my daughters ph but as to why it's no longer working on mine I'm unsure. Very aggravating!!!it just comes up to the greenish screen with the squares and freezes.

Good so far could be improved for example i don't have a link for my terms and conditions so could do with an option to add booking questions instead with a ticky box to accept them and also adding a way for customers to purchase things such as gift certificate would be ideal. Other then that I can't complain.

I've been using this for two years now AND LOVE IT. I actually use this to book customer appointments myself and don't give access to the calendar to keep a handle on my own time. I use this for a yearly maintenance company I own. I love how it connects to my google calendar, that customers get email and text alerts for bookings, as well asking customers to review after the maintenance work is completed. Any questions I have had have been answered VERY QUICKLY over live chat. Exactly what I need

Been using square to schedule appointments. Had all of my clients and their info entered and a month worth of appointments set up. Went to schedule someone and i was no longer logged in, for the first time in 9 months of using them. So I tried to just sign in. Repeatedly gave me an error code. Tried multiple emails. Had to change my password like 7 times when I'd try to login. Finally logged in and it was as if it was a brand new account! None of my appointments or clients are in there!

I used to love this app. My clients are no longer able to confirm or cancel appointments through their end if I schedule them myself, which is ridiculous. The address to my location also no longer shows up on their reminders. That feature needs to be returned, or unfortunately, I'm going to have to use another appointment app. Also, the links that were provided to "resolve" the issue don't load.... Customer service doesn't help much either.

Pretty good, but please make it easier to input new clients by just typing in their info when scheduling. Currently having to either import from contacts (which isn't feasible as they are never in my contacts) or go to the other square app, on which it gives an error message and try again later probably 75% of the time. All of my square apps are up to date. I just came to the app store to check, so I thought I'd leave feedback. More user-friendly, easier input of clients!

This app is semi-useful. In my industry, I'm not always charging a customer, or I already have a paid invoice. Appointments requires I add a service and a dollar amount for every appointment. I can't even put a service and $0. When I preform warranty work, or insurance work, I make an appointment with the customer and invoice someone else. Unfortunately, this means leaving the appointment out of Square Appointments leaving an opening in the schedule causing the risk of double-bookings.

CANNOT BOOK 24/7... I run my spa business from noon until 2AM, so my clients need to be able to book 1-hour appointments up until 1:00 AM. But this app will not allow my clients to book past 9PM. What is going on? I've been trying for the past week to figure this out, and I'm getting to the point of not using this app at all. I have reset my hours of operation and availability countless times and I still keep getting 9PM as the latest anybody can book. It's extremely frustrating!!!

Useless customer support. I asked a very specific support question about one of the functions in the app(after I searched the knowledge base) & got an automated email telling me that the app will be out soon & to download it from Play store! This wasn't even one of those automated emails that tells you a person would be getting back to me. This was my customer support response. They're either using an automated system that doesn't work, or they're using staff whose first language is not English.

Spent 48 minutes on the phone only to be hung up on by the rep who said "this call is becoming unproductive." I'd argue the entire call was unproductive. I'm having an issue with one clients profile & they couldn't fix it. Kept telling me my phone is outdated. I'd be more likely to believe them if the issue was occurring with the rest of my client profiles. This error is occurring on two different devices so no way both are outdated. Absolutely terrible troubleshooting and refused to escalate.

This app used to be great. However, they're starting to charge $30 a month just to sync it with your Google calendar, a feature that was free until a week ago, and won't even grandfather anyone in. I've used this service for 4 years, and they have made probably a collective 40k-50k off of me, now they need an extra 29.99 a month JUST so I can sync my calendar? Get bent. I'll give my money to someone else.

Good app, but it needs a lot of changes. I provide a service that requires consent forms to be signed,but with this app, the forms are sent to the customer AFTER they book leaving me to chase them down to complete them before their upcoming appt. This problem would be eliminated if the forms were completed BEFORE booking is finalized. Also, it would be much better to be able to view your calendar by the month vs the day or week. This would help business owners who need to plan ahead for clients

Without any kind of notification to its user base, Square decided to pull vital features that made me use it in the first place, and place them behind a $30 subscription paywall. No longer do my clients enjoy the confirmation text messages which reminded them of their appointments and a timely fashion, but also took away the no-show protection feature, which for a nail salon in this day and age is vital. I will be looking for other software. Square has all but lost me as a customer.

I have an android, but i know others with the apple app and it's not charging tax at checkout. if I go in the other square app tax works fine. I can't send reminder messages, or set up a set reminder. I would like to view the calender by the whole week not day and month. repeat appointments would be nice. Also a way to block personal time off and notes in the calender too.

On top of collecting pretty sizeable processing fees from credit card transactions, they now charge $30/mo for full functionality of their booking app. It feels like extortion. I switched to Square because PayPal had high fees, but no free booking app. I felt like the booking app was a fair trade off. Now, I might as well be using Google calendar for my appointments. I've had to go back to calling my clients to confirm appts. Definitely will be finding a new payment processor and scheduler.

This app is not compatible with my Samsung S24. I can not see transactions for a single client, from the" more menu." I have to calculate the tips myself. This operation works with iPhones but not with Android. Our salon is very busy and I don't have time to do this during the day, so it makes my job more difficult. Support has been contacted, and I haven't heard back. I am very disappointed, and I would not recommend this app to an Android user.

What happened to this app??... i used to love it, was very functional at one point. My clients are no longer consistently getting appt notifications, even when they do not it shows as "confirmed". Also, When creating a new contact from my address book it shows a generic phone number as opposed to pulling the number from the contacts as it used to before, so just to be safe i enter their number manually. Its just a hassle to use this app.

Was great at first. Free was nice! But, the past few months, scheduled appointments don't show up on the calendar, causing double booking. It randomly won't load my clients in the list. The app crashes 2-3 times a week and I have to "force stop" the app and restart it. Which is very inconvenient when I'm busy. As of now, the servers have been down for HOURS! In the middle of my work day. As soon as it's back up it will only be opened to copy my clients and phone numbers then UNINSTALLED!

Honestly, I think it is the best program I've ever used. On top of it is free and if you want to get fancy then you paid a small fee. Customer service is always readily to help. I don't understand why people complain about having issues. I've been using the app for 6 years with no problem. In the last 3 years, we got whole system point of sales. Everything works perfect with either of my phones, iPhone 14 and Samsung tablet 5. Even with older phones. Top knotch app. Get a reputable phone.

I've been using square appointments for a few months now. It's working out great for me but one issue my clients are having is when they are booking multiple appointments they can't book the same service more than once without having to start a new appointment. for example, if a mother is booking for 2 kids cuts, she can only book one then start again. That is annoying. Hopefully this is something that can be fixed.

I've been using this app for 3 years for my business and employees with no problemsat all.. until........ Every since the update the app no longer works. I offer online booking only for my business and now after the update the app no longer shows me when a client books. It won't let me block off time on our schedules for breaks. It won't let me book clients on my end. Constantly showing an error message when using the app now. Very upset and disappointed that this app no longer works. Fix it

This app is amazing! My clients are so happy and say its super easy to use! It does confirmation appointments automatically so I do not have to take more time away from my kids than I already do with work. The square appointments app tracks client info, allows you to have a cancellation policy and best of all is FREE!!!!!! This app has eliminated so much stress and extra side work for me it's perfect! Dont waste your time with other apps trying to make money off you! I do the square app as well!

I've been using it for a couple years. For the past few months,even after clearing the cache, uninstalling the app doesn't work. It freezes when trying to set appointments. I thought maybe it was compatibility of my phone, UT I checked it against another phone, it still doesn't work. I tried it on a 3rd phone with an older firmware version, and it still doesn't work. On top of that Square want to charge $30 a month for the system vs it being free, but no new features.

Is not that bad, it could be better. Here's something useful to implement. The app needs better integration with the invoices. Like if you already sent an invoice to a customer thru the invoices App and Later on you want an appointment for the same customer, you should be able to create the calendar event and then find the customer invoice and tie it to the event you just created. Remove the feature that forces you to Add a Service in order to create the event. Again works better if tied to invoi

I was excited when it first came out, but I feel like it's basically useless. I can't view customers or items/services because it says access denied - but when I login on the full website instead I have no issues, never have. Also I haven't seen a way to get text alerts for appointments made like with iPhone. Definitely needs a lot of improvements to be close to what people were expecting/needing.

Won't go over massive list of complaints but the latest one is square no longer sends me push notifications when appts are being made or changed. When I finally got an email back it's like the rep was answering another email not addressing my issue at all, and it's been another day and I have yet to hear back. Getting into my busy season, this is pretty important

I don't like that I don't get notifications from this app. I don't get any kind of notice when a confirmation text is sent, or left unconfirmed. I can't personalize confirmation texts either. There are appointment prep information that I can't get to my clients. This app also let me double book myself on a day. No flag or anything. I do like how I can manually charge cards through the appointment for a customer if they want to pay with card. Since the free card reader only works for iPhone.

It works, but they'll get you in and then browbeat you for more $. I've used this app to manage appointments for years, and suddenly they decided to leverage a monthly subscription fee on top of taking a % of transactions in fees. I opted not to "upgrade" (even though there's nothing new). Now it's nerfed my calendar full of appointments for May/June that were booked way before any of this. And I don't want to hear it about "inflation." These companies are making record profits.

I love the ease of navigation and the convenience of the app, making appointments and checking clients out all in one place. However, the the appointment reminder feature is terrible. Half the time my clients do not receive a reminder text or email about their appointment, and other times it comes one hour before their appointment time. It is incredibly inconsistent, and has caused me to lose out on a few appointments.

Pretty good scheduling app. I use it because it gives people reminders. I wish it was easier to connect to customer service and tech support. I spent a long time trying to find a phone number to connect to someone when my reader wasn't working. Working in a customer profile, it takes you back to the main screen rather than profile. When you tap on a day to make an appt it starts you with a completely random date and time from that week rather than the block you selected. Not glitchy though.

I used to love everything about the square! As of late, I hate Everything. My appointments disappeared one day and that was a nightmare. I can no longer message my clients, it just gives me a message failed error. I've tried everything. I've lost clients, business, refunds required, and bad reviews due to the many problems with this POS. It's ridiculous!!! I spent 11 hours 1 day calling customer service over and over. I got hung up on 39 times. Nothing ever gets fixed or resolved. I'm switching

Started strong but going down with every update. I pay for the $30 service and now it is not allowing messaging unless the client messages first. I can see where this is not a feature for the free version. But for someone who already pays a premium for the service this should not have all of sudden been excluded. I work at a few locations and being able to send a message with a reminder of locations and addresses now isn't possible if they have never done anything but confirm the appt. 👎

Square is a great app, but there was a period when the square assistant did not send notifications only via email .I had to manually send out reminders to my clients. The square assistant said the client opted out to receive text messages when, in fact, I knew that was not true! It seemed like the system defaulted this way as a cover-up, due to not functionally properly. It was an inconvenience, and the only issue I had so far. It appears to be working now.

The app is easy to use but, the menus may be confusing before you get the hang of it... hard to know if you are in the editing (admin)area or front end. It does not give the option of taking a percentage of deposit. If you want to take deposits you have to put the actual price in the text and manually calculate deposits and put that in the price. They offer a free card swiper - it took forever to come through normal shipping. Other than that it quickly gets your biz setup and going- Thanks

I love all the features they have, perfect for small sales and bookings. cost less than a monthly card reader. Does not charge unless you have sale and its only a small set fee per transaction. It has made my life so easy because its so simple to book my clients and check them out. My transactions get deposit to my account and everything is so simple to use.

This app is good for the client to book their appointments, but it is difficult for me to use as the service provider. There is no calendar "overview" option like there is in the desktop version. The "list" is simply a list of the appts, but the most recent are at the bottom and the immediate upcoming appts are a mess to quickly find. There is also no way to look up an egift card if the client forgot to bring the number. Getting around this throws off sales reports and client record keeping. :(

What a pos! My wife and I share a studio and can only perform one service at a time. There is no way to show both our schedules at once so it's constant toggling back and forth to try to figure out who has the room at what time. They also stopped syncing with Google calendar unless you pay over $300 a year for the premium service. There's better scheduling apps out there and I'm now switching. Clearly, this was an after thought app to their credit card processing. Don't waste your time with it.

When it does work it's fine. It often goes into offline mode even when I have an internet connection. So I have to waste time when checking out to exit and restart the app to finish my transaction. Sometimes it doesn't register appointments and crashes right after I enter the appointment. Today, it's freezing every time I attempt to revise a scheduled appointment. Uninstalling then reinstalling to see if that helps.

Pretty decent app, easy booking. I wish it had a better note section for stylists, even possible photos for profiles, would be super helpful for stylists! I hate that it's really hard to double book on it though. So sometimes that's a little confusing to me or a client if I can fit in a cut while they're processing. A little tweaks and it would be amazing!

I used to like this app but recently its gone down hill. it doesnt load information and pressing the "refresh" button does absolutely nothing. They keep putting more and more features (that used to be free) behind a pay wall. Why would I pay for an app that frustrates the hell out of me. I'd love to communicate my issues with the company but the only option for communication is to call and I don't want to be on hold for an hour when I could have sent an email.

The appointment making is simple yet keeping records of the appointments and clients is useless to awful. I hoped it would help keep everything in one place, booking, clients and payments. I have been using Square for 9 years so when they brought out the appointments option and the square card, wow. All in one place would be so great. But, appointments don't offer enough and square card is more of a hold over or debit card. Nother are as useful as I hoped.

I used to be able to handle everything from one spot, and now they want me to download multiple apps. The appointments app was dumbed down so bad it doesn't have half of the options the full site does. The worst part?? I can't access the full site from my phone anymore!! I HAVE to have my laptop to conduct most of the business I used to be able to do straight from my phone. The scheduler is VERY glitchy. Allows people to book/request spots that are already booked or not available.

I pay $30/month for the Square appt, everything was going great, now when I'm booking appts and get to the "Confirm Appointment" page, there is an option to add a message to the client, it takes up space and I can barely see the "Confirm Appointment" button on the screen. There is no way to remove it, which should be an option. Idk if it's an Apple vs. Android thing but it definitely makes it difficult to book appointments. Please fix this!! 😡😡

It started off as a great app, but now they will nickel & dime you for every specific function (wait list, custom reminders etc), despite booking fees as high as any other payment processing service. Their app has also become clunky. For the 2nd time in 6 months, the phone app will show completely wrong availability for our staff, despite changes being made on the desktop version causing confusion. (It's more efficient to update staff members' availability on the desktop vs phone app).

I cant believe I'm paying for this!! This app keeps getting new bugs! Recent updates included a bug that shows all pre-paid future appointment as complete before clients even come in, and now when I click on a time to schedule an appointment it sets it for an hour later than the desired time!! The app is fully updated and I have Uninstalled and re-installed it many times. I have contacted support and was told to just wait and hope they can fix whatever the issue is. Not good enough. 😐

I use this a lot, I think there was a major update within the last month or two that worked out a lot of bugs. it still gets a bit confused and needs rebooting once in a while (won't perform a customer search, freezes up. then upon reboot works fine) but otherwise I find it's a lot better than it was. I would recommend to others regardless, as long as you're okay with light troubleshooting once in a while.

Square all of the sudden stopped sending my clients text reminders for their appointments. This is incredibly annoying seeing as how my clients require this reminder with their busy lives. Ive actually had no shows bc of this. This is costing me money. It says I need to check all of my clients contact info and try sending again. This has been an in going issue for 3 weeks now. I contacted support & all he did was try and get me to upgrade. I don't need an upgrade for text reminders!

I love everything the laptop version offers as far as graphs/ number crunching but on my android device it will not let me view any apts. My boss has an iPhone and in the top right corner it gave him the option to view other people's schedule, unfortunately we were unable to find this feature on my device. I am unable to view my own schedule from my mobile phone. Also, having the graphs and other features on the mobile device would be beneficial.

enjoy the app been few changes that I don't like but some I do..there used to be a check mark when you completed a service to show that you had completed that service and charged it out cause if the client doesn't pay at that time it doesn't change color and looks as if it hasn't been completed and they took out the option to send sms text to customers when you tap on their phone number

Down in STARS- used to be good, now trying to make more revenues out of existing clients: vital features sued to be free, such as text reminders and No-show protection BUT suddenly without notification has been removed and is only included in the $30 monthly subscription on the top of their already cut from each sales.....Time has come to switch to a different scheduling app and payment processing; I had a bunch of others knocking at the door and had turned them away but the time has come to shop around.

Works great, except for when it doesn't work at all. I don't know what happened with the update on 9/5, but my square stopped working halfway through the day today. Can't bring up client list, can't set new appointments, can't set new personal time, can't take payments, help is offline. Both my wifi and data are working fine.

I can't believe they only gave you 500 characters. Nonsense. PRO : online booking. CON everything else. Cannot upload images and save them with appointments. You will constantly lose all of your minutes upon minutes of work because of the poorly designed UI which makes it confusing to save things. It needs to constantly connect to GPS even though it does not autofill the address for you. Clunky. If you save a client you cannot edit the client's info after the fact.

All of my appointments were erased from my calendar. I'm not sure what happened but I was two months behind in invoicing. Luckily only one individual even waits until I invoice them otherwise I'd be screwed. However for tax purposes I still kind of am because I will have to go through other means of finding old appointments. I am going to use another app for everything I think at this point.

Why on earth haven't categories/ subcategories functionality been added to the front end? I have 200+ unique field-services that my business offers, but I'm only able to list about a dozen of them for the fear of overwhelming my customer searching for their specific service. That functionality is offered in square "online", so clearly they know how to set up the database. I really don't get it! This company has done a great job with almost everything else (but good luck trying to find a phone #

Great but recently whenever I select location when making an appointment it crashes the whole app, deleting the appointment I was in the process of making and not allowing me to select locations. Edit: Nope turns out there is no client-side troubleshooting that can fix an actual bug in your app. Reducing to one star. This bug completely breaks the appointment making process. Only workaround is selecting location first or doing it on the computer

I'm updating my review. The below is still true, there's a lot of good functionality, but Square does not seem motivated to keep up the value of their product. Major example: schedules cannot be set to change a few months out, all staff schedule changes take place immediately which is very hard to run a business that takes automatic bookings Please fix! Also! I cannot get my services to appear in the right order on my booking site, which confuses customers

I use this for my business but lately, most messages are being bounced back so there is no way for me to contact my clients unless if I email them or call them. Uninstalling and reinstalling doesn't fix the problem. I've called in several times but was told to hang in there while they try to fix it. And no, they do not know long it'll take. I also would have like to be able to customize my outgoing text messages from Square.

Ever since you had to pay for extra services this app is a pain. It used to still send a reminder to clients even on the free version, as of late my clients are not getting a reminder about their appointments and it has caused them to forget about their appointment, which takes money away from me.

Overall this is a great app, BUT I am the only in my shop that has an Andriod. I have the newest Galaxy S10 and the app just lacks on my phone so much. For example, my co works iPhone allows them to show everyone's appointments all on one screen. On mine I have to go to each individual separately to see what they have open which can take time. My app just updated again today 8/13 and now it wont even allow me to select my workers. It just starts to flicker. pls make this app android friendly!!!

Almost 200 dollars went missing from my account through square. They have given me 4 different reasons why it's gone. All of the reasons contradicting themselves. I have called numerous times to receive no help. On top of that. I have my business hours for Sunday to be closed. Yet square continues to allow people to book on that day I have marked as closed. If I could give zero stars, I would. Also, not to mention all technical inconveniences when the tap pay is down.

I have been using the app for about a year, but recently there have been so many bugs! First, the calendar month wouldn't change, then that was fixed. Then the appointment date reverts back to the current date. Still not fixed. Now, all of the names on my appointments that have been confirmed are not showing up. I also dislike the way we have to choose a time, and we can't just type a time in. I hate to change, but it may be time.

Great app, but it has a few issues. I'm on Eastern Time, and so are my customers, but my business time zone is incorrectly set to PDT. None of my customers can set a morning appointment because of this error. I've emailed customer support about this issue and they responded with a solution that didn't work. How do I change my business time zone to EDT? Also, it would be great if I didn't have to just reject appointments, instead, I would like to offer an alternate day and time to the customer.

I typically have no issues with this app it has been working great for me for years… but I have noticed lately that more more issues are occurring… recently messages aren't being sent and not going through when making appointments… as well as some appointments aren't showing up on different devices that were made… I don't know if this isn't issue that just started or But I know it's not my devices because it happens on different devices … can someone please fix this issue

Not the easiest to use, there needs to be an option to set specific time and dates for specific services. I have used the app and the website and niether are user friendly. You have to go to multiple pages between the app and the web page to get anything done. It really needs to be simplified and it would be wonderful to have everything in one app if you have your website through square (which was weebly previously).

I don't know what the problem is but all of a sudden I can't open my client by name and look at notes I've put in pertaining to their service or to make any changes without going all the way in to the customer file to do so. Not happy!!!! Edit: problem seems to be fixed and working properly again with new update,reserving 5th star when I actually see it working during a busy day and not quit. Thanks for being so quick to fix.

Difficult to use, does not sync well when you make an appointment. I've had several instances where an appointment was made, but does not show in the schedule, yet when you go into the individual clients it shows an appointment was made there... Seems kind of pointless to have this if I have to make multiple appointments just for it to work correctly.

This app has been great , it frees up my time by sending out confirmation reminders for me. And I dont have to pack around my appointment book . The only thing I haven't been able to figure out is sending a note with the reminder , it has a option for a note but it's not sending it. I want to be able to tell clients that the need to wait in their car and text me when they arrive.

I started a business and needed an appointment reminder. Square concept overall is great but for square appointments you must add services to save an appointment which I think is bogus! I think you should be able to add an customer name and put the allot time needed along with an item or services needed without being prompt to add services before being saved as an appointment. It should be an option. Had to uninstall it did more bad then good for my business needs.

All was well till recently. Now, some of my appointments aren't showing up on my phone. I'm out and about, take an appointment. I check appointments the night before on my laptop and voila, the time slot had been booked, just wasn't (isn't)showing on my phone. Frustrating to say the very least. What's going on?

Ive been waiting a while for this app! So a few things: Pros: very easy to use and set up. I love the simplicity of it. Im able to set up how I like my online booking to be as far as being able to collect a deposit for my services. Cons: So on the apple version, im able to create a "personal" event or appointment, you can't do this through the mobile app for Android. Another thing the Apple version has that android doesnt, is the ability to do a week view, not just a one day or month view.

I've been using this app for a few years. great overall. couple things I don't like. I wish I could customize my confirmation messages, I don't like if an appointment moves it auto confirms, there have been issues since starting with being able to clock in and anyone who has iphones has issues with the app. (maps, invoices, clocking in) I think if those things were changed it would be great

There is a new problem every few weeks. Now my app will not send out confirmation text for appointments, and when I select to manually send the confirmation it tells me to double-check my contact info and try again. Over and over and over again. It also always says I am offline when I am connected to Wi-Fi, I cannot process payments unless I get off of Wi-Fi. it doesn't matter if I'm on my home Wi-Fi or the business Wi-Fi. Also no cards on file to process payments, they will not save

Love it, I've been using this app for free for years. But I don't know why you paid extra money for options for card to be charged when customer don't show up, I changed my client for last minutes cancelation for not showing up at the appointment she booked but square refund the money and say there nothing they could do, they charge me monthly so customers can book with card on file options.

It will NOT let me save an appointment. The "save" option remains grey. I have added customer. I have chosen the time. I have added items. I have writren a note. Nothing works. Edit: It will not allow me to add services. And my computer dashboard also won't let me. Needs to allow saving for items. Actually should not have to add either to save.

I actually really like this app.. it's pretty awesome! BUT the reason I don't give it 5 stars is because, whenever somebody books an appointment online, the ONLY notification I get is through an email & same with when I book someone myself; the ONLY way for me to know someone is booked for that day, is if I go on the app & look in the Calendar. It doesn't tell me or let me know. So if they were to fix that & make it to where they alert u with a notification then this app would be a 5 star app!

Square works very well for our massage team business overall. We rely on it daily and appreciate the platform. However, there is no couples massage booking option, add-on services are not linked to the main service and can be assigned to different therapists, and client phone numbers do not display properly on Google Pixel devices. We hope these areas can be improved to better support massage and wellness businesses.

*UPDATE* PLEASE MAKE CUSTOM SCHEDULE AVAILABLE ON MOBILE! will change rating if mobile is closer to pc version. Sucks to have to find a computer to customize my availability!! I like square apps over all - but as previously stated the mobile site and app all REALLY need to resemble the desktop version. I'm rarely sitting in front of a computer and several things can ONLY be adjusted there. thank you

I've been using this app for 2 years and it has served my purpose of scheduling very well. Now that they have made subscription plans, they've taken away the automated appointment confirmation text feature to clients from the free subscription. That was the one major feature/reason that I relied on for making my appointmens. I don't want to pay $30 a month for just that feature.

The square app is updated on both of my phones but keeps glitching out. I've tried all the trouble shooting options and nothing has worked. I have full days of clients coming up. And work Monday- Saturday. I need to be able to take payments and see the clients coming in and their services. This isn't the first time square has had serious issues. When it glitches out it says the provider needs to fix a bug in order for me to re update it for it to run smoothly. It won't even let me relog in.

This was a great app before the update. Some of my previous sales have dissappeared from my reports but are still present in my transactions. This makes it extremely difficult to do my taxes since I just pull up my reports and go from there. I have to look in my transactions and add everything together because I'm missing some sale days where I actually made a sale. It was perfect before the update. Please fix this issue. I'm a one woman band w a child. Don't need any extra time consuming issues

I have been using this for a few years now and couldn't imagine running my barbering business without it. My only suggestions would be to add an option to make personal events recurring, and to further customize times that are listed online for appointments. I have 30 and 45 minute appointment times, and square will leave me with annoying 15 minutes gaps between clients

love this app! It makes my life so much easier, juggling being a full time mommy and hair stylist my app does all my work for me. It text my clients, confirms them, I can text them from the app. Also It keeps track of all my inventory and gives me daily reports on what I'm low on so I can make sure I know when I need to order product again. It does take time inputting all my items and services but honesty it's worth it in the long run and you have to do that with any other software anyways.

I've used square for years now. It is simple enough, but not only are the fees for using a card high, now they bill you in different categories to use features that used to be free. I'm paying $30 a month so my calendar will sync to Google? $15 a month to get item reviews on my website? $60 extra a month to manage my inventory??? You are out of touch, Square. Not to mention the COUNTLESS estimates I've lost by not saving before it randomly auto logs out??? For this reason ALONE I'm leaving.

This app is GREAT for the square PROFESSIONAL. The real issue is that it's not customer friendly. Clients have to be sent codes to sign in EVERY time they sign in, which has caused my clients to book as guest nearly every time they book in order to avoid the hassle. Most importantly, the app doesn't distinguish the client vs professional side very well. Clients that have the app were immediately confused because it went directly to setting up a business.

I absolutely LOVE the Square Appointment app! IT allows so many options. Reports, sales tax, employees, invoices, offline mode and much, much more. I've been using it for 4 years and cannot imagine a better app for a barber shop & salon! Never has been down or even glitchy. I use the free version for about 600 clients.

I've been waiting for this app!! Some things I wish it did: be able to schedule a personal appointment from it..... be able to set recurring appointments..... a button to reschedule an appointment. Also, my clients wish there was an app for them to login and schedule instead of going to their internet browser.

I would give this app 5 stars if we can block unpleasant client from booking. Those clients would just see us as booked and no date available to book with us. Tipping is ackward, can we just have them text their tips in or make it so at check out they see the total and tip options on 1 page and agree to the total and then we can charge. One last thing, if people book us through Google there should be an option for those clients to secure their appointment with a credit card.

Great, but no 'bulk time-slot' discount, then book function, (like Appointments-Plus). You can set it up so customers can pre-pay before being able to book their time with you, and this syncs well w Square Invoice, but it kills me you can't offer package discounts--then book. For example, say a Hair Salon charges $50/cut, but wants to offer pre-paid discount packages (buy 3 for $140, 4 for $185, etc.), Square can't do this, like Appointments-Plus can. That's the only thing missing from Square.

If you have SERVICES instead of ITEMS for sale, DO NOT USE SQUARE! You can't use coupons, you can create them and give them to customers, but they can't use them. You as the business owner have to manually enter them, even though if the customer clicks the coupon, it tells them it's been applied. Customer service is s**t, too. More people that you can't really understand, that have no agency themselves to actually make a decision about anything. Pass you along to another do-nothing department.

now having continuous problems with tap to pay on the back of my phone. ive NEVER had this issue for the past 2 years and now all of a sudden the app is not connecting to square and I cant take payments using my NFC. I have re started my phone, re started the app and still have issues. ive had to get a square reader now to use as a backup. not happy.

Requering appointments do not always show up, when scheduling clients for the year, I end up doubling booking. This creates huge issues with client flow. More & more clients are NOT receiving their text reminders! We have tried everything to fix this with no resolution.....

I've used square appointments for years. It has served as an assistant in the hair industry. It sends out all my reminders and appointment confirmations for me, I can save notes in their personal file for example hair colors and products they use and even inspiration pictures they bring. My clients love being able to book online and I love that too bc I can spend more time behind the chair!
was good far some time but right now it seems to jump from allowing me to see certain customer information to not, and making the tap to pay unavailable

Waiver that had been created and sent to multiple customers disappeared and was unable to be located. Created a new waiver and it is now a contract requiring business owner and recipient signatures that cannot be adjusted. I have spent hours trying to find a work around and it is ridiculous how complicated this is when it wasn't broken.

terrible! Slow...worst application interface ever.Logs you out after a few minutes so have to relog in every appointment to see your schedule.I literally wait 15 minutes just to select the payment method when paying an invoice for a customer.I was going to open a second location and was going to use square but after a few weeks at my primary location and seeing how awful and unuseable it really is I have gone another route.Square has been ok for pos but as an appointment platforrm it is awful.

tap to pay continuously not working despite many, many troubleshooting attempts. ready to look for other systems. the main function of this app is to take payment and it is unable to do so. support has not offered any lasting solutions.
very easy app to use, highly recommend for any small business trying to keep track of there schedule ✨️

setting an appointment to get your haircut used to be very easy. now because of square I have to download an app, make an account, and give this app every permission under the sun so that they can go through all my stuff. I'm so sick of making new accounts for something everyday
work and personal calendar best! of all. many years organizing my work. Just amazing and easy to use.
For the last 2 months, I've had issues with the tap to pay feature! it keeps saying I have poor connection despite having full service. close to deleting this app

continually takes away my ability to open client profiles from the appointment. Clients I've never communicated with any other way than texting, suddenly I can't text them anymore and then it tries to push me to purchase messaging, I thought that was what we were already paying for, but no now it's a whole new add on you have to purchase. update 2 years later same issues still happening never get any response from them 😑

Absolute rubbish! First the card reader stopped working as soon as I activated my physical card, then my cards contactless payment stopped working when I removed and reinstalled the app to get the card reader to work, and NOW when I tried to check my balance it kept telling me the password and/or verification code are wrong (which they are not, I've put the password right every time and the verification code was every time the one I was sent) and now my account has been LOCKED!!!!
Streamlines my business with automations and makes a huge difference to how much less time i now have to spend on admin. worth every cent.

playStoreReviews.text: Excellent, ànd easy to work with. My wished, I could discount, or subtraction within the Invoice, and still show the original line items, and when I use the discount the amount is subtract from the totals. already recommended to all friends who has a home business and wish to track sales. This apps the best for in the field applications.

This Invoice Generator is by far the best for creating invoices. Just enter a few key details and it puts it together real fast and nice looking. The best part is it's truly free. I've been using it for about a year now and never had a single problem, haven't paid one penny and it does all the math for you too. (which is just 1 more bonus for me cause math never was my strong suit) Also it makes it super easy to use across devices. PC and Android. This app ROCKS!

I've never made out an invoice before. This was SO EASY and convenient! I'm thrilled with this app! It simplified it. I didn't even sweat or swear! 😆 Easy to itemize, easy to edit and delete, easy all the way around. You can share it by email, or message. You can save it, go back later and change any detail you'd like.

I liked this app - just your bare basics...not bad! BUT - the only thing I disliked was I was unable to delete an itemized entry that I did not want to include in my estimate after all. My choices to correct were CLEAR ALL (and start over) or EDIT (I could zero it out, but the entry remained). Maybe I missed something somewhere because that would seem to be a necessary tool! Also, I liked the many save, open, download, share, and send options. I had a PAID app that hadn't nearly that many...👍

It was easy to use, unless you don't like typing manually. This is the basic model which is free but requires you to do the manual input for each and every invoice because it saves nothing for you. BUT you can choose to upgrade to more features for a fee. If you do sales of different things on very light ratio like a few sales a week, then you will love the basic invoice that cost you $0 to Generate, Share, Download, Email & Print your invoices all for free.

this app is FREE and has made my small business start up so easy and smooth! I feel like many other apps were intimidating and way too expensive. This literally generates a simple invoice. Easy, and does what it says. Fast simple way to invoice immediately from mobile. Send through eMail, done in minutes. Wether service is needed once instantaneously, or on going long term. Simple invoicing can't be any easier or cheaper. No learning curve.

Three years unprofessional. My partner and I started a catering company. We drafted invoices from scratch and we were never truly satisfied with the look and structure of them. Now with Invoice Generator we have a professionally structured invoice. The time to invoice went from 20 mins to about 2! This app allows you to add itemized details and even taxes are calculated. I recommend this app to anyone who operates a small company to keep track of accounts receivable. 5 stars.

This app is one of the most beneficial on my phone. I use this all the time and it's easy to use. I have to clean my memory every few months to keep it from slowing down my phone. It would be nice if there was a way to save it within the app so you don't have to save it to your phone.

perfect for on the fly invoicing. I LOVE this app. and yes, it's totally free. not just free to download. it's free to use. no trial period with a surprise monthly fee. which is why I will continuously give you 5 stars with each update. thank you for your hard work and dedication to provide this app for free to people who just need to type out an invoice on the go.

Love this app. I've used a number of different ones over the years, and this is by far the most straight forward for simple invoices.
