playStoreReviews.text: Excellent, ànd easy to work with. My wished, I could discount, or subtraction within the Invoice, and still show the original line items, and when I use the discount the amount is subtract from the totals. already recommended to all friends who has a home business and wish to track sales. This apps the best for in the field applications.

This Invoice Generator is by far the best for creating invoices. Just enter a few key details and it puts it together real fast and nice looking. The best part is it's truly free. I've been using it for about a year now and never had a single problem, haven't paid one penny and it does all the math for you too. (which is just 1 more bonus for me cause math never was my strong suit) Also it makes it super easy to use across devices. PC and Android. This app ROCKS!

I've never made out an invoice before. This was SO EASY and convenient! I'm thrilled with this app! It simplified it. I didn't even sweat or swear! 😆 Easy to itemize, easy to edit and delete, easy all the way around. You can share it by email, or message. You can save it, go back later and change any detail you'd like.

I liked this app - just your bare basics...not bad! BUT - the only thing I disliked was I was unable to delete an itemized entry that I did not want to include in my estimate after all. My choices to correct were CLEAR ALL (and start over) or EDIT (I could zero it out, but the entry remained). Maybe I missed something somewhere because that would seem to be a necessary tool! Also, I liked the many save, open, download, share, and send options. I had a PAID app that hadn't nearly that many...👍

It was easy to use, unless you don't like typing manually. This is the basic model which is free but requires you to do the manual input for each and every invoice because it saves nothing for you. BUT you can choose to upgrade to more features for a fee. If you do sales of different things on very light ratio like a few sales a week, then you will love the basic invoice that cost you $0 to Generate, Share, Download, Email & Print your invoices all for free.

this app is FREE and has made my small business start up so easy and smooth! I feel like many other apps were intimidating and way too expensive. This literally generates a simple invoice. I would definitely say it's great to start off with and definitely in the near future I'm a upgrade to an app that allows me to design the invoice with my actual logo but I do not know what I will do without this particular app! and I also like how they don't bother you with ads to upgrade or pay.Def Recommend

So far I am less than impressed with this app. From what I can tell you cannot simply add an invoice to an email I have to take a picture of it save it to my phone and then upload that picture to my email huge inconvenience along with not being able to edit or delete things that I've added to my list to add to my invoice, a huge oversight and a major inconvenience. I will keep my rating at 1 star until fixed and probably find a different app.

Easy, and does what it says. Fast simple way to invoice immediately from mobile. Send through eMail, done in minutes. Wether service is needed once instantaneously, or on going long term. It's simple and great for starting a spontaneous invoice for a gig or keeping invoices numbered weekly monthly or whatever. Does the math and tax for you too. Including dates due. Simple invoicing can't be any easier or cheaper. No learning curve.

Three years unprofessional. My partner and I started a catering company. We drafted invoices from scratch and we were never truly satisfied with the look and structure of them. Now with Invoice Generator we have a professionally structured invoice. The time to invoice went from 20 mins to about 2! This app allows you to add itemized details and even taxes are calculated. I recommend this app to anyone who operates a small company to keep track of accounts receivable. 5 stars.

I have been using this app for a while, and it's came in handy to write invoices on the fly. I'm a small business person, and being able to use this for free is awesome as well. I would like to be able to save my contacts in the app somewhere, but it might be there, and I haven't seen it or looked for it. The new updated look seems simpler than the last layout also.

This app is one of the most beneficial on my phone. I use this all the time and it's easy to use. The only thing that will make it better is ad a feature that allows you to to save the invoices on the app. I saw them to my cloud drive and on my phone for a short while. I have to clean my memory every few months to keep it from slowing down my phone. It would be nice if there was a way to save it within the app so you don't have to save it to your phone.

perfect for on the fly invoicing. I LOVE this app. and yes, it's totally free. not just free to download. it's free to use. no trial period with a surprise monthly fee. which is why I will continuously give you 5 stars with each update. thank you for your hard work and dedication to provide this app for free to people who just need to type out an invoice on the go.

Love this app. I've used a number of different ones over the years, and this is by far the most straight forward for simple invoices. I appreciate not having to register or pay a fee for use as a very occasional user, and am totally fine with the small professional water mark in the bottom corner in exchange for use of the app! 10/10 recommend. From opening to emailing the invoice, it was all of 2 minute's with no frustrations! Thanks for the great app!

Invoice Generator is excellent for the upwardly mobile entrepreneur. Only thing to add is a storage place for the generated invoices so that it can be recalled in a subsequent period. Also make it possible to fill in a client's details through the phone contact list. These two issues notwithstanding, I still give this app a thumbs up and 5 stars.

What it says is what it does. gives you free and I mean free invoice maker. I'm a very small business and I can't afford these invoice programs costing rediculous amounts of money to have. This is completely free. You can open other features of the invoice program and it's not that expensive but for now it hasn't missed a beat and haven't been told that's it you have to pay now. Took me ages to find this app, but glad I eventually did. Great work guys and thankyou.

Fantastic App. I use it for side jobs, automotive repair and my customers always compliment me on how professional it is with the invoices they receive. 5start if it had the option to categorize stuff like "Labor", "Parts" but still overall it is awesome and very straight forward.

Inconsistent with online instructions. There is no download option in the menu. Will not allow me to edit invoice. Accidentally changed to French headings and menus. Will not allow me to switch it back to English. I switch it to English in the business information section but it will not save. There's no indication of how to save it. I never changed or saved the French intentionally. I can only assume I accidentally hit the language menu. Bad design. Time waster.

Easy, user friendly & quick. I would however, suggest that the app remembers your last invoice number used, or allows you to create a folder with all your invoice numbers that have been used & is still available. Also, let's you create "beneficiaries" of your frequently invoiced clients.

Decent but why is the PDF named such a long number and how come I can't upload to my email directly. My old app would create an email with the persons email address and even fill in the header. This creates a lot of extra work having to look up their email each time. There is also no way to add my number and email to the address line or payment methods.

Greetings I went through about 6 or so invoice apps before I found you Reason(s) for my choice 1. No signing up/creating account 2. No ads 3. Very simple like the real thing (I love simplicity) 4. The option to email, share download which means being able to print 5. It's stable so far Thanks very much for your hard work

First time using it by far super simple invoice looks professional and fast! 5 star just got done a job yesterday and computer died had to scramble to make an invoice and get paid. Work exactly how its suppose too. Highly recommended for those on the go with little office support.

I really like it. Very easy and user friendly and it sent my invoice instantly. Only didn't like the fact that it doesn't save clients for future invoices that's why it didn't get 5 stars but other than that it's great and it's free!!!!!!

Sucks!!! I still cannot log into this app to make it save one single invoice!?!!!!!!???? It's nothing but easy do not waist an hour like I did getting redirected redirected again and again!! I'm installing once I got my other invoice maker downloaded! Right now I'm on a time crunch!! Do not leave it to Zoho!!!

The UI is great. But the UX is need improvement. There's no field to input a discount. Please add it. I also need to save my items and customer's details, so i don't need to input them more than once. Please fix the UX to make it better.

Great app used to help me with my business. I cannot have a specific cloud storage app namely "dropbox" installed with this app. Now, GOOGLE DRIVE and ONEDRIVE are okay. This specific cloud service (dropbox) slams and disables features from this once truly wonderful program. Thank you for your time.

This app is so worth it,faster to do my invoices,but the only disappointing factor is that it doesn't save your invoices on the app when you are done you just save to you device and when you want to edit the same invoice you have to start over. please fix only that

Very handy and suits my daily invoicing whilst saving a copy in my files .......freeing me up from having to get on the desktop. Quick easy and FREE. If you could save client info and select from a client list when invoicing, this would tick every box for my own needs. Great app though and well worth a look....

Great app for all your invoicing needs!! I love the way this app is set up compared to other ones I have used. It allows me to create my invoices and submit them in a much quicker way without any issues or errors.
First time was ok. Then second and third time was harder. Quicker and more reliable writing it by hand. No such thing as a free invoice app. Make your own invoice template and save time and money

It worked for a few invoices then stopped working. It kept asking to verify my email (which I did) then asked to email support. Clearly some kind of scam going on here. I decided to uninstall and go with a more reputable invoice generator.

New update ruined this lovely simple little app. Used to recommend to everyone, now I have to find a new one. You are now limited to items and can't really fill out the blocks the way you want. Totally useless unless you're just selling things/products... Total garbage!!!

I have used this for my cleaning business and Homecare business and it's great simple and easy .I would compare it to QuickBooks when it 1st came out very simple and you can add thing on a line item w the price and just pull it down and your able to change things temporarily if need be. I am enjoying it ....

Great little app for simple invoices! I only do subcontracting for one company, and this is the simplest way to get them an itemized invoice. The only thing I would like to see is an easier way to save /retrieve past invoices.

use it all the time for my small welding business, easy and quick to use, finalized invoice looks very professional and is easy to navigate. I would defenetly recommend this app if your starting off and need to write up an invoice on the spot.

This is the best piece of software I've ever used. Installed, created invoice, printed, emailed ... all in less than five minutes. And it's FREE?! Are you mad??? Anyone reading this worried you don't know what you're doing or it's gonna be too complicated... shut up and download this NOW! You will NOT be sorry! To the developers: THANK YOU! 😁

Love this little app. Simple straitforward and free!!! I have tried other apps but have used this one for the past 2 years. I like being able to send invoices over Wats app, email or text. Quicker I can get invoices Out, quicker they get paid.

A very good App for EZ Invoices .HOWEVER -it does not allow me to Invoice as: Total Amount.........................$2000 Less 40% deposit paid...............800 Final Balance@ completion...$1200 THAT would be a 5 Star App and there are text fields to explain BUT it should be simple. ZOHO 15 dollar 1 time fee for Upgrade AND you get 5 Stars from Scorpio and 19,675 new orders. The Review is not following my columns layout but you get the idea.

wish it could save customer history have to retype in same customer as new each time but other than that app works awesome and you can download them to your drive to save if you have Google can adding your own notes and looks very professional able to do it in the field as well love it

excellent.... fes up of paying silly amounts for something everyone can do on excel. if it stays free I'll be keeping it !!!! always send a copy to your own email to keep track if they end up stopping the app!

Running a small business, this app has made creating invoices so easy! You can add all the services or items you offer and also calculate tax within the app! If you haven't tried it yet? You're missing out!

simple and easy to use. I use the free version. my only issue is you can't save the invoices you generate to alter the details in the future. meaning if your generating a new invoice with different items, you need to start from scratch
The most easiest app I've used for invoicing. I just wish you could see ones you have made in the past. Also a save and edit feature would be phenomenal!

Simplest Invoice creater I have found and does everything Self a self employed guy would need to get the job done. Simple easy fast. And of cource the price is perfectly with in my budget.. FREE,.. Thanks for a solid product. No bug as of yet ..
Been using this app for a little over 2 years. Its the most simple, on the fly, invoice app I've found so far. It will let you download for free so that you don't lose the info. Great job!
The is good. it met the basic needs of invoicing but it could be better if there is retainership of some information so one doesn't have to keep re entering such. Thank you.
Just installed the app and I already feel it's a great start. The app is easy to use and simple. I love Everything about it!

This was great on my other phone seems to be a totally different app now and I can't figure out how to attach payment links so customer can pay, I've been on this about 45 mins now as my customer is waiting .. I'm off to look for another app that I can understand how to add payment links. I have used this app for three years or so and loved it every time.. it sucks now, maybe I'm stupid and don't see the links in my face ? 🤷‍♀️

After entering some basic information in it, you can use it very easily and the fact that this application is free makes it even better. It is for small businessmen and small shopkeepers who do not want to spend money on billing machines.
Easy and quick to make invoices. I recommend it. It would be pretty cool if business owners can add their logo in the invoice. Other than that it looks nice and presentable.

Great app quick and easy to use. The only small thing Is you can't save clients profiles so you will need to right them out each time you send a invoice not a big deal but would be handy if you could.

I wish i could save my invoices within the app just in case i need to go back and edit something or when yoyr doung multiple deposits you have to rewrite everything because it wasnt saved other than that great app really like it i use it every day

I love the invoice generator because it's so simple you can modify whatever you like it gives you exactly what you need the only thing I would like to see is the ability to text the invoice and I'm not sure why it doesn't do it other than that it's a wonderful app and thank you so much
App is about the best you will get for free. Only fault I can find so far since update is there doesn't seem to be an option to delete saved items from previous invoices

The App is working again. Deleted & re-downloaded a 2nd time. I would like to know whether this App could have a feature where one can save lines daily & continue the next day without losing the information.
please if you're business owner and you need to generate invoice, please don't think twice just download this app...it's easy,stress free and gets my job done always
Makes a simple, yet very professional invoice! I would love it even more if you could add a drag and drop option in case you need to rearrange line items.
Simple, easy to use, user friendly. Would be neat to be able save multiple addresses for added convenience, but I'm not complaining. Copy / paste works just fine.
It does what it does well but you can't reopen invoices, and the save location. Is horrible not to mention the lack of ability to choose a file name

I think everything is good looks professional the only thing is i wish in the share menu it only send to emails. try n make a way to send it to customers phone numbers just in case they dont have an email or dont check them
This app is a life saver. To think it is absolutely FREE! it is quick and easy to use. Allows for simple amendments like change Tax amount to a discount amount. LOVE IT!
Excellent invoice app for basics, I'm based in country that has GST so it works well for this too. Does nit retain memory of invoices, but you can email to yourself to have them on record.

I have to create an invoice about 3 times a year for my small accommodation business. This app creates a fuss free professional looking invoice I can generate on phone, that I can email off. Perfect. Thankyou developers.

I have used this generator for about 4 years now never have had an issue adding line items is easy and it also makes it super easy to save the files direct to my phone or I can send them via email or both Great app dose what it say

You guys took a very user friendly interface and turned it into straight garbage I can not preview the invoice in your app anymore and when I do try to preview after looking at what ever invoice I just made to send it out it just disappears. It's very frustrating I used this app for 3 years really heavily for everything the interface was amazing simple and easy to use Now I have to go find another app that was as easy to use as this one Now this thing is unnecessarily complex frustrating
It did what i wanted it to do. No issues. Will use again. Very Easy and straight forward! you can add features to your invoice if you wanted more than just the basic info.
Just a nice app to make a quick invoice with. Not sure how many I can do before they will want money or if it is like that. I don't do many invoices anymore but this app has been good for me so far.
Excellent app! Works well with my line of work! wiah there were some added features but maybe they will add them as an update. wish you could edit and not lose any data but not every app is perfect.
Easy, powerful, and exactly what I needed. AND NO ADS TOO FOR A FREE PROGRAM? 5/5 I don't know if there is a pro version, but will be picking it up because I really like this software.
easy to use. I wish it could convert an invoice into a receipt, so that as soon as payment is made, I don't have to type so much again. but, it's a great app and easy to use.
Great invoice app. Easy to use and gets the job done. Gives you the option to download so you always have a copy. Doesn't mislead you by charging you have way through. Download now!!

I have created 1000s of invoices. Barring a couple of instances where the app crashed may be because of my phone, it works everytime and helps small business owners very well. Kudos to the team to develop such an effective application
The new update, makes it difficult if you have long descriptions, to input the small text bubble. Swiping to either side, will delete that entry, not usable on the go.

This is my first time creating an invoice ever in life and I'm super nervous. This app is making it incredibly easy for me and helping me overcome alot of unnecessary fears I've had prior about it being difficult. This is more helpful than I can express and it's giving me a great tool and knowledge that I'll carry with me for the rest of my life. Huge props and thanks for this app
I think this would be better if the invoices were saved so you could edit an invoice once it's been sent. I don't like having to make new invoices.

A great little APP for Quick Invoices. To get 5 STARS from SCORPIO - I would like to see a [ >% Option for each line item < ]. So - the Total for the Item is $120. 50% Deposit of ITEM X ........$60. WE WILL PAY FOR THIS OPTION !
This is a simple, easy to use invoice app that looks professional. No logging in required. Thank you. Would like to see a line for a phone number for both company and client.

Worst app ever! Will allow you to create the invoice but will not allow you to save it. Says the file is "corrupt" whatever that means! Don't even waste your time downloading this app. Complete waste of time.
Simple, clean interface with easy digital save and sharing options. Edit from saved entries would make it four stars. Five stars if it had record keeping functions.
I use zoho invoice for all my invoices and it's been bliss. It gives such a professional look to my business, it's easy to use, no glitches, very user friendly and really cool.
Simple app that creates invoices. It does what I need it to do. It does not save previous invoices, so forward yourself an email copy when you export it.
Great app for invoicing, only thing that would be handy is the ability to total up invoices for certain date periods.
so far I've generated just a handful and deleted them to see what they would look like and there isn't a hidden weekly or yearly fee that they want you to pay so far
very easy to set up your invoice through this app. highly recommended to use for small and medium business.

All is well, but it is surprising to see that there is no option to give a discount. How can you make these kinds of mistakes ? I know about the ZOHO INVOICE APP where there's a discount option available, but in that app we can't charge GST without entering our business GSTIN number, which we can charge on this application.
very handy free app, allows you to send a simple professional looking invoice. so nice when you don't want to be in subscription plans like most other apps like this try with a free trial. thank you

great generator i have no problems making invoices on my chromebook. it works out all of the tax deductions for you and when you download a copy you see it in true form, it looks professional need i say more.
Easy to use. I sell the same thing to same vendors so it would be nice if the app saved line item products and customers for future invoicing.

When I got to the dates and what format to use I gave up. Your app needs more clarification I feel like I'm messing up the info I want to put in also does it only let you bill for one date. To confusing. I'm just going to make my own invoices on Microsoft word

i like the fact thats its basic, only complaint is that it doesn't automatically save the as i like to add to it thought the day and currently if i close the app or restart phone it reverts back to the invoice prior.
the app is fantastic and very easy to use. However,it will be better if we can have the logo,font option, and comma to separate the money figures.
The App is easy to use and allows you to save your invoice as a pdf. I can then edit my invoice in Adobe Acrobat and save it on their cloud storage. Thanks for this very useful product.
It's a shame. This very basic invoice maker cannot work without internet connection. There are lots of similar but more sophisticated apps that can work completely offline.
It's a wonderful app. I wish you have a feature that would allow a user create the company name, address with blank lines so that they can foenload and hand-fill the invoice

This NEW app is absolutely THE BEST thing on the market!! It is FAST and soooo easy to use! It's calculations are spot on and a real time saver for me. It was good before but now this is GREAT!! Thanks for making my life so much better!!

Your experience may vary. Does everything it says it will. I do intend on upgrading. I WILL recommend this to everybody. I do little jobs for people and sometimes they need an invoice half-a-dozen times a year. I believe it will be a worthwhile investment for years to come. Thank you Zoho

This is app is good and easy. Allows you to create free invoices with your company name, who you're billing, description, parts, prices and looks very, very, very professional. Trust me. Download this app NOWWWW!!!!!
This is great so far, I've only done 2 invoice ... hopefully they do not start charging me. I love it very simple and easy to use!! Perfect for freelancer! Love it!!!

Very clunky and un-userfriendly. There's no way to delete something you started and start over without going through the whole process. Very time consuming and not very handy. *Update 6/17/2019: Upgraded to 4 stars. Devs are very responsive.

App is great I'm a trucker new business never make an invoice before now this great app is making my life easy and simple it turn out I don't need to be an office person to make an invoice I need to be a tech person with classic cowboy boots and blue collar,,, whoever make this app,, THANK YOU.
My experience with the invoice Generator is amazing. Is very simple to use. I happy as long as I do have to pay for it. I will share with many business!!!

The app works thats a plus. The fact they keep increasing the price is garabage. I couldnt be more disgusted with forced price increases. I use the same exact options in the app that I've used for the past 10 years and not 1 single new "update" option at all period. why would I want to continue to pay more and more for things I dont need. Definitely will be looking for other apps to use that actually care about ALL their customers. Not just about upcharging forcefully.

Two huge price increases in 2 years. App is good. But not great. They keep adding things to justify their price increases, but refuse to offer a lite version for those of us (like me) that don't need all the bells and whistles. I swear they are worse than the cable company. Charging you for things you didn't need or want! Will be cancelling after my subscription year is up!

they keep raising there subscription prices every single year. it's ridiculous. Every time I have an issue there AI comes into play and it's costing me time because I have to tell it I want a live agent like 20 times before it will actually transfer me to real person. Also I pay for premium tier and some features stopped working properly. I have contacted support many times about it and it's still not resolved. I cancelled my renewal for this year and currently looking into something cheaper.

Seems good so far. Real easy. Edit: Price has gone up multiple times in less than a year because I guess the owner thinks we all need it for keeping track of our business. Well we don't, and I started at 6.99 or 7.99 and now its charging me 20 a month and does nothing different from when it started and got slower if anything. Took it down from 5 to 3 stars for greed and slowdowns.

the thought is there but the follow through is not. price keeps going up. I report issues and they repeat them back to me. today it says I have no more documents left yet I paid for the year. so in the middle of our busiest season I'm left with no I voice app, for the second year in a row because last spring they started showing as read Instantly and no one was receiving them (still not completely fixed). there's no update available so what now? what did I pay for?!

It's not bad simple easy to use for customer and myself only downfalls are you can't make an invoice reoccurring or set them to auto deliver. So hassle for reoccurring customers. And no tipping options they can't pick to pay more if they want to tip for services. One or both of these added would make it a 5 star *update they fixed reoccurring invoice inconvenience which is great.

After being a long time customer and paying for a yearly subscription of $59, they are forcing you to a $199 yearly subscription. it used to be you get unlimited invoices with your plan. Now they limit the amount of invoices per month. To get unlimited, I need to pay more than triple I was paying before. I am not giving this greedy company 1 more cent of my business. Who is to say they won't triple their price at a later date? Can you really trust a company that would do that?

This app is getting worse not better. Not only is it not fully customizable, it's no longer saving estimates and invoices that I sometimes spend an hour writing! Last week a paid invoice disappeared completely before I could send it to the customer. BTW, that was a three page description of the work we performed, yeah I had to rewrite the whole damn thing. I don't even reply to support since nothing they suggest will retrieve these. Look elsewhere unless you enjoy wasting your time writing.

this app was charging me for 2 subscriptions but was only allowing me to use the lower subscription. 3 invoices a month was all i was allowed to create. The other subscription prices continue to go up. they don't notify you of price hikes; just charge your account. The other subscription was unlimited for $150; but I was never allowed to use it. canceling. No refund was given

great app, normally I don't ever leave reviews for anything. but honestly this app is pretty straight forward, easily allows you to add items or services for sale to customers or clients and has a variety of ways to receive payment, including sending invoices, taking cash payments, checks, charging cc in person or through invoice via stripe or PayPal integration. there are a few bugs here or there which is why I wouldn't give it 5 stars but very (simple) to use!

tried to pay to reactivate my account (expired cc). saw no way to do it. AI assistant was no help. Am currently pushing an hour waiting for an actual human to talk with me so I can tell them that I downloaded and looked at 3 free apps and sent out the invoice with the one I liked. I was willing to pay a monthly fee to keep using their app, but if they care so little, then I won't waste my time with them.

I used to suggest this app to all small business owners. It was incredibly easy to use but anytime now that I need help I get stuck talking to an AI that eventually transfers me to a person. but the person takes about 10 minutes between messages. and I can tell that they didn't read my prior conversation with the AI, so they just keep asking the same questions it is incredibly frustrating. They're going to ask to see the payment center which is its own separate thing outside of the google play.

Had the app for about a year now kind of wish there was an option to pay annually instead of monthly. Other than that app is simple and easy to use. Easily worth $15 a month or whatever it is. 5 stars. edit after 6years : Well now it's $20 a month and the app won't even let me past this subscription error. $20 a month for an app that doesn't even work? 2 stars.

decided mid subscription to change my plan from unlimited invoices to limited invoices, I paid 95 dollars in July and its now February and they are demanding to upgrade to 199 dollars to unlimited. not only that I've been with them since 2020 and they increased prices almost every year! I will be canceling my subscription soon and move to a more reliant app maker that appreciates their clients and business.

I've been using this for a couple of years now, and it works. I would love to use the "pay online" feature for my customers; however, I don't like the customer experience it gives. If you activate the "accept online payments" option, your customer will be greeted with a page that just says the total amount and a button that says "pay now" or something like that. Then they have to click a very small link that says "see full invoice" for them to actually see what I'm charging for.

I've used this app for about 1.5 years, and yes it work ok, it's makes sending invoices simple, but that's about it. I run a plumbing business, i have clients with over 100 invoices in a single year, but there's no way for me to type in an address and pull up all those invoices. Or pull up a clients name, have there all their invoices come up, and be able to click on it. The if invoice Simple had the ability to look invoices up with an address that would be. I am a premium member. Not for long!

Used to be good, but now his is just to get you to pay a subscription. If you read the fine print, it tells you that you only have a limited number of invoices to make before you have to begin paying a subscription. They don't tell you what that number is, but after getting setup with the app and trying to send out your 2nd invoice you find out it's only ONE invoice I understand having a simple free version with ads, and having to pay for more features, but this really just a trial.

Keep away, keep away , keep away! I pay for one year $99 and there was nothing in that app that you can not create using Microsoft Office. Wait, It get worse! after that year they notify an increase in the subscription of 20% extra. Yes 20%!, from $100 to $120. Could you adventure a reason for that? Wait, it gets worse again!!! the same day I cancel my subscription using the option in the same app, but they charge me anyway for another period because " I didn't use Google to cancel. Keep away!

Downloaded this app with the understanding that it's free. Went through the entire process of setting up payment, customers, etc. Created a test invoice and sent it to myself with no problems. Created first customer invoice and get to the end of the process and hit send and it brings you to a plan to subscribe to their services on monthly or yearly plan. Very misleading! Just tell me up from so I know what I'm getting into! Will be using PayPal instead, it's free.

The Subscription keeps getting more expensive and they're adding features that I don't want or need. I can't add the CC Processing company I use either (Square). Can't edit Payment dates if you forgot to mark the invoice paid same day. I went from 59.99 to 74.99, to 94.99 and now they want $149.99 for 1 year and $199.99 every year after. That's a ridiculous price jump! Its More than a 100% markup for the same basic features I need. Unfortunate I'll be shopping for alternative at this point.

Inaccurate/Deceptive description regarding the "Free" version. I only create 2-3 invoices/month. Based on the desc of this app saying that you can create a limited number of invoices for free or upgrade to create unlimited invoices. Well, yes, you can create them, but you have to subscribe to be able to send or print them. So, if you are looking for a functional free invoice maker, keep looking. Also, I have a client who asks that the invoices go to 2 email addresses, which this does not allow.

This invoice app used to be exactly what the name says: Simple. Now, not so much. In short, it sucks. A perfect example of killing the goose to get the golden eggs. Some private equity must have bought them out, now they are busy making "improvements" they can charge for and increasing their pricing structure. Meanwhile, nothing is better, you can't manually mark the date that an invoice was paid without an 8-step process. Don't waste money on this, go find a product that is actually SIMPLE.

I've lost 15 minutes of progress at a time on this app. I've written notes at the bottom of an invoice. Next, I just switched apps for 3 seconds. When I came back to the invoices app, all my work was lost, and I had to start over. Time is money, and I can't afford to run a business having to redo work. Also, It'd be nice to be able to scroll left or right amongst the opened view of the actual invoices, especially for the invoices that pop up when you use the search bar.

I initially had a strong appreciation for Invoice Simple, utilizing it for both of my businesses, which led me to give it a five-star review. However, my satisfaction has diminished to two stars due to the frequent price increases every two months and the loss of features unless I upgrade. Consequently, I plan to transition to a different invoicing application, as there are numerous more affordable or free alternatives available.

I've been using this app for years. Since it was beta. The past several months, they've made changes like increasing the price while limiting the invoices you send. I tried to upgrade, and all that did was make sure I was charged for 2 subscriptions every month while still having a strict limit on the number of invoices I can send. I tried contacting the company but didn't have any luck.

Been using this service for 8 years now, had 0 complaints in the past. It USED TO BE exactly what we needed. The last year they have more than doubled the price while at the same time they are minimizing the features. Forcing you to pay even more for a "higher tier" to get what you had in the past. STAY AWAY. Used to be a great service at a great price until GREED took over. Look elsewhere.

The same features offered to me 4 years ago for $19.95/ year are now $195/ year, and the app is still as glitchy as ever. I will not be returning after 5 years because of another massive yearly price increase and now a limit on invoices of 3 a month? The entire function of the subscription has been rendered useless, and I'm assuming it will lead to the demise of this company very soon. Best of luck and good riddance, Invoice Simple.

Use to be a great app. Trash now. Reminds me of a pay to win game. Started my company with this app, 5 years. Recently, in the past couple years they have increased price 30-40%. Was 50 a year. Now it's 100 basically. wait if you want access to photos add another 14 dollars to your monthly payment. They have literally done nothing in regards to making this app any better, only increased the price, and locked every option unless you pay. Also, i got locked out of my old photos. Use another app.

Simple to use with great looking invoices and estimates. I'm a one man mobile business, the end product looks like I have a staffed office. Update: 2025. Please work on this! It has been great for years and didn't mind you going up in price every year. but now the program takes forever to load! I don't want to change apps so please speed up the loading time

This has been my go-to invoicing app for 4 years, but I'm more and more unhappy with it. Invoices are now sent with a "pay now" button with no way to deactivate it. Clients try to use it which means either paying fees for a service I don't want or asking clients to submit payment again. This is sneaky and poor form. They have slow updates for Android (but not iPhone). The Android version has a bug that does not allow photos to be attached. $3/month for the browser app is just too much.

I remember a time when this app cost me $2.99/month, and although it has gotten incredibly expensive, I'd be lost without it! it's gotten pretty great over the years. it's easy to use, on my range and the receiving end as well, accepts all forms of payment ( except cash, obviously), looks professional, can be downloaded by your customers as a printable PDF from text messages, and keeps track of all your income for you. it's come a long way since it's early days and is an overall great app!

I've been using this app since 2016. It was fast at first, but have gotten slower over the years with all the payment pop-ups. The other downside is you can not search for anything other than customer's name or phone #. The final straw was when the annual plan went from 29.99 to 59.99. After hrs of searching and reading reviews, I will be using zoho invoice which is completely FREE. The upgrade annual plan is $25 which I will use if my business grows.

Makes it easy enough for me to write my estimates, send invoices, etc.etc. If only they would make it to where my customers knew they could pay with Zelle. I don't like taking credit card payments because it goes through PayPal. When a customer pays with credit or debit, PayPal ends up with 80$ on a 1000$ invoice. OUCH ! I don't think that's right, just because they do an electronic transfer? it's not like somebody is earning it by working..... Wait , I earned it.

Update: 3/21/23. Would be nice if spell check would work again in the app. I've been using the subscription version for a while and it's worked good for me. It would be nice if there was a "keyword" search bar to find invoices quickly. If you do a lot work for a client and need to find that particular invoice you have to search through them all unless you know the exact invoice number

The app Makes nice invoices But when it comes time to send the invoice if you're not subscribed the customer does not receive it. You can't even take a clear screenshot to forward a copy of the invoice in another way. Screenshots end up blurry and not legible. If you're downloading this just to do a couple of quick invoices find something else. You will have to subscribe. Then, I got a new phone and they couldn't even locate my account all of my work was lost. I found another app w/ no issues.

The app is (or at least it was) great at creating estimates and invoices. The update to allow the option to get paid by credit card is not an option. YOU WILL BE GIVING YOUR CUSTOMERS THE OPPORTUNITY TO PAY BY CREDIT CARD!! Even if you turn the option off, the email that is sent has the pay by credit card button. This just frustrates my customers and delays payment. I am having to search for an alternative app.

Need to be able to add photos via desktop version. Desktop version NEEDS to be able to create reporting, mobile has the option but limited detail. Often times the mobile vs desktop invoice/estimates are not accurate with each other. QB integration would be sweet! Would be awesome if you could save sales tax codes. Many times the invoice and estimate numbers are duplicated?? This was supposedly resolved multiple times but still having the same issues for over a year. 5 stars if fixed!!!

I used to like this app and use it for my business until updates changed everything. It shifted from a simple, user-friendly app to an app that wastes your time on entering payments for each invoice. You should take multiple steps to enter a payment. It used to be a single MARK PAID feature, and we could change the date or notes of the payment. Now, if you mark it as PAID, you can't modify the payment unless you enter everything manually, including the invoice or payment total, date, etc...

2 free documents and 1 free send is the best for anyone wanting to try this app out first before buying. However, I have yet to see the price of what it costs yet. other than that, this app had everything I would want in an invoice service! and they accept payments and help with tax, and you can text a link or email it to anyone. You can even choose to mark an invoice paid before sending it or ask for payment, even partial payments up front all through the app!

I've been using this app for about 8 years now and it has been a great tool to use. I don't need much just a basic invoice and this was perfect! the price has gone up every now and then but the latest price increase tripled and the benefits were cut by ⅔ if I remember correctly I was allowed 10 invoices a month and was paying $4.99/mo. not bad considering I sent maybe 7 invoices a month. now it's $15/mo. eith only 3 invoices! absolutely ridiculous. will actively start looking for a new service

I like this app so far, but I have one issue in that for some odd reason when I add a new customer I shows the invoices with another customer associated with that one. Additionally, it would be great if it were possible to make notes on the invoice that did not have to be shared with the customer. Also, since the app uses online payments through PayPal, and PayPal charges a fee, as the business owner I should be able to pass that fee on to the customer is I so choose.

Has totally changed my business., now runs smooth and I can track who owes or how much and when it was pd. The invoices are clean and customers are able to read them with ease. The text part is the best part and I always have the bill and all notes in hand , no hunting or digging it's all in the palm of ur hand or tablet. "Which I like best" this app is a game changer and the name says it all "Simple" trust me, if it wasn't I would not be able to use it. The price is unbelievable! 5 stars!!!

Good app. I wish there was some expese stuff, but its fast and clean. It's not worth $100 a year though. And especially not when the competition is the Wave app which is slower by a smidge, but will integrate with H&R block that I have do my business taxes. And is free. I'd rather pay for this one, but not by subscription, and not that much. I pay 120-130s for my tax software every year and that is COMPLEX.

My first invoice that was I put, went very smooth, and came out nicely. There were multiple options for sending the invoice out. The only thing I would like the app to fix, is for the email to be sent with my email, rather than the apps own email address. I say this because I found the emails sent directly from the app, were sent to my customers "spam" folders. Outside of that, satisfied thus far.

If somebody disputes something even after paying on their app with a credit card they auto draft the money right out of your linked bank account. The client even contacted them to say it was an accident. You pay monthly, then 3% per transaction. They also charge your account for declined credit card transactions. Horrible app. No phone number to contact them. Probably the worst out there. Ive now switched to square. Its cheaper and actually have customer service. Invoice simple is a rip off!!

This app is awesome! Very easy to use and quick for making up invoices. Unfortunately since the latest update, the app won't even open up anymore, it's just stuck on the logo when it first opens, It won't go past it for some reason. Even Uninstalled and reinstalled, no luck. Very very unfortunate as I have all my billing info amd everything on it. Not sure what the deal is. A quick fix would be greatly appreciated!

PLEASE DON'T WASTE YOUR TIME OR MONEY ON THIS APP. Used the app for almost 1 year and at first it was good, but then issues started to happen. Invoices start to duplicate, you can't close invoices, if you delete an invoice you have issues with the next invoices created. You can't even speak with customer service because they either don't have the correct solution or show they don't care. Now to top it off they will start charging way more in October for the same features. Not worth it

I am furious! I created and deleted (without sending) 2 estimates while trying to learn the components of this app and now I have to pay a minimum $5 per month for ONE INVOICE! I took the time to add multiple Items to my list and I have yet to send one estimate using this app! I have no idea if it even works as far as emailing my client! Your trial period should be based on items SENT! Upfront cost is vague, and monthly rates are overpriced for the number of invoices/estimates that can be sent.

Hate it!! It is advertised as a free invoice making app. NOT TRUE! Everything was great until the third invoice when the app star to try to charge me for a subscription. I don't appreciate that a little bit. If it is a "free" app that doesn't let you send the invoices for free to your clients it is NOT free at all! Deleting now. BYE!!!!

Good app, but it's annoying when you click the 'mark paid' button and it brings you to a screen that promotes for adding PayPal and payment systems to your app. I don't want to be bombarded everytime I am making a client a receipt. It should be an add on option in the settings, not a pop up every time I click 'mark paid'. Don't want any form of ads especially when I am paying money to use this app.

Set up an account. Filled out an invoice sheet. Hit complete and it asked for a subscription. You get no love for trying to pull an oke doke after I went through all the trouble. I'll find a free one that's just as effective! 0 *s Thanks for the quick response. I don't have a problem paying if I knew that's what I was required to do from the onset. The fact that I went through the whole process and then you spring it when I try to send it. It's underhanded and sneaky. Pay your people well!

I've been using this Invoice Maker for over 3 years now. Went paperless for my lawn service business. No more reams of paper, boxes of envelopes or postage costs. Paid for itself in less than a month. This app is very simple to use. You can upload your logo, create an invoice in minutes, then send it by text or e-mail, receive confirmation it's been sent, received & read and receive payments. Adding pictures to invoices is nice. Very professional. Great for small business at an affordable price. The recent updates have been making the app better and better. Simple & amazing!

I've used this app for nearly 10 years. It was rough in the beginning but has ever so slowly improved into a decent program. Unfortunately, it seems greed is taking over. They keep taking away features that have been included for years, forcing you to buy the next tier sub to get them back. It's now 20 bucks a month to send more than 10 invoices a month. I suppose if you do 200 invoices a month, it doesn't seem bad. For the little guy that does 11-15, probably best to look elsewhere sadly.

Seemed like it might work, but hardwalled a subscription demand before I could use it enough to decide if it's going to work for us. Not willing to spend money on a subscription just to find out if it's what we need. Also nagged me to rate the app after creating an account. The amount you get to use the app before the hard wall is not enough to rate the app.

EDIT: The developer has responded to this comment about using the share option. This option DOES NOT CURRENTLY EXIST. I contacted support and they confirmed this. Developer not being honest. Apparently they updated the app and now you can only send as an email directly through their server unless you go to the print menu, save it as pdf (can't change the file name), close the app, open your email, find where it was saved, and attach it. They have no timeline to fix this issue.

Mobile VS Desktop For some reason the mobile version does not appear to update what has been entered on the desktop version. Very inconvenient and we pay more to have both versions. One thing of the top of my head is that a deposit invoice was sent out on the desktop version and when I went to send the invoice out for the balance from my mobile because I didn't have my laptop with me. It showed the invoice with the full amount due. My app was up to date on play store.

Had been using this app for over a year. It was simple , easy, and convenient to use and reasonably priced for features . Moving forward, they want you to pay YEARLY almost doubled in price and LIMITED the invoices you can send, unless you pay TRIPLE what you were paying for unlimited. Tisk tisk, not renewing and moving to another invoice maker.

BEWARE: The sign up page has a small box where you consent to text messages and phone calls. The amount of personal information required in order to create an invoice is just ridiculous: number employees I have, how much my business makes annually, etc. These are required fields in order to even use the app. The categories for your type of business are in a drop down menu of which none applied to my line of work. There is no option to enter "other" and you can't continue until you select one.

No support ads after paying a year subscription I have years of Invoices i cant see. Just a total of each. I do deliveries. I add prices for different things and no way can I add them all to a list. The fees are just added to the invoice. I have no way to see them for deduction. I was just told by support to feel free to delete the cr-app. What trash. It will be deleted. And this is what you get from a foreign app provider. You are supplying some unknown with your personal information.

Not Free!! Not even cheap. I will probably end up using a paid service, but not from these liars. *the entire app is unusable without purchase. Other services have add ons but offer a base service which can be tailored to fit the individuals needs. Your app is misleading and wastes people time, and what did you do with my business info after I set up the app and found I only got 1 free invoice after I created a sample invoice?

The app works great, and it is definitely what I was looking for as a handyman, the only thing I wish they can do, is to make items sortable or arrangable on the invoices and estimates. For example, if I add an item on the invoice, I want to be able to move it up or down the list depending where I want my customers to see it. Other than that, I love it.

Generic app with greedy billing. You pay monthly for invoice credits, but if you don’t renew, they erase the unused ones you already paid for — no rollover, no warning. I paused during a slow period, not canceled, and still lost them. Customer service? Useless. They don’t care or try to understand. There are way better apps out there. If I could give 0 stars, I would. This is a scam for part-time users. Do NOT recommend.

absolutely incredible. I've used it for my business for 3 years now. it makes your business look very professional to your customers. it can keep up with your receipts pictures taxes everything. you can set up direct payment your processing company so when you send it to your customers through text or email they can pay with a card straight through it. only thing is they have increased their monthly subscription every month the past 3 or 4 months. hopefully they don't continue to do so

The worst in involving App! Mind you, after paying over $60 a year, customer service is poor, you cant even comput an excel spreadsheet for all invoices without losing information. Even with the new update you cant even have clients pay via credit, debit, paypal because it dosen't work! I've given them a year to get this right, yet no change. Just more bull via chat customer service. Update 08/14/21 app has went down three times in the last month leaving me without being able to invoice

I needed a free invoice maker. This one is really nice but not free. If you have a small business on the side like I do, I wouldn't recommend it. It gives you a few free clients, and you are able to send one invoice. Hard work goes into our businesses and you should be up front that there are limits for your app. Not cool. Monthly subscription required!

I've had this app for about 10 years. I loved it. Recently, they forced me to upgrade if I wanted to send more than 10 invoices per month. So, I upgraded to an annual plan. Google play processed the payment and Invoice Simple says they did not get the money. $218 just gone, and Google will not refund me. I'm stuck with the monthly limited plan. Their app support is all AI now, it's TERRIBLE!!!. This is theft!!!

I hate this invoice app! The amount they charge to process payments is disgusting! Especially considering that you already pay a monthly fee. They keep approximately $15 on a $400 dollar transaction, and STILL make you wait AT LEAST three days before getting it into your bank account! If other payment apps, such as Zelle, cashapp, Venmo, and PayPal can do it MUCH quicker and much cheaper, then this company has no excuse. I am currently looking for one more reasonably priced.

Ok I really love this app, and I love paying $5.99 per month for UNLIMITED invoices, what would make it even greater is if I could save my signiture. It would save me a bit of time to just create a signiture once and use that one for every invoice. If there is a way to do that, please let me know. Otherwise this app rocks! Seriously, i can save client info AND item info! Also maybe allow me to save the same photo and description to every invoice as well! this would save time too!

Really liked the app until I realized it wasn't free. Easy to create estimates, invoices, and import logos. Just starting a side business and can't justify the subscription at this time. Disappointed since I already added some information to the app and created a couple of estimates. I guess its back to pencil and paper.

The app navigates, very user-friendly.If I would change anything, it would be a portion of the add client, I often duplicate clients unknowingly until I notice them multiple times on the contact list-then it is too late, invoices are already constructed. I haven't found a way to merge account with exact names. I would love to see a selectable link to view invoices within a client summary list. The ease of the app is great, well worth the subscription. I only have suggestions, no complaints.

Great software. I use it on an iPhone, iPad, and a Galaxy Note S20 Ultra. All work great. I love that I can use my paid subscription on all devices without having to buy multiple times. I can generate an invoice for a client in 30 seconds including emailing it to them, then I'm alerted when they look at it. I also love that this software is simple - it's not trying to do anything it doesn't need to. Its not bloated, it just does a few things extremely well. I really have no complaints!

I was told in a reminder message my price was going up to $59.99 anaully. Now its telling me $199.99 annually for unlimited invoices. Which was a feature I already had for a cheaper price. Been using this program for 5 years. What a shame with the price hikes and little to no upgrades/changes on anything. When I first started using this app in 2020 is was $19.99.

The only issue is when i send the client the invoice via text, many clients have not received the bill. So i am going on with business as usual for a little over a month. I go to perchase orders for inventory and can't because my account was too low in funds. That can't be. So i do done research find out clients had not paid. I contacted clients, and they all responded with "well we never was able to open the link you sent." This has to be fixed so i can we work. This is a nightmare.

This app has been working well for almost a year and around October, 2021 it constantly glitches when trying to write the body of an email. I have used this extensively for almost a year and now I can't even write an email with the quote or invoice. Soooooo frustrating!!!! I even tried to install it on another phone thinking maybe my phone was the issue. But on that phone, the app will not even stay open!!! Just kicks me out and closes the app so now I am sure something has gone wrong !!!

This app is great for anyone with a small business or side business. It does have a small monthly fee to use, but well worth the money. This app allows you send bids and invoices. It keeps track of your paid and unpaid invoices, and keeps track of the total amount sent out in invoices and how much you have made. It is very easy to use and figure out. This app does more than i have said. A big 👍to the developer. I would absolutely recomend the app to others.

DISAPPOINTED you only get 3 free invoices. I just blew a whole days work. I don't mind paying for an app as long as it works and does everything that I need. Doesn't accurately calculate taxes or discounts No AutoFill. I was one of the first to use this app and it was awesome offered a free downgraded ver now you get 3 invoices then boots you FYI $6.99 a month $4.99 a month or $59.99 billed annually. I've used Invoice Maker off and on for over 3-4 years now. I have a small business that doesn't need to invoice as often. Other than that I love your template and being able to add my logo and itemized statement. Keeping track of who's paid and who hasn't. An customer service is number 1! You really can't beat that!

The (large) company I do contract work for loves this app... they wish every contractor would use this platform. I have to send them in a seprate e mail and is a pain for everyone. You guys are great but need to fix this!

Recent changes made things worse. They've released a desktop browser interface for the app (good) but they've decided that use of it requires a subscription upgrade (bad). I've never seen an additional paywall just to use the browser app. Next, the app now supports PayPal integration (good) but you cannot dismiss the "notification" to enable it (bad). I do not want PayPal, stop nudging me to turn it on. That is an ad in a paid app. Last, I was told by support I would need to have multiple accounts and seperate subscriptions to have invoices in different currencies, something Invoicely just supports for free (last straw). I understand the need for revenue, but the app is now price compareable to solutions that are more feature rich and have more usable free editions (like Invoicely).

As it always goes, this started out to be a good app. Now they are pushing your customers to pay when they get their invoice which sounds like a good thing. But they are also pushing this payment system when you haven't even set it up. You and your customers will be truly confused. Even though they are selling this product to businesses they do not have a customer service phone number. Average response on text is 3 to 4 hours.

Do not do the basic package. it is a scam. It says you get 3 invoices per month but I have now had 3 different months where it would not let me send one until it resets. read the fine print! it is set up so you upgrade to the more expensive package. nobody can tell me why. they have no customer service! you are not a priority unless you pay $150/yr

I've been with this app several years, and all of a sudden, they say I'm on a legacy plan that now only gives me 3 invoices per month unless I upgrade. I'm already paying $94 a year plus extra fees. You can make a single invoice and then it requires you to pay money to keep using it. This app is super easy to use and very helpful in remembering all your important notes, clients, payment info, dates and more. Best invoice app I have used so far. Don't appreciate that as a paying customer I need to upgrade from $5.99 plan to $9.99 plan in order to write invoices or estimates on my computer. Ridiculous how the $5.99 only covers mobile not pc. I've just made the first invoice for my husband's business, and it was fun! He wanted me to type up a bill in an email, but this looks much more professional. Good software, easy to use, easy to convert an estimate to a invoice. I didn't mind this app until they made me link my PayPal account to it in order to process card payments which turned into a dumpster fire! RUN AWAY

although the function of this app is great. at the rate they are going I'll be unsubscribing and looking elsewhere. the price goes up considerably every year. on top of that I just got a message saying that some of the tools I have will no longer be available to me. they are moving them to the "premium" accounts and I have to upgrade to continue using them. I AGAIN reached out to invoice fly and explained what's happening. They told me how sorry they were for the inconvenience...and STILL said id have to go to Google play...

So far so good! Been using this for a few weeks now and it has been great for my electricians business, estimates and invoices look great and being able to create and save a price sheet is an amazing feature. Update : App has a bug on android and it won't open now
Kool app I plan on using this for my business for a while,lets hope it brings me more $!
easy to use highly recommended
So far it looks amazing!! I saw my friends showing of so I just had to try it out

I'm just starting to use this app. They give you an incredible ability to play and learn with the app, once you have your first customer then you have to pay in order to send an estimate or invoice. There are many ways to take payment and surprisingly accept payments via affirm. I am very pleased with what I can see at this time.
good easy to making envoice
love it , easy and fast.
awesome apps quick and instant highly recommended
I love it and clients too!
I love the AI platform and image creator in the ap
quick easy and so appealing

Great app that helps my business running well. In the beginning, it didn't have more features, and I don't regret paying them for unlocking its features forever as it does upgrade its platform and by the time having more functions and tools on your hand to track and review everything. I recommend this for anyone who's starting or running his/her sole proprietorship business. Update: The app has a bug issue, and I'm not able to open it. They fixed the issue on the same day. Thank you.
nice app and easy to work

everything works good. Except that I can't select too many pictures when uploading to an estimate or invoice. Most of the time I get a message saying the file format in not supported. all other features seem to work fine.

Thank you for being an App of substance, instead of a conclave of misleading advertisements disguised as part of the actual App being installed, popping up during and after installation. Any company practicing this, has nothing of value, just complete garbage. Again thank you for this App
Awesome app really should look into this one.This is a good one

12-02-24 customer can't open the invoice link. I sent email to see if they can fix that problem but never answered and didn't fix it 09-04-25 again now I can't do any estimate or invoice I'm paying to much for this? I need another app.
works perfectly as described. Pricing is a bit high for how often i use it
I recommend it; it's a good app where they can help you with any invoice.
Its fast and easy to work with. It definitely makes your business look professional and more established.
I like the way I was able to put together an invoice quickly and send it.
Ever ready invoice making things easier, saving time and looking familiar.
perfect app!! please fix the pixelated images that get uploaded
all issues I've had have been easily and promptly resolved.
pretty, very interesting and easy to make your invoice quickly.
simple and easy way to make invoices for your services

playStoreReviews.text: I've done plenty of walks and an occasional bike ride with this app. I find the tracking to be pretty accurate compared to other apps. It does need to tell the difference between walking and driving, though. I often forget to pause or end the activity before heading home and my numbers are way off. Some other apps will pause if going too fast. Overall, it's a great app, and I enjoy seeing the map after my walks.

Great app for keeping track of our daily walks. Helps us reach some of our goals. It's a keeper. Update: I've had this app for almost 3 years now and it's only gotten better. It seems as I have progressed, the app has as well. I'm in the process of increasing my running along with my walking and I couldn't ask for a better companion than this app. It's very accurate and free of any technical problems. Fantastic! update ~ the app's still working great. I've added a stationary bike to my routine.

I used this app for the first time with another tracking app (that I use most of the time) to compare on a short hike. This one was a little more accurate and sensitive than the other app. I'll use it in comparison a couple more times, but already feel like it is going to replace the current one I'm using. I really like the extra information such as steps and elevation, and the summary when finished.

I do the free version. I love it. It offers plenty of info to improve what Im doing + prevents me from getting lost. So simple and user friendly! Naturally speaks when you hit a mile, or less if you set it so. Map traces your path and can be enlarged or diminished to see where you actually are as a GPS. It shows Steps, Calories, Elevation, Distance and more, Has a camera attached.... Never interferes with my phone and it's always been 100% for the 5-6 years I've used it. Oh! and it's add free!

I love this app I use it for running because I do cross country and it's free unless you upgrade but honestly I don't think you need it. The app is easy to use, and you can see others work outs and you can friend others or invite your friends and see each other's runs or any other exercise, the app can be used for bikes walking running treadmill stationary bikes, I really do love this app I have try so many and I like this one the best it the most accurate and easy to use.

Been using free version daily for over a week. It has really helped me to see my efforts progress. Day 1 I thought I was gonna give up and barely made 1/2 mile. 10 days later I am now up to 1.58 mi... Seeing the distance increments increase, even by small amounts, has really encouraged me to keep going. I want to be able to do 5 mi by end of the year!

Good app but not perfect. It's great to keep up with how much time you've been walking but distance isn't completely accurate. I measured the exact same distance multiple times and it measured different distances each time...one lap 0.25 miles, one .20, one. 30. It's not off much so it's not a deal breaker but I'm not sure how truly accurate it is over all. Also the speed is not consistent, but decent.

This app does exactly what I need! It accurately records my route and calculates the distance, pace and speed per each mile and for the whole workout. I've been using it for about 2.5 years, and it is great! I'm using the free version, so there are ads, but they are not causing any irritation, and are related to fitness products so I don't mind them. I like the "you're doing great!" notifications.

The app works great as long as you're not in a confined area. My initial use was on a short path that wound around in close proximity to itself. It was slightly more than 1/4 mile around so I was going around 8 times just to get a couple of miles. The app grossly overstated the miles and my walk path looked like I might have been "impaired" while walking. I'm now using a park with long paths that have a lot of separation and the distances have been spot on.

I enjoy using this app. I've been trying to be more active and enjoy seeing my progress and it even motivates me to workout. I enjoy that I'm able to save my workouts too. like everything else this app has its cons: I've gone hiking a lot and there were times which I wasn't able to track my progress bc app wasn't working w/o reception. sometimes I 'airplane mode' my phone to preserve batt span and app won't work w/o reception.

I have been using this for over a year and don't take a long walk without it. This is a great motivational app. It tracks your distance with a verbal mile marker to encourage you to do more. In case you think you went far enough it will give you the distance to verify your actual distance, rate per minute, calories burned. Make sure to turn on your phone location before you start. 2026- still using the Map My Walk app and love it.

Love the ease of using this app. I use it as a backup for my fitbit which measures distance a bit differently than MapMyWalk, and the times are off by about 20 seconds from each other, but I find this one to be much more consistent. I also love that I can plot out a route and see beforehand what the distance is, and can modify it to meet my needs for distance. Great app!

I like to use this app when I take my dog on our walks. Up until recently it was great. My most recent walk it doesn't seem to have recorded or at least not accurately. I tried holding to finish as I usually do and it seems to just get frozen on the 1 screen. Can't get off that unless I close out and reopen but ot brings me right back to the incorrect info. I'd hate to have to find a new app but if it's going to keep doing this, I might end up uninstalling and using a different app.

it's actually 4.5 stars, but I like it, it works great, but can you make it where it doesn't completely stop when I open my camera app please, cuz it's happened to me a lot of times, like it doesn't ask me if I want to resume and it doesn't say hold to stop, and I completely stops and takes me to the page that asks how my walk was, so plz fix that

10/17/2025 Updated after over a year of daily use to track my walking stats: I LOVE HAVING ACCESS TO ALL MY FITNESS STATS IN ONE PLACE! [both free & paid versions are top tier fitness trackers] I just love having all my stats in one place. MY FAVORITE THING HAS BEEN HOW IT HELPS ME TO STAY ACCOUNTABLE TO MY FULL POTENTIAL. The notes section serves as a great tool for keeping up with TOTAL FITNESS STATS. I note my current weight, BMI, and next goal every few months. Also ☆ entries to earmark.

Great app glad I downloaded it. It's easy to use and GPS works well out in the mountains. Update 2/20/26 I've been using this app for 8 years and have been happy with it. But I have had some issues from time to time when starting a workout the app wants to save the workout before I have started. It may take up to 3 times before I can start the workout. I really enjoy the challenge yourself in the goal section.

What a fun app! Very encouraging and keeps great stats! I really like this app, it can keep you motivated. It keeps just about every stat you need. And it's amazing how accurate it is and how it maps your walk for future walks. It is really helping with my wife's total knee replacement rehabilitation. And easy to use!

When it works, it works well but I finally decided to uninstall after too many awkward straight lines where connection was lost, or walks fully lost due to app crashing (not very common but has happened more than 5 times in the last year). It's a bummer cause I was using this every single day. I guess we'll have to see if alternatives have the same issues.

my friend and I both have this app and we both eventually got rid of it. It would would continue keeping track of time but not distance. It's one thing if it happens to one person once in a while, but not to two different people. I also have the app map my ride (for cycling) and it always worked fine. What's messed up is when my map my walk seemed to be working the distance didn't match up between the two apps, they are both GPS based apps how can they have different distances on the same trail

I have been so frustrated with this app. It freezes during walks, loses parts of my activity, and today it failed to sync and lost my whole walk. It's very discouraging to lose a whole workout. Edited: It works much better now than it used to. Occasionally I still lose a workout, but it happens very rarely. And it hasn't frozen in months. Great for tracking walks.

I just use the free version, but I've been very happy with the performance of this app. It has all the features I need; total distance hiked, elevation gain, maps of your hike, total time, and other features. These all do an accurate job when comparing to trail maps. My only complaint is that it doesn't have automatic pause. When taking a break it continues to add time. If I pause it I often forget to restart it and the total time isn't properly recorded. Overall, a great app!

Very accurate for distance, requires serious calibration to get calories correct, but works great after that is done. Still working great after many months and miles. My one fault is that it is not consistent from one phone to another. I can carry three phones on the same walk and get three different distances. Somehow I suspect that's a problem with the GPS units in the phones . I have had to remove and reinstall this app three times in the last 2 months because it hung up.

It's four stars from me because it does a great job of tracking/mapping your progress even when out of cell service. It gives me the stats that I like and is pretty easy to use. The only problem is that sometimes when I start a workout it automatically switches to save mode, which then doesn't track your workout at all. After one entire missed workout I check that the app is keeping time before I stow my phone for the hike. A small inconvenience, really.

Very frustrating! Been using it for years but now, more often than not, it will not stop and go into a loop when attempts are made to save a workout. This occurs even with a strong wifi signal. I have uninstalled the app, restarted my phone and the inconsistencies continue. It often then records a 2 mile walk taking 25 hours. It will also pick up on an auto drive so that it records a 90 mile walk in 4 hours. It used to be a fun, now it's a joke.

Works for me. When I got a new phone, it had another app preinstalled so I tried that app for a while and was disappointed. Map my walk runs in the background to give you an accurate map of your travel. That means it is measuring distance correctly. The preinstalled app didn't do this, and it mapped me jumping over houses, lakes, rivers, and canyons, giving bogus distances. I had used map my walk on my old phone and I'm glad to have it back again. I don't need or want an intrusive health app.

Does what it's supposed to do and accurately. Used the free version for a few months liked it enough to upgrade on the trial plan. Basically I got more interval splits and the option of having the nagging voice update your progress. Pros: Mileage via the GPS is accurate in my part of the world. Arizona, USA. Cons: Can't find many other features beyond the 2 mentioned to warrant the annual fee. They need to offer something else useful or I'm going back to the free version at my subscriptions end.

This is a really useful app for tracking a workout. Easy to use, and I love seeing the route mapped out at the end. The only things I would change are (1) give the pace in MPH, and (2) give a prompt asking if you are done once you stop for a few minutes (or start moving at car speeds). I forget the app is running sometimes.

Used to work great. However, now for whatever reason, shortly into a walk the GPS signal gets lost and starts floating and it won't pick up the signal again until I have finished the walk or I happen to open the app up and catch it messing up. I love this app cause it tracks the miles I walk ACCURATELY and how long it takes ACCURATELY. It would be nice if it got back to that. I checked to see if there were updates needed and there weren't.

Good location accuracy. I like the vocal summary given at each mile. Linkage to MyFitnessPal site is a big plus. I've used this app for a few years now, and the quality has been maintained well, with no outages that I can recall. I'll keep on using it unless my health fails, or the app changes to make it no longer useful for me. I hope neither happens anytime soon!

Works great for tracking seems to be quite accurate but what happened to the Auto Pause??? If I have to stop before crossing a street, or if I stop and sit down for a bit to get a drink of water it used to pause.
